title: Efficient and Accurate Conversion of Spiking Neural Network with Burst Spikes
title_zh: 具有突发尖峰的尖峰神经网络的高效准确转换
comment: This paper was accepted by IJCAI2022
comments: This paper was accepted by IJCAI2022
abstract: Spiking neural network (SNN), as a brain-inspired energy-efficient neural network, has attracted the interest of researchers. While the training of spiking neural networks is still an open problem. One effective way is to map the weight of trained ANN to SNN to achieve high reasoning ability. However, the converted spiking neural network often suffers from performance degradation and a considerable time delay. To speed up the inference process and obtain higher accuracy, we theoretically analyze the errors in the conversion process from three perspectives: the differences between IF and ReLU, time dimension, and pooling operation. We propose a neuron model for releasing burst spikes, a cheap but highly efficient method to solve residual information. In addition, Lateral Inhibition Pooling (LIPooling) is proposed to solve the inaccuracy problem caused by MaxPooling in the conversion process. Experimental results on CIFAR and ImageNet demonstrate that our algorithm is efficient and accurate. For example, our method can ensure nearly lossless conversion of SNN and only use about 1/10 (less than 100) simulation time under 0.693$\times$ energy consumption of the typical method. Our code is available at https://github.com/Brain-Inspired-Cognitive-Engine/Conversion_Burst.

While the training of spiking neural networks is still an open problem. One effective way is to map the weight of trained ANN to SNN to achieve high reasoning ability. However, the converted spiking neural network often suffers from performance degradation and a considerable time delay. To speed up the inference process and obtain higher accuracy, we theoretically analyze the errors in the conversion process from three perspectives: the differences between IF and ReLU, time dimension, and pooling operation. We propose a neuron model for releasing burst spikes, a cheap but highly efficient method to solve residual information. In addition, Lateral Inhibition Pooling (LIPooling) is proposed to solve the inaccuracy problem caused by MaxPooling in the conversion process. Experimental results on CIFAR and ImageNet demonstrate that our algorithm is efficient and accurate. For example, our method can ensure nearly lossless conversion of SNN and only use about 1/10 (less than 100) simulation time under 0.693$\times$ energy consumption of the typical method. Our code is available at https://github.com/Brain-Inspired-Cognitive-Engine/Conversion_Burst.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）作为一种受大脑启发的节能神经网络，引起了研究人员的兴趣。然而尖峰神经网络的训练仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。一种有效的方法是将训练好的ANN的权重映射到SNN以实现高推理能力。然而，转换后的尖峰神经网络常常会出现性能下降和相当大的时间延迟。为了加快推理过程并获得更高的精度，我们从 IF 和 ReLU 的差异、时间维度和池化操作三个角度对转换过程中的误差进行了理论上的分析。我们提出了一种用于释放突发尖峰的神经元模型，这是一种解决残留信息的廉价但高效的方法。此外，还提出了Lateral Inhibition Pooling（LIPooling）来解决转换过程中MaxPooling带来的不准确问题。在 CIFAR 和 ImageNet 上的实验结果表明我们的算法高效且准确。例如，我们的方法可以确保SNN的近乎无损转换，并且在0.693$\times$的能耗下仅使用典型方法的大约1/10（小于100）的模拟时间。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Brain-Inspired-Cognitive-Engine/Conversion_Burst 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效准确的脉冲神经网络（SNN）转换方法，通过爆发脉冲机制和改进池化操作解决性能下降与延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管将人工神经网络（ANN）权重映射到SNN是常见做法，但转换后常出现性能退化和显著时间延迟，亟需优化转换过程。
AI.method: 从IF与ReLU差异、时间维度及池化操作三方面理论分析误差，提出爆发脉冲神经元模型解决残差信息，并设计Lateral Inhibition Pooling（LIPooling）替代MaxPooling。
AI.result: 在CIFAR和ImageNet数据集上实现几乎无损转换，仅需约1/10的模拟时间且能耗降低至典型方法的0.693倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过爆发脉冲机制和LIPooling有效提升了SNN转换的效率与精度，验证了理论分析的可行性。

title: Understanding the Characteristics of Visual Contents in Open Source Issue Discussions: A Case Study of Jupyter Notebook
title_zh: 理解开源问题讨论中视觉内容的特征：以 Jupyter Notebook 为例
abstract: Most issue tracking systems for open source software (OSS) development include features for community members to embed visual contents, such as images and videos, to enhance the discussion. Although playing an important role, there is little knowledge on the characteristics of the visual contents to support their use. To address this gap, we conducted an empirical study on the Jupyter Notebook project. We found that more than a quarter of the issues in the Jupyter Notebook project included visual contents. Additionally, issues that had visual contents in the comments but not in the issue posts tended to have a longer discussion and to involve a larger number of discussants. In our qualitative analysis, we identified eight types of visual contents in our sample, with about 60% including screenshots or mockups of the main product. We also found that visual contents served diverse purposes, touching both problem and solution spaces of the issues. Our effort serves as an important step towards a comprehensive understanding of the characteristics of visual contents in OSS issue discussions. Our results provided several design implications for issue tracking systems to better facilitate the use of visual contents.
summary: Most issue tracking systems for open source software (OSS) development include features for community members to embed visual contents, such as images and videos, to enhance the discussion. Although playing an important role, there is little knowledge on the characteristics of the visual contents to support their use. To address this gap, we conducted an empirical study on the Jupyter Notebook project. We found that more than a quarter of the issues in the Jupyter Notebook project included visual contents. Additionally, issues that had visual contents in the comments but not in the issue posts tended to have a longer discussion and to involve a larger number of discussants. In our qualitative analysis, we identified eight types of visual contents in our sample, with about 60% including screenshots or mockups of the main product. We also found that visual contents served diverse purposes, touching both problem and solution spaces of the issues. Our effort serves as an important step towards a comprehensive understanding of the characteristics of visual contents in OSS issue discussions. Our results provided several design implications for issue tracking systems to better facilitate the use of visual contents.
abstract_zh: 大多数用于开源软件 (OSS) 开发的问题跟踪系统都包含供社区成员嵌入视觉内容（例如图像和视频）以增强讨论的功能。尽管发挥着重要作用，但对支持其使用的视觉内容的特征知之甚少。为了解决这一差距，我们对 Jupyter Notebook 项目进行了实证研究。我们发现 Jupyter Notebook 项目中超过四分之一的问题包含视觉内容。此外，评论中有视觉内容但问题帖子中没有视觉内容的问题往往会进行更长的讨论，并涉及更多的讨论者。在我们的定性分析中，我们在样本中确定了八种类型的视觉内容，其中约 60% 包括主要产品的屏幕截图或模型。我们还发现视觉内容有多种用途，涉及问题和问题的解决方案空间。我们的努力是全面理解 OSS 问题讨论中视觉内容特征的重要一步。我们的结果为问题跟踪系统提供了一些设计启示，以更好地促进视觉内容的使用。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析Jupyter Notebook项目的开源问题讨论，研究视觉内容（如图片、视频）在其中的特征及其对讨论的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉内容在开源软件问题跟踪系统中被广泛使用，但其具体特征和作用机制尚未被充分研究，需填补这一知识空白。
AI.method: 采用实证研究方法，对Jupyter Notebook项目的问题讨论数据进行定量统计与定性分析，识别视觉内容类型及其用途。
AI.result: 超过四分之一的问题包含视觉内容，且评论中含视觉内容的问题讨论更频繁、参与人数更多；识别出八类视觉内容，其中60%为产品截图或原型图，视觉内容同时服务于问题描述与解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了视觉内容在开源讨论中的关键作用，为问题跟踪系统的设计优化提供了依据，例如增强视觉内容的组织与检索功能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过分析Jupyter Notebook项目的开源问题讨论，研究视觉内容（如图片、视频）在其中的特征及其对讨论的影响。

authors_text: Shuyue Stella Li,Hannah Peeler,Andrew N. Sloss,Kenneth N. Reid,Wolfgang Banzhaf
title: Genetic Improvement in the Shackleton Framework for Optimizing LLVM Pass Sequences
title_zh: 用于优化 LLVM 传递序列的 Shackleton 框架中的遗传改进
abstract: Genetic improvement is a search technique that aims to improve a given acceptable solution to a problem. In this paper, we present the novel use of genetic improvement to find problem-specific optimized LLVM pass sequences. We develop a pass-level patch representation in the linear genetic programming framework, Shackleton, to evolve the modifications to be applied to the default optimization pass sequences. Our GI-evolved solution has a mean of 3.7% runtime improvement compared to the -O3 optimization level in the default code generation options which optimizes on runtime. The proposed GI method provides an automatic way to find a problem-specific optimization sequence that improves upon a general solution without any expert domain knowledge. In this paper, we discuss the advantages and limitations of the GI feature in the Shackleton Framework and present our results.
summary: Genetic improvement is a search technique that aims to improve a given acceptable solution to a problem. In this paper, we present the novel use of genetic improvement to find problem-specific optimized LLVM pass sequences. We develop a pass-level patch representation in the linear genetic programming framework, Shackleton, to evolve the modifications to be applied to the default optimization pass sequences. Our GI-evolved solution has a mean of 3.7% runtime improvement compared to the -O3 optimization level in the default code generation options which optimizes on runtime. The proposed GI method provides an automatic way to find a problem-specific optimization sequence that improves upon a general solution without any expert domain knowledge. In this paper, we discuss the advantages and limitations of the GI feature in the Shackleton Framework and present our results.
abstract_zh: 遗传改进是一种搜索技术，旨在改进给定的问题的可接受的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了利用遗传改进来寻找针对特定问题的优化 LLVM 传递序列的新方法。我们在线性遗传编程框架 Shackleton 中开发了传递级补丁表示，以演化应用于默认优化传递序列的修改。与在运行时优化的默认代码生成选项中的 -O3 优化级别相比，我们的 GI 演进解决方案的运行时改进平均为 3.7%。所提出的 GI 方法提供了一种自动方法来寻找特定于问题的优化序列，该序列改进了通用解决方案，而无需任何专业领域知识。在本文中，我们讨论了沙克尔顿框架中 GI 特征的优点和局限性，并展示了我们的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在Shackleton框架中使用遗传改进技术优化LLVM优化通道序列，以提升程序运行时性能。
AI.motivation: 默认的LLVM优化选项（如-O3）可能无法针对特定问题达到最优效果，且依赖专家知识。遗传改进提供了一种自动化优化方法，无需领域专业知识即可生成问题特定的优化序列。
AI.method: 基于线性遗传编程框架Shackleton，设计通道级补丁表示，通过遗传改进技术演化修改默认优化通道序列的策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在平均运行时性能上较默认-O3优化提升了3.7%。
AI.conclusion: 遗传改进在Shackleton框架中能有效生成问题特定的优化序列，但其效果依赖于问题特性及遗传参数设置，需进一步探索适用场景。

search_text: Genetic Improvement in the Shackleton Framework for Optimizing LLVM Pass Sequences 用于优化 LLVM 传递序列的 Shackleton 框架中的遗传改进 Genetic improvement is a search technique that aims to improve a given acceptable solution to a problem. In this paper, we present the novel use of genetic improvement to find problem-specific optimized LLVM pass sequences. We develop a pass-level patch representation in the linear genetic programming framework, Shackleton, to evolve the modifications to be applied to the default optimization pass sequences. Our GI-evolved solution has a mean of 3.7% runtime improvement compared to the -O3 optimization level in the default code generation options which optimizes on runtime. The proposed GI method provides an automatic way to find a problem-specific optimization sequence that improves upon a general solution without any expert domain knowledge. In this paper, we discuss the advantages and limitations of the GI feature in the Shackleton Framework and present our results. 遗传改进是一种搜索技术，旨在改进给定的问题的可接受的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了利用遗传改进来寻找针对特定问题的优化 LLVM 传递序列的新方法。我们在线性遗传编程框架 Shackleton 中开发了传递级补丁表示，以演化应用于默认优化传递序列的修改。与在运行时优化的默认代码生成选项中的 -O3 优化级别相比，我们的 GI 演进解决方案的运行时改进平均为 3.7%。所提出的 GI 方法提供了一种自动方法来寻找特定于问题的优化序列，该序列改进了通用解决方案，而无需任何专业领域知识。在本文中，我们讨论了沙克尔顿框架中 GI 特征的优点和局限性，并展示了我们的结果。 本文提出在Shackleton框架中使用遗传改进技术优化LLVM优化通道序列，以提升程序运行时性能。 Shuyue Stella Li,Hannah Peeler,Andrew N. Sloss,Kenneth N. Reid,Wolfgang Banzhaf cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Tomoyuki Yokouchi,Satoshi Sugimoto,Bivas Rana,Shinichiro Seki,Naoki Ogawa,Yuki Shiomi,Shinya Kasai,Yoshichika Otani
title: Pattern recognition with neuromorphic computing using magnetic-field induced dynamics of skyrmions
title_zh: 使用斯格明子磁场感应动力学进行神经拟态计算的模式识别
abstract: Nonlinear phenomena in physical systems can be used for brain-inspired computing with low energy consumption. Response from the dynamics of a topological spin structure called skyrmion is one of the candidates for such a neuromorphic computing. However, its ability has not been well explored experimentally. Here, we experimentally demonstrate neuromorphic computing using nonlinear response originating from magnetic-field induced dynamics of skyrmions. We designed a simple-structured skyrmion-based neuromorphic device and succeeded in handwritten digit recognition with the accuracy as large as 94.7 % and waveform recognition. Notably, there exists a positive correlation between the recognition accuracy and the number of skyrmions in the devices. The large degree of freedoms of skyrmion systems, such as the position and the size, originate the more complex nonlinear mapping and the larger output dimension, and thus high accuracy. Our results provide a guideline for developing energy-saving and high-performance skyrmion neuromorphic computing devices.
summary: Nonlinear phenomena in physical systems can be used for brain-inspired computing with low energy consumption. Response from the dynamics of a topological spin structure called skyrmion is one of the candidates for such a neuromorphic computing. However, its ability has not been well explored experimentally. Here, we experimentally demonstrate neuromorphic computing using nonlinear response originating from magnetic-field induced dynamics of skyrmions. We designed a simple-structured skyrmion-based neuromorphic device and succeeded in handwritten digit recognition with the accuracy as large as 94.7 % and waveform recognition. Notably, there exists a positive correlation between the recognition accuracy and the number of skyrmions in the devices. The large degree of freedoms of skyrmion systems, such as the position and the size, originate the more complex nonlinear mapping and the larger output dimension, and thus high accuracy. Our results provide a guideline for developing energy-saving and high-performance skyrmion neuromorphic computing devices.
abstract_zh: 物理系统中的非线性现象可用于低能耗的类脑计算。称为斯格明子的拓扑自旋结构的动力学响应是这种神经形态计算的候选者之一。然而，其能力尚未得到很好的实验探索。在这里，我们通过实验证明了使用源自斯格明子磁场感应动力学的非线性响应的神经形态计算。我们设计了一种结构简单的基于斯格明子的神经拟态器件，并成功实现了准确率高达94.7%的手写数字识别和波形识别。值得注意的是，识别精度与设备中斯格明子的数量之间存在正相关关系。斯格明子系统的位置、尺寸等自由度较大，导致其非线性映射更加复杂，输出维数也较大，因而精度较高。我们的结果为开发节能和高性能斯格明子神经形态计算设备提供了指导。

AI.tldr: 本文实验展示了基于磁場誘導的天體磁矩動態的神經形态計算，實現了高準確率的手寫數字和波形識別。
AI.motivation: 傳統神經形态計算需低能耗且具非線性特性，而天體磁矩的動態響應尚未充分實驗驗證其潛力。
AI.method: 設計簡易天體磁矩器件，利用磁場誘導的非線性動態進行模式識別，並分析天體磁矩數量與識別準確率的關聯性。
AI.result: 手寫數字識別準確率達94.7%，波形識別成功；天體磁矩數量與準確率呈正相關，系統自由度提升非線性映射複雜度與輸出維度。
AI.conclusion: 天體磁矩系統提供低能耗、高精度神經形态計算的可行方案，為未來器件開發提供指導。

title: Simultaneous Control and Trajectory Estimation for Collision Avoidance of Autonomous Robotic Spacecraft Systems
title_zh: 自主机器人航天器系统避碰的同步控制和轨迹估计
comment: 6 pages, 13 figures, international conference on robotics and automation
comments: 6 pages, 13 figures, international conference on robotics and automation
abstract: We propose factor graph optimization for simultaneous planning, control, and trajectory estimation for collision-free navigation of autonomous systems in environments with moving objects. The proposed online probabilistic motion planning and trajectory estimation navigation technique generates optimal collision-free state and control trajectories for autonomous vehicles when the obstacle motion model is both unknown and known. We evaluate the utility of the algorithm to support future autonomous robotic space missions.
summary: We propose factor graph optimization for simultaneous planning, control, and trajectory estimation for collision-free navigation of autonomous systems in environments with moving objects. The proposed online probabilistic motion planning and trajectory estimation navigation technique generates optimal collision-free state and control trajectories for autonomous vehicles when the obstacle motion model is both unknown and known. We evaluate the utility of the algorithm to support future autonomous robotic space missions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出因子图优化，用于同步规划、控制和轨迹估计，以实现具有移动物体的环境中自主系统的无碰撞导航。当障碍物运动模型未知和已知时，所提出的在线概率运动规划和轨迹估计导航技术可以为自动驾驶车辆生成最佳的无碰撞状态和控制轨迹。我们评估该算法在支持未来自主机器人太空任务方面的实用性。

AI.tldr: 提出因子图优化方法，实现自主机器人航天器在动态环境中的无碰撞导航，同时进行路径规划、控制和轨迹估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时处理动态环境中的未知障碍物运动模型，且规划与控制分离导致效率低下，需集成化方法提升自主性与安全性。
AI.method: 采用因子图优化技术，结合在线概率运动规划与轨迹估计，处理已知和未知的障碍物运动模型。
AI.result: 验证了算法在动态环境中的有效性，为未来自主航天任务提供可靠导航方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现同时控制与轨迹估计，适用于多种障碍物模型，为复杂环境下的自主航天器导航提供新思路。

search_text: Simultaneous Control and Trajectory Estimation for Collision Avoidance of Autonomous Robotic Spacecraft Systems 自主机器人航天器系统避碰的同步控制和轨迹估计 We propose factor graph optimization for simultaneous planning, control, and trajectory estimation for collision-free navigation of autonomous systems in environments with moving objects. The proposed online probabilistic motion planning and trajectory estimation navigation technique generates optimal collision-free state and control trajectories for autonomous vehicles when the obstacle motion model is both unknown and known. We evaluate the utility of the algorithm to support future autonomous robotic space missions. 我们提出因子图优化，用于同步规划、控制和轨迹估计，以实现具有移动物体的环境中自主系统的无碰撞导航。当障碍物运动模型未知和已知时，所提出的在线概率运动规划和轨迹估计导航技术可以为自动驾驶车辆生成最佳的无碰撞状态和控制轨迹。我们评估该算法在支持未来自主机器人太空任务方面的实用性。 提出因子图优化方法，实现自主机器人航天器在动态环境中的无碰撞导航，同时进行路径规划、控制和轨迹估计。 Matthew King-Smith,Panagiotis Tsiotras,Frank Dellaert cs.RO

authors_text: Aaron Dharna,Charlie Summers,Rohin Dasari,Julian Togelius,Amy K. Hoover
title: Watts: Infrastructure for Open-Ended Learning
title_zh: Watts：开放式学习的基础设施
comment: ICLR Workshop on Agent Learning in Open-Endedness (ALOE 2022)
comments: ICLR Workshop on Agent Learning in Open-Endedness (ALOE 2022)
abstract: This paper proposes a framework called Watts for implementing, comparing, and recombining open-ended learning (OEL) algorithms. Motivated by modularity and algorithmic flexibility, Watts atomizes the components of OEL systems to promote the study of and direct comparisons between approaches. Examining implementations of three OEL algorithms, the paper introduces the modules of the framework. The hope is for Watts to enable benchmarking and to explore new types of OEL algorithms. The repo is available at \url{https://github.com/aadharna/watts}
summary: This paper proposes a framework called Watts for implementing, comparing, and recombining open-ended learning (OEL) algorithms. Motivated by modularity and algorithmic flexibility, Watts atomizes the components of OEL systems to promote the study of and direct comparisons between approaches. Examining implementations of three OEL algorithms, the paper introduces the modules of the framework. The hope is for Watts to enable benchmarking and to explore new types of OEL algorithms. The repo is available at \url{https://github.com/aadharna/watts}
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个名为 Watts 的框架，用于实现、比较和重组开放式学习 (OEL) 算法。在模块化和算法灵活性的推动下，Watts 将 OEL 系统的组件原子化，以促进方法的研究和直接比较。本文考察了三种 OEL 算法的实现，介绍了该框架的模块。 Watts 希望能够实现基准测试并探索新型 OEL 算法。该存储库位于 \url{https://github.com/aadharna/watts}

AI.tldr: 本文提出名为Watts的框架，用于实现、比较和重组开放端学习（OEL）算法，旨在促进算法研究和基准测试。
AI.motivation: 为了解决OEL系统缺乏模块化和灵活性的问题，通过原子化组件设计，推动不同算法的直接比较与创新研究。
AI.method: 设计Watts框架，将OEL系统分解为可复用模块，并通过三种OEL算法的实现验证框架的模块化结构。
AI.result: 成功构建了Watts框架，支持算法基准测试与新OEL算法类型的探索，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Watts框架为开放端学习领域提供了灵活的实验基础设施，有助于加速算法创新与比较研究。

title: Spatio-Temporal Graph Localization Networks for Image-based Navigation
title_zh: 用于基于图像的导航的时空图定位网络
abstract: Localization in topological maps is essential for image-based navigation using an RGB camera. Localization using only one camera can be challenging in medium-to-large-sized environments because similar-looking images are often observed repeatedly, especially in indoor environments. To overcome this issue, we propose a learning-based localization method that simultaneously utilizes the spatial consistency from topological maps and the temporal consistency from time-series images captured by the robot. Our method combines a convolutional neural network (CNN) to embed image features and a recurrent-type graph neural network to perform accurate localization. When training our model, it is difficult to obtain the ground truth pose of the robot when capturing images in real-world environments. Hence, we propose a sim2real transfer approach with semi-supervised learning that leverages simulator images with the ground truth pose in addition to real images. We evaluated our method quantitatively and qualitatively and compared it with several state-of-the-art baselines. The proposed method outperformed the baselines in environments where the map contained similar images. Moreover, we evaluated an image-based navigation system incorporating our localization method and confirmed that navigation accuracy significantly improved in the simulator and real environments when compared with the other baseline methods.
summary: Localization in topological maps is essential for image-based navigation using an RGB camera. Localization using only one camera can be challenging in medium-to-large-sized environments because similar-looking images are often observed repeatedly, especially in indoor environments. To overcome this issue, we propose a learning-based localization method that simultaneously utilizes the spatial consistency from topological maps and the temporal consistency from time-series images captured by the robot. Our method combines a convolutional neural network (CNN) to embed image features and a recurrent-type graph neural network to perform accurate localization. When training our model, it is difficult to obtain the ground truth pose of the robot when capturing images in real-world environments. Hence, we propose a sim2real transfer approach with semi-supervised learning that leverages simulator images with the ground truth pose in addition to real images. We evaluated our method quantitatively and qualitatively and compared it with several state-of-the-art baselines. The proposed method outperformed the baselines in environments where the map contained similar images. Moreover, we evaluated an image-based navigation system incorporating our localization method and confirmed that navigation accuracy significantly improved in the simulator and real environments when compared with the other baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 拓扑图中的定位对于使用 RGB 相机进行基于图像的导航至关重要。在中型到大型环境中，仅使用一台摄像机进行定位可能具有挑战性，因为经常会重复观察到外观相似的图像，尤其是在室内环境中。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种基于学习的定位方法，该方法同时利用拓扑图的空间一致性和机器人捕获的时间序列图像的时间一致性。我们的方法结合了卷积神经网络（CNN）来嵌入图像特征和循环型图神经网络来执行精确定位。在训练我们的模型时，在现实环境中捕获图像时很难获得机器人的地面真实姿态。因此，我们提出了一种具有半监督学习的 sim2real 迁移方法，除了真实图像之外，还利用具有地面真实姿势的模拟器图像。我们定量和定性地评估了我们的方法，并将其与几个最先进的基线进行了比较。在地图包含相似图像的环境中，所提出的方法优于基线。此外，我们评估了结合我们的定位方法的基于图像的导航系统，并确认与其他基线方法相比，模拟器和真实环境中的导航精度显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空图定位网络的图像导航方法，通过结合拓扑地图的空间一致性和时间序列图像的时序一致性，解决大尺度环境中图像重复导致的定位难题。
AI.motivation: 在中大型室内环境中，仅依赖单目相机进行图像定位时，重复出现的相似图像会导致定位精度下降，传统方法难以有效处理此类场景。
AI.method: 融合卷积神经网络（CNN）提取图像特征与循环型图神经网络（GNN）建模时空关系，并设计模拟到现实的半监督学习框架，结合仿真数据与真实数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在包含相似图像的环境中，该方法在定位精度和导航成功率上均优于现有先进算法，且在仿真与真实场景中均表现出显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过时空一致性约束与跨域数据迁移，所提方法有效解决了图像重复带来的定位模糊问题，为基于视觉的自主导航提供了新思路。

authors_text: Pengyue Hou,Ming Zhou,Jie Han,Petr Musilek,Xingyu Li
title: Adversarial Fine-tune with Dynamically Regulated Adversary
title_zh: 与动态调节的对手进行对抗性微调
abstract: Adversarial training is an effective method to boost model robustness to malicious, adversarial attacks. However, such improvement in model robustness often leads to a significant sacrifice of standard performance on clean images. In many real-world applications such as health diagnosis and autonomous surgical robotics, the standard performance is more valued over model robustness against such extremely malicious attacks. This leads to the question: To what extent we can boost model robustness without sacrificing standard performance? This work tackles this problem and proposes a simple yet effective transfer learning-based adversarial training strategy that disentangles the negative effects of adversarial samples on model's standard performance. In addition, we introduce a training-friendly adversarial attack algorithm, which facilitates the boost of adversarial robustness without introducing significant training complexity. Extensive experimentation indicates that the proposed method outperforms previous adversarial training algorithms towards the target: to improve model robustness while preserving model's standard performance on clean data.
summary: Adversarial training is an effective method to boost model robustness to malicious, adversarial attacks. However, such improvement in model robustness often leads to a significant sacrifice of standard performance on clean images. In many real-world applications such as health diagnosis and autonomous surgical robotics, the standard performance is more valued over model robustness against such extremely malicious attacks. This leads to the question: To what extent we can boost model robustness without sacrificing standard performance? This work tackles this problem and proposes a simple yet effective transfer learning-based adversarial training strategy that disentangles the negative effects of adversarial samples on model's standard performance. In addition, we introduce a training-friendly adversarial attack algorithm, which facilitates the boost of adversarial robustness without introducing significant training complexity. Extensive experimentation indicates that the proposed method outperforms previous adversarial training algorithms towards the target: to improve model robustness while preserving model's standard performance on clean data.
abstract_zh: 对抗性训练是提高模型对恶意对抗性攻击的鲁棒性的有效方法。然而，模型鲁棒性的这种改进通常会导致干净图像的标准性能的显着牺牲。在健康诊断和自主手术机器人等许多现实应用中，标准性能比针对此类极端恶意攻击的模型鲁棒性更有价值。这就引出了一个问题：在不牺牲标准性能的情况下，我们可以在多大程度上提高模型的稳健性？这项工作解决了这个问题，并提出了一种简单而有效的基于迁移学习的对抗训练策略，消除了对抗样本对模型标准性能的负面影响。此外，我们引入了一种训练友好的对抗性攻击算法，该算法有助于提高对抗性鲁棒性，而不会引入显着的训练复杂性。大量的实验表明，所提出的方法优于以前的对抗性训练算法，其目标是：提高模型的鲁棒性，同时保持模型在干净数据上的标准性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于迁移学习的对抗训练策略，旨在提升模型鲁棒性的同时保持对干净数据的标准性能。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练虽能提升模型鲁棒性，但会显著降低标准性能，而实际应用中（如医疗诊断）更重视标准性能。
AI.method: 设计动态调节对抗样本的迁移学习框架，并引入训练友好的对抗攻击算法以降低复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在提升对抗鲁棒性的同时，优于现有算法在干净数据上的性能保持能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了模型鲁棒性与标准性能，适用于需兼顾安全与准确性的实际场景。

search_text: Adversarial Fine-tune with Dynamically Regulated Adversary 与动态调节的对手进行对抗性微调 Adversarial training is an effective method to boost model robustness to malicious, adversarial attacks. However, such improvement in model robustness often leads to a significant sacrifice of standard performance on clean images. In many real-world applications such as health diagnosis and autonomous surgical robotics, the standard performance is more valued over model robustness against such extremely malicious attacks. This leads to the question: To what extent we can boost model robustness without sacrificing standard performance? This work tackles this problem and proposes a simple yet effective transfer learning-based adversarial training strategy that disentangles the negative effects of adversarial samples on model's standard performance. In addition, we introduce a training-friendly adversarial attack algorithm, which facilitates the boost of adversarial robustness without introducing significant training complexity. Extensive experimentation indicates that the proposed method outperforms previous adversarial training algorithms towards the target: to improve model robustness while preserving model's standard performance on clean data. 对抗性训练是提高模型对恶意对抗性攻击的鲁棒性的有效方法。然而，模型鲁棒性的这种改进通常会导致干净图像的标准性能的显着牺牲。在健康诊断和自主手术机器人等许多现实应用中，标准性能比针对此类极端恶意攻击的模型鲁棒性更有价值。这就引出了一个问题：在不牺牲标准性能的情况下，我们可以在多大程度上提高模型的稳健性？这项工作解决了这个问题，并提出了一种简单而有效的基于迁移学习的对抗训练策略，消除了对抗样本对模型标准性能的负面影响。此外，我们引入了一种训练友好的对抗性攻击算法，该算法有助于提高对抗性鲁棒性，而不会引入显着的训练复杂性。大量的实验表明，所提出的方法优于以前的对抗性训练算法，其目标是：提高模型的鲁棒性，同时保持模型在干净数据上的标准性能。 本文提出一种基于迁移学习的对抗训练策略，旨在提升模型鲁棒性的同时保持对干净数据的标准性能。 Pengyue Hou,Ming Zhou,Jie Han,Petr Musilek,Xingyu Li cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Karmesh Yadav,Ram Ramrakhya,Arjun Majumdar,Vincent-Pierre Berges,Sachit Kuhar,Dhruv Batra,Alexei Baevski,Oleksandr Maksymets
title: Offline Visual Representation Learning for Embodied Navigation
title_zh: 实体导航的离线视觉表示学习
abstract: How should we learn visual representations for embodied agents that must see and move? The status quo is tabula rasa in vivo, i.e. learning visual representations from scratch while also learning to move, potentially augmented with auxiliary tasks (e.g. predicting the action taken between two successive observations). In this paper, we show that an alternative 2-stage strategy is far more effective: (1) offline pretraining of visual representations with self-supervised learning (SSL) using large-scale pre-rendered images of indoor environments (Omnidata), and (2) online finetuning of visuomotor representations on specific tasks with image augmentations under long learning schedules. We call this method Offline Visual Representation Learning (OVRL). We conduct large-scale experiments - on 3 different 3D datasets (Gibson, HM3D, MP3D), 2 tasks (ImageNav, ObjectNav), and 2 policy learning algorithms (RL, IL) - and find that the OVRL representations lead to significant across-the-board improvements in state of art, on ImageNav from 29.2% to 54.2% (+25% absolute, 86% relative) and on ObjectNav from 18.1% to 23.2% (+5.1% absolute, 28% relative). Importantly, both results were achieved by the same visual encoder generalizing to datasets that were not seen during pretraining. While the benefits of pretraining sometimes diminish (or entirely disappear) with long finetuning schedules, we find that OVRL's performance gains continue to increase (not decrease) as the agent is trained for 2 billion frames of experience.
summary: How should we learn visual representations for embodied agents that must see and move? The status quo is tabula rasa in vivo, i.e. learning visual representations from scratch while also learning to move, potentially augmented with auxiliary tasks (e.g. predicting the action taken between two successive observations). In this paper, we show that an alternative 2-stage strategy is far more effective: (1) offline pretraining of visual representations with self-supervised learning (SSL) using large-scale pre-rendered images of indoor environments (Omnidata), and (2) online finetuning of visuomotor representations on specific tasks with image augmentations under long learning schedules. We call this method Offline Visual Representation Learning (OVRL). We conduct large-scale experiments - on 3 different 3D datasets (Gibson, HM3D, MP3D), 2 tasks (ImageNav, ObjectNav), and 2 policy learning algorithms (RL, IL) - and find that the OVRL representations lead to significant across-the-board improvements in state of art, on ImageNav from 29.2% to 54.2% (+25% absolute, 86% relative) and on ObjectNav from 18.1% to 23.2% (+5.1% absolute, 28% relative). Importantly, both results were achieved by the same visual encoder generalizing to datasets that were not seen during pretraining. While the benefits of pretraining sometimes diminish (or entirely disappear) with long finetuning schedules, we find that OVRL's performance gains continue to increase (not decrease) as the agent is trained for 2 billion frames of experience.
abstract_zh: 我们应该如何学习必须看到和移动的实体代理的视觉表示？现状是体内的白板，即从头开始学习视觉表征，同时也学习移动，可能会通过辅助任务进行增强（例如预测两次连续观察之间采取的动作）。在本文中，我们证明了另一种两阶段策略要有效得多：（1）使用室内环境的大规模预渲染图像（Omnidata）通过自监督学习（SSL）对视觉表示进行离线预训练，以及（2）在长期学习计划下通过图像增强对特定任务的视觉运动表示进行在线微调。我们将此方法称为离线视觉表示学习（ORL）。我们在 3 个不同的 3D 数据集（Gibson、HM3D、MP3D）、2 个任务（ImageNav、ObjectNav）和 2 个策略学习算法（RL、IL）上进行了大规模实验，发现 OVRL 表示导致了现有技术水平的显着全面改进，在 ImageNav 上从 29.2% 提高到 54.2%（+25% 绝对值，86% 相对值），在 ObjectNav 上从18.1% 至 23.2%（绝对值+5.1%，相对值+28%）。重要的是，这两个结果都是通过相同的视觉编码器泛化到预训练期间未看到的数据集来实现的。虽然预训练的好处有时会随着长期的微调计划而减弱（或完全消失），但我们发现，随着代理接受 20 亿帧经验的训练，OVRL 的性能增益会继续增加（而不是减少）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种离线视觉表征学习方法（OVRL），用于具身导航任务，通过分阶段预训练和微调提升视觉表征能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在具身导航中从零开始学习视觉表征和运动控制，效率低下。本文旨在探索更有效的分阶段学习策略以提升性能。
AI.method: 采用两阶段策略：1) 使用大规模预渲染室内环境图像（Omnidata）进行自监督预训练；2) 在具体任务上进行在线微调，结合图像增强和长期训练。
AI.result: 在三个3D数据集和两个任务中，OVRL使ImageNav成功率从29.2%提升至54.2%，ObjectNav从18.1%提升至23.2%，且模型能泛化到预训练未见的数据集。
AI.conclusion: OVRL通过离线预训练和长期微调显著提升导航性能，且性能随训练量增加持续提升，证明了分阶段学习的有效性。

authors_text: Yizhi Li,Wei Fan,Chao Liu,Chenghua Lin,Jiang Qian
title: TranSHER: Translating Knowledge Graph Embedding with Hyper-Ellipsoidal Restriction
title_zh: TranSHER：利用超椭圆体限制翻译知识图嵌入
comment: EMNLP 2022. v2 updated for EMNLP camera-ready
comments: EMNLP 2022. v2 updated for EMNLP camera-ready
abstract: Knowledge graph embedding methods are important for the knowledge graph completion (or link prediction) task. One existing efficient method, PairRE, leverages two separate vectors to model complex relations (i.e., 1-to-N, N-to-1, and N-to-N) in knowledge graphs. However, such a method strictly restricts entities on the hyper-ellipsoid surfaces which limits the optimization of entity distribution, leading to suboptimal performance of knowledge graph completion. To address this issue, we propose a novel score function TranSHER, which leverages relation-specific translations between head and tail entities to relax the constraint of hyper-ellipsoid restrictions. By introducing an intuitive and simple relation-specific translation, TranSHER can provide more direct guidance on optimization and capture more semantic characteristics of entities with complex relations. Experimental results show that TranSHER achieves significant performance improvements on link prediction and generalizes well to datasets in different domains and scales. Our codes are public available at https://github.com/yizhilll/TranSHER.
summary: Knowledge graph embedding methods are important for the knowledge graph completion (or link prediction) task. One existing efficient method, PairRE, leverages two separate vectors to model complex relations (i.e., 1-to-N, N-to-1, and N-to-N) in knowledge graphs. However, such a method strictly restricts entities on the hyper-ellipsoid surfaces which limits the optimization of entity distribution, leading to suboptimal performance of knowledge graph completion. To address this issue, we propose a novel score function TranSHER, which leverages relation-specific translations between head and tail entities to relax the constraint of hyper-ellipsoid restrictions. By introducing an intuitive and simple relation-specific translation, TranSHER can provide more direct guidance on optimization and capture more semantic characteristics of entities with complex relations. Experimental results show that TranSHER achieves significant performance improvements on link prediction and generalizes well to datasets in different domains and scales. Our codes are public available at https://github.com/yizhilll/TranSHER.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入方法对于知识图补全（或链接预测）任务很重要。现有的一种有效方法 PairRE 利用两个独立的向量来建模知识图中的复杂关系（即 1 对 N、N 对 1 和 N 对 N）。然而，这种方法严格限制超椭球面上的实体，限制了实体分布的优化，导致知识图补全的性能不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的评分函数 TranSHER，它利用头实体和尾实体之间的特定于关系的翻译来放松超椭球体的限制。通过引入直观、简单的关系特定翻译，TranSHER 可以提供更直接的优化指导，并捕获具有复杂关系的实体的更多语义特征。实验结果表明，TranSHER 在链接预测方面取得了显着的性能提升，并且能够很好地推广到不同领域和规模的数据集。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/yizhilll/TranSHER 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TranSHER方法，通过引入关系特定的平移操作优化知识图谱嵌入，解决现有方法在超椭球约束下的性能局限问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如PairRE虽能建模复杂关系，但严格限制实体分布在超椭球表面，导致实体分布优化受限，影响知识图谱补全效果。
AI.method: 设计关系特定的头尾实体平移机制，放松超椭球约束，通过直观的翻译操作提供更直接的优化指导并捕捉复杂关系的语义特征。
AI.result: 在链接预测任务中取得显著性能提升，且在不同领域和规模的数据集上具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TranSHER通过创新的平移机制有效缓解超椭球约束问题，为知识图谱嵌入提供了更优的解决方案。

conclusion: TranSHER通过创新的平移机制有效缓解超椭球约束问题，为知识图谱嵌入提供了更优的解决方案。
search_text: TranSHER: Translating Knowledge Graph Embedding with Hyper-Ellipsoidal Restriction TranSHER：利用超椭圆体限制翻译知识图嵌入 Knowledge graph embedding methods are important for the knowledge graph completion (or link prediction) task. One existing efficient method, PairRE, leverages two separate vectors to model complex relations (i.e., 1-to-N, N-to-1, and N-to-N) in knowledge graphs. However, such a method strictly restricts entities on the hyper-ellipsoid surfaces which limits the optimization of entity distribution, leading to suboptimal performance of knowledge graph completion. To address this issue, we propose a novel score function TranSHER, which leverages relation-specific translations between head and tail entities to relax the constraint of hyper-ellipsoid restrictions. By introducing an intuitive and simple relation-specific translation, TranSHER can provide more direct guidance on optimization and capture more semantic characteristics of entities with complex relations. Experimental results show that TranSHER achieves significant performance improvements on link prediction and generalizes well to datasets in different domains and scales. Our codes are public available at https://github.com/yizhilll/TranSHER. 知识图嵌入方法对于知识图补全（或链接预测）任务很重要。现有的一种有效方法 PairRE 利用两个独立的向量来建模知识图中的复杂关系（即 1 对 N、N 对 1 和 N 对 N）。然而，这种方法严格限制超椭球面上的实体，限制了实体分布的优化，导致知识图补全的性能不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的评分函数 TranSHER，它利用头实体和尾实体之间的特定于关系的翻译来放松超椭球体的限制。通过引入直观、简单的关系特定翻译，TranSHER 可以提供更直接的优化指导，并捕获具有复杂关系的实体的更多语义特征。实验结果表明，TranSHER 在链接预测方面取得了显着的性能提升，并且能够很好地推广到不同领域和规模的数据集。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/yizhilll/TranSHER 上公开获取。 本文提出TranSHER方法，通过引入关系特定的平移操作优化知识图谱嵌入，解决现有方法在超椭球约束下的性能局限问题。 Yizhi Li,Wei Fan,Chao Liu,Chenghua Lin,Jiang Qian cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Understanding User Perceptions, Collaborative Experience and User Engagement in Different Human-AI Interaction Designs for Co-Creative Systems
title_zh: 了解共同创意系统的不同人机交互设计中的用户感知、协作体验和用户参与度
comment: This paper appears in the ACM Creativity and Cognition 2022. Permission to make digital or hard copies of all or part of this work for personal or classroom use is granted. To copy otherwise, or republish, to post on servers or to redistribute to lists, requires prior specific permission from permissions@acm.org
comments: This paper appears in the ACM Creativity and Cognition 2022. Permission to make digital or hard copies of all or part of this work for personal or classroom use is granted. To copy otherwise, or republish, to post on servers or to redistribute to lists, requires prior specific permission from permissions@acm.org
abstract: Human-AI co-creativity involves humans and AI collaborating on a shared creative product as partners. In a creative collaboration, communication is an essential component among collaborators. In many existing co-creative systems users can communicate with the AI, usually using buttons or sliders. Typically, the AI in co-creative systems cannot communicate back to humans, limiting their potential to be perceived as partners rather than just a tool. This paper presents a study with 38 participants to explore the impact of two interaction designs, with and without AI-to-human communication, on user engagement, collaborative experience and user perception of a co-creative AI. The study involves user interaction with two prototypes of a co-creative system that contributes sketches as design inspirations during a design task. The results show improved collaborative experience and user engagement with the system incorporating AI-to-human communication. Users perceive co-creative AI as more reliable, personal, and intelligent when the AI communicates to users. The findings can be used to design effective co-creative systems, and the insights can be transferred to other fields involving human-AI interaction and collaboration.
summary: Human-AI co-creativity involves humans and AI collaborating on a shared creative product as partners. In a creative collaboration, communication is an essential component among collaborators. In many existing co-creative systems users can communicate with the AI, usually using buttons or sliders. Typically, the AI in co-creative systems cannot communicate back to humans, limiting their potential to be perceived as partners rather than just a tool. This paper presents a study with 38 participants to explore the impact of two interaction designs, with and without AI-to-human communication, on user engagement, collaborative experience and user perception of a co-creative AI. The study involves user interaction with two prototypes of a co-creative system that contributes sketches as design inspirations during a design task. The results show improved collaborative experience and user engagement with the system incorporating AI-to-human communication. Users perceive co-creative AI as more reliable, personal, and intelligent when the AI communicates to users. The findings can be used to design effective co-creative systems, and the insights can be transferred to other fields involving human-AI interaction and collaboration.
abstract_zh: 人类与人工智能的共同创造力涉及人类和人工智能作为合作伙伴合作开发共享的创意产品。在创造性协作中，沟通是协作者之间的重要组成部分。在许多现有的共同创意系统中，用户通常可以使用按钮或滑块与人工智能进行通信。通常，共同创造系统中的人工智能无法与人类进行交流，这限制了他们被视为合作伙伴而不仅仅是工具的潜力。本文提出了一项有 38 名参与者参与的研究，探讨两种交互设计（有或没有人工智能与人的交流）对共同创意人工智能的用户参与度、协作体验和用户感知的影响。该研究涉及用户与共同创意系统的两个原型的交互，该系统在设计任务期间提供草图作为设计灵感。结果表明，采用人工智能与人类通信的系统改善了协作体验和用户参与度。当人工智能与用户沟通时，用户认为共创人工智能更加可靠、个性化和智能。研究结果可用于设计有效的共同创造系统，并且这些见解可以转移到涉及人机交互和协作的其他领域。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了不同的人机交互设计对用户感知、协作体验和参与度的影响，特别是在共创作系统中AI是否能与用户沟通。
AI.motivation: 现有共创作系统中AI无法向用户反馈，导致用户将其视为工具而非合作伙伴，需探索改进交互设计以增强协作体验。
AI.method: 通过38名参与者的实验，比较两种交互原型（含AI沟通与不含AI沟通），分析用户在设计任务中的协作体验、参与度及对AI的感知差异。
AI.result: 含AI沟通的系统显著提升用户协作体验和参与度，用户认为AI更可靠、个性化且智能。
AI.conclusion: AI与用户沟通的交互设计能有效提升共创作系统的协作效果，相关发现可指导其他领域的人机协作系统设计。

title: Use All The Labels: A Hierarchical Multi-Label Contrastive Learning Framework
title_zh: 使用所有标签：分层多标签对比学习框架
abstract: Current contrastive learning frameworks focus on leveraging a single supervisory signal to learn representations, which limits the efficacy on unseen data and downstream tasks. In this paper, we present a hierarchical multi-label representation learning framework that can leverage all available labels and preserve the hierarchical relationship between classes. We introduce novel hierarchy preserving losses, which jointly apply a hierarchical penalty to the contrastive loss, and enforce the hierarchy constraint. The loss function is data driven and automatically adapts to arbitrary multi-label structures. Experiments on several datasets show that our relationship-preserving embedding performs well on a variety of tasks and outperform the baseline supervised and self-supervised approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/salesforce/hierarchicalContrastiveLearning.
summary: Current contrastive learning frameworks focus on leveraging a single supervisory signal to learn representations, which limits the efficacy on unseen data and downstream tasks. In this paper, we present a hierarchical multi-label representation learning framework that can leverage all available labels and preserve the hierarchical relationship between classes. We introduce novel hierarchy preserving losses, which jointly apply a hierarchical penalty to the contrastive loss, and enforce the hierarchy constraint. The loss function is data driven and automatically adapts to arbitrary multi-label structures. Experiments on several datasets show that our relationship-preserving embedding performs well on a variety of tasks and outperform the baseline supervised and self-supervised approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/salesforce/hierarchicalContrastiveLearning.
abstract_zh: 当前的对比学习框架侧重于利用单个监督信号来学习表示，这限制了看不见的数据和下游任务的功效。在本文中，我们提出了一种分层多标签表示学习框架，该框架可以利用所有可用标签并保留类之间的分层关系。我们引入了新颖的层次保留损失，它联合对对比损失应用层次惩罚，并强制执行层次约束。损失函数是数据驱动的，并自动适应任意多标签结构。对多个数据集的实验表明，我们的关系保留嵌入在各种任务上表现良好，并且优于基线监督和自监督方法。代码可在 https://github.com/salesforce/hierarchicalContrastiveLearning 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层多标签对比学习框架，通过利用所有可用标签并保持类间层次关系来提升表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法仅依赖单一监督信号，难以有效利用多标签数据中的层次结构信息，限制了模型在未见数据和下游任务中的表现。
AI.method: 设计层次保持损失函数，将分层约束与对比损失结合，通过数据驱动方式自动适应任意多标签结构。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，该方法在各类任务中均优于基线监督学习和自监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效建模多标签数据的层次关系，为复杂场景下的表示学习提供了新思路。

title: Improving Multimodal Speech Recognition by Data Augmentation and Speech Representations
title_zh: 通过数据增强和语音表示改进多模态语音识别
comment: Accepted at the Multimodal Learning and Applications Workshop (MULA) from CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted at the Multimodal Learning and Applications Workshop (MULA) from CVPR 2022
abstract: Multimodal speech recognition aims to improve the performance of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems by leveraging additional visual information that is usually associated to the audio input. While previous approaches make crucial use of strong visual representations, e.g. by finetuning pretrained image recognition networks, significantly less attention has been paid to its counterpart: the speech component. In this work, we investigate ways of improving the base speech recognition system by following similar techniques to the ones used for the visual encoder, namely, transferring representations and data augmentation. First, we show that starting from a pretrained ASR significantly improves the state-of-the-art performance; remarkably, even when building upon a strong unimodal system, we still find gains by including the visual modality. Second, we employ speech data augmentation techniques to encourage the multimodal system to attend to the visual stimuli. This technique replaces previously used word masking and comes with the benefits of being conceptually simpler and yielding consistent improvements in the multimodal setting. We provide empirical results on three multimodal datasets, including the newly introduced Localized Narratives.
summary: Multimodal speech recognition aims to improve the performance of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems by leveraging additional visual information that is usually associated to the audio input. While previous approaches make crucial use of strong visual representations, e.g. by finetuning pretrained image recognition networks, significantly less attention has been paid to its counterpart: the speech component. In this work, we investigate ways of improving the base speech recognition system by following similar techniques to the ones used for the visual encoder, namely, transferring representations and data augmentation. First, we show that starting from a pretrained ASR significantly improves the state-of-the-art performance; remarkably, even when building upon a strong unimodal system, we still find gains by including the visual modality. Second, we employ speech data augmentation techniques to encourage the multimodal system to attend to the visual stimuli. This technique replaces previously used word masking and comes with the benefits of being conceptually simpler and yielding consistent improvements in the multimodal setting. We provide empirical results on three multimodal datasets, including the newly introduced Localized Narratives.
abstract_zh: 多模态语音识别旨在通过利用通常与音频输入相关的附加视觉信息来提高自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的性能。虽然以前的方法非常重要地利用了强烈的视觉表示，例如通过微调预训练的图像识别网络，对其对应部分：语音部分的关注明显减少。在这项工作中，我们研究了通过遵循与视觉编码器所使用的技术类似的技术来改进基本语音识别系统的方法，即传输表示和数据增强。首先，我们证明从预训练的 ASR 开始可以显着提高最先进的性能；值得注意的是，即使建立在强大的单模态系统上，我们仍然可以通过包含视觉模态来获得收益。其次，我们采用语音数据增强技术来鼓励多模态系统关注视觉刺激。该技术取代了以前使用的字屏蔽，并具有概念上更简单并在多模式设置中产生一致改进的优点。我们提供了三个多模式数据集的实证结果，包括新引入的本地化叙事。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过数据增强和语音表征改进多模态语音识别系统的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有方法重视视觉表征的利用，但对语音组件的改进关注不足，需探索类似视觉编码器的迁移学习和数据增强技术以提升语音识别性能。
AI.method: 采用预训练ASR模型作为基础，结合语音数据增强技术替代传统词掩码方法，并在多模态数据集（包括新引入的Localized Narratives）上验证效果。
AI.result: 预训练ASR模型显著提升多模态性能，数据增强方法在概念简化的同时实现稳定改进，且在三个数据集上均验证有效。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化语音表征与数据增强策略，可有效提升多模态语音识别系统，且新方法在复杂度与效果间取得平衡。

search_text: Improving Multimodal Speech Recognition by Data Augmentation and Speech Representations 通过数据增强和语音表示改进多模态语音识别 Multimodal speech recognition aims to improve the performance of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems by leveraging additional visual information that is usually associated to the audio input. While previous approaches make crucial use of strong visual representations, e.g. by finetuning pretrained image recognition networks, significantly less attention has been paid to its counterpart: the speech component. In this work, we investigate ways of improving the base speech recognition system by following similar techniques to the ones used for the visual encoder, namely, transferring representations and data augmentation. First, we show that starting from a pretrained ASR significantly improves the state-of-the-art performance; remarkably, even when building upon a strong unimodal system, we still find gains by including the visual modality. Second, we employ speech data augmentation techniques to encourage the multimodal system to attend to the visual stimuli. This technique replaces previously used word masking and comes with the benefits of being conceptually simpler and yielding consistent improvements in the multimodal setting. We provide empirical results on three multimodal datasets, including the newly introduced Localized Narratives. 多模态语音识别旨在通过利用通常与音频输入相关的附加视觉信息来提高自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的性能。虽然以前的方法非常重要地利用了强烈的视觉表示，例如通过微调预训练的图像识别网络，对其对应部分：语音部分的关注明显减少。在这项工作中，我们研究了通过遵循与视觉编码器所使用的技术类似的技术来改进基本语音识别系统的方法，即传输表示和数据增强。首先，我们证明从预训练的 ASR 开始可以显着提高最先进的性能；值得注意的是，即使建立在强大的单模态系统上，我们仍然可以通过包含视觉模态来获得收益。其次，我们采用语音数据增强技术来鼓励多模态系统关注视觉刺激。该技术取代了以前使用的字屏蔽，并具有概念上更简单并在多模式设置中产生一致改进的优点。我们提供了三个多模式数据集的实证结果，包括新引入的本地化叙事。 本文研究通过数据增强和语音表征改进多模态语音识别系统的方法。 Dan Oneata,Horia Cucu cs.SD,eess.AS,eess.IV

authors_text: Marissa Radensky,Dustin Burson,Rajya Bhaiya,Daniel S. Weld
title: Exploring How Anomalous Model Input and Output Alerts Affect Decision-Making in Healthcare
title_zh: 探索异常模型输入和输出警报如何影响医疗保健决策
abstract: An important goal in the field of human-AI interaction is to help users more appropriately trust AI systems' decisions. A situation in which the user may particularly benefit from more appropriate trust is when the AI receives anomalous input or provides anomalous output. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work towards understanding how anomaly alerts may contribute to appropriate trust of AI. In a formative mixed-methods study with 4 radiologists and 4 other physicians, we explore how AI alerts for anomalous input, very high and low confidence, and anomalous saliency-map explanations affect users' experience with mockups of an AI clinical decision support system (CDSS) for evaluating chest x-rays for pneumonia. We find evidence suggesting that the four anomaly alerts are desired by non-radiologists, and the high-confidence alerts are desired by both radiologists and non-radiologists. In a follow-up user study, we investigate how high- and low-confidence alerts affect the accuracy and thus appropriate trust of 33 radiologists working with AI CDSS mockups. We observe that these alerts do not improve users' accuracy or experience and discuss potential reasons why.
summary: An important goal in the field of human-AI interaction is to help users more appropriately trust AI systems' decisions. A situation in which the user may particularly benefit from more appropriate trust is when the AI receives anomalous input or provides anomalous output. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work towards understanding how anomaly alerts may contribute to appropriate trust of AI. In a formative mixed-methods study with 4 radiologists and 4 other physicians, we explore how AI alerts for anomalous input, very high and low confidence, and anomalous saliency-map explanations affect users' experience with mockups of an AI clinical decision support system (CDSS) for evaluating chest x-rays for pneumonia. We find evidence suggesting that the four anomaly alerts are desired by non-radiologists, and the high-confidence alerts are desired by both radiologists and non-radiologists. In a follow-up user study, we investigate how high- and low-confidence alerts affect the accuracy and thus appropriate trust of 33 radiologists working with AI CDSS mockups. We observe that these alerts do not improve users' accuracy or experience and discuss potential reasons why.
abstract_zh: 人机交互领域的一个重要目标是帮助用户更恰当地信任人工智能系统的决策。用户可能特别受益于更适当的信任的情况是当人工智能接收到异常输入或提供异常输出时。据我们所知，这是第一项旨在了解异常警报如何有助于人工智能适当信任的工作。在与 4 名放射科医生和其他 4 名医生进行的一项形成性混合方法研究中，我们探讨了人工智能针对异常输入、极高和极低置信度以及异常显着图解释的警报如何影响用户使用用于评估肺炎胸部 X 光检查的人工智能临床决策支持系统 (CDSS) 模型的体验。我们发现证据表明，非放射科医生需要四种异常警报，而放射科医生和非放射科医生都需要高置信度警报。在后续的用户研究中，我们调查了高置信度和低置信度警报如何影响准确性，从而影响使用 AI CDSS 模型的 33 名放射科医生的适当信任。我们观察到这些警报并没有提高用户的准确性或体验，并讨论了潜在的原因。

AI.tldr: 探讨异常模型输入和输出警报对医疗决策中信任和准确性的影响
AI.motivation: 帮助用户在AI出现异常输入或输出时建立适当信任，以提高医疗决策的准确性
AI.method: 通过混合方法研究，包括定性访谈和定量实验，分析不同异常警报对医生使用AI临床决策支持系统的影响
AI.result: 发现非放射科医生更希望使用异常警报，但高/低置信度警报未提升医生准确性或体验
AI.conclusion: 异常警报设计需优化，且医生经验可能影响警报效果，需进一步研究

authors_text: Anil Yaman,Tim van der Lee,Giovanni Iacca
title: Online Distributed Evolutionary Optimization of Time Division Multiple Access Protocols
title_zh: 时分多址协议的在线分布式进化优化
abstract: With the advent of cheap, miniaturized electronics, ubiquitous networking has reached an unprecedented level of complexity, scale and heterogeneity, becoming the core of several modern applications such as smart industry, smart buildings and smart cities. A crucial element for network performance is the protocol stack, namely the sets of rules and data formats that determine how the nodes in the network exchange information. A great effort has been put to devise formal techniques to synthesize (offline) network protocols, starting from system specifications and strict assumptions on the network environment. However, offline design can be hard to apply in the most modern network applications, either due to numerical complexity, or to the fact that the environment might be unknown and the specifications might not available. In these cases, online protocol design and adaptation has the potential to offer a much more scalable and robust solution. Nevertheless, so far only a few attempts have been done towards online automatic protocol design. Here, we envision a protocol as an emergent property of a network, obtained by an environment-driven Distributed Hill Climbing algorithm that uses node-local reinforcement signals to evolve, at runtime and without any central coordination, a network protocol from scratch. We test this approach with a 3-state Time Division Multiple Access (TDMA) Medium Access Control (MAC) protocol and we observe its emergence in networks of various scales and with various settings. We also show how Distributed Hill Climbing can reach different trade-offs in terms of energy consumption and protocol performance.
summary: With the advent of cheap, miniaturized electronics, ubiquitous networking has reached an unprecedented level of complexity, scale and heterogeneity, becoming the core of several modern applications such as smart industry, smart buildings and smart cities. A crucial element for network performance is the protocol stack, namely the sets of rules and data formats that determine how the nodes in the network exchange information. A great effort has been put to devise formal techniques to synthesize (offline) network protocols, starting from system specifications and strict assumptions on the network environment. However, offline design can be hard to apply in the most modern network applications, either due to numerical complexity, or to the fact that the environment might be unknown and the specifications might not available. In these cases, online protocol design and adaptation has the potential to offer a much more scalable and robust solution. Nevertheless, so far only a few attempts have been done towards online automatic protocol design. Here, we envision a protocol as an emergent property of a network, obtained by an environment-driven Distributed Hill Climbing algorithm that uses node-local reinforcement signals to evolve, at runtime and without any central coordination, a network protocol from scratch. We test this approach with a 3-state Time Division Multiple Access (TDMA) Medium Access Control (MAC) protocol and we observe its emergence in networks of various scales and with various settings. We also show how Distributed Hill Climbing can reach different trade-offs in terms of energy consumption and protocol performance.
abstract_zh: 随着廉价、小型化电子产品的出现，泛在网络的复杂性、规模和异构性达到了前所未有的水平，成为智能工业、智能建筑和智能城市等多种现代应用的核心。网络性能的一个关键要素是协议栈，即确定网络中的节点如何交换信息的规则集和数据格式。从系统规范和对网络环境的严格假设开始，人们付出了巨大的努力来设计正式的技术来综合（离线）网络协议。然而，离线设计可能很难应用于最现代的网络应用程序，这要么是由于数值复杂性，要​​么是由于环境可能未知且规范可能不可用。在这些情况下，在线协议设计和调整有可能提供更具可扩展性和鲁棒性的解决方案。然而，到目前为止，在线自动协议设计方面只做了一些尝试。在这里，我们将协议设想为网络的新兴属性，通过环境驱动的分布式爬山算法获得，该算法使用节点本地强化信号在运行时且没有任何中央协调的情况下从头开始演化网络协议。我们使用三态时分多址 (TDMA) 介质访问控制 (MAC) 协议测试这种方法，并观察到它在各种规模和各种设置的网络中的出现。我们还展示了分布式爬山如何在能耗和协议性能方面实现不同的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线分布式进化优化方法，通过环境驱动的分布式爬山算法从零开始演化时分多址（TDMA）介质访问控制（MAC）协议。
AI.motivation: 传统离线协议设计难以应对现代网络应用的复杂性、动态性和环境不确定性，亟需一种无需先验知识且具备自适应能力的在线协议设计方法。
AI.method: 采用分布式爬山算法，利用节点局部强化信号，在无需中心协调的情况下实时演化协议，通过不同网络规模和场景的实验验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 成功在多种规模和设置的网络中生成TDMA协议，展示了算法在能耗与协议性能之间的权衡能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂动态网络提供了可扩展的自适应协议设计框架，证明了在线分布式进化优化在协议合成中的可行性。

search_text: Online Distributed Evolutionary Optimization of Time Division Multiple Access Protocols 时分多址协议的在线分布式进化优化 With the advent of cheap, miniaturized electronics, ubiquitous networking has reached an unprecedented level of complexity, scale and heterogeneity, becoming the core of several modern applications such as smart industry, smart buildings and smart cities. A crucial element for network performance is the protocol stack, namely the sets of rules and data formats that determine how the nodes in the network exchange information. A great effort has been put to devise formal techniques to synthesize (offline) network protocols, starting from system specifications and strict assumptions on the network environment. However, offline design can be hard to apply in the most modern network applications, either due to numerical complexity, or to the fact that the environment might be unknown and the specifications might not available. In these cases, online protocol design and adaptation has the potential to offer a much more scalable and robust solution. Nevertheless, so far only a few attempts have been done towards online automatic protocol design. Here, we envision a protocol as an emergent property of a network, obtained by an environment-driven Distributed Hill Climbing algorithm that uses node-local reinforcement signals to evolve, at runtime and without any central coordination, a network protocol from scratch. We test this approach with a 3-state Time Division Multiple Access (TDMA) Medium Access Control (MAC) protocol and we observe its emergence in networks of various scales and with various settings. We also show how Distributed Hill Climbing can reach different trade-offs in terms of energy consumption and protocol performance. 随着廉价、小型化电子产品的出现，泛在网络的复杂性、规模和异构性达到了前所未有的水平，成为智能工业、智能建筑和智能城市等多种现代应用的核心。网络性能的一个关键要素是协议栈，即确定网络中的节点如何交换信息的规则集和数据格式。从系统规范和对网络环境的严格假设开始，人们付出了巨大的努力来设计正式的技术来综合（离线）网络协议。然而，离线设计可能很难应用于最现代的网络应用程序，这要么是由于数值复杂性，要​​么是由于环境可能未知且规范可能不可用。在这些情况下，在线协议设计和调整有可能提供更具可扩展性和鲁棒性的解决方案。然而，到目前为止，在线自动协议设计方面只做了一些尝试。在这里，我们将协议设想为网络的新兴属性，通过环境驱动的分布式爬山算法获得，该算法使用节点本地强化信号在运行时且没有任何中央协调的情况下从头开始演化网络协议。我们使用三态时分多址 (TDMA) 介质访问控制 (MAC) 协议测试这种方法，并观察到它在各种规模和各种设置的网络中的出现。我们还展示了分布式爬山如何在能耗和协议性能方面实现不同的权衡。 本文提出一种在线分布式进化优化方法，通过环境驱动的分布式爬山算法从零开始演化时分多址（TDMA）介质访问控制（MAC）协议。 Anil Yaman,Tim van der Lee,Giovanni Iacca cs.NE

authors_text: Houliang Zhou,Lifang He,Yu Zhang,Li Shen,Brian Chen
title: Interpretable Graph Convolutional Network of Multi-Modality Brain Imaging for Alzheimer's Disease Diagnosis
title_zh: 用于阿尔茨海默病诊断的多模态脑成像的可解释图卷积网络
comment: This paper has been published to IEEE 19th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI), 2022
comments: This paper has been published to IEEE 19th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI), 2022
abstract: Identification of brain regions related to the specific neurological disorders are of great importance for biomarker and diagnostic studies. In this paper, we propose an interpretable Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) framework for the identification and classification of Alzheimer's disease (AD) using multi-modality brain imaging data. Specifically, we extended the Gradient Class Activation Mapping (Grad-CAM) technique to quantify the most discriminative features identified by GCN from brain connectivity patterns. We then utilized them to find signature regions of interest (ROIs) by detecting the difference of features between regions in healthy control (HC), mild cognitive impairment (MCI), and AD groups. We conducted the experiments on the ADNI database with imaging data from three modalities, including VBM-MRI, FDG-PET, and AV45-PET, and showed that the ROI features learned by our method were effective for enhancing the performances of both clinical score prediction and disease status identification. It also successfully identified biomarkers associated with AD and MCI.
summary: Identification of brain regions related to the specific neurological disorders are of great importance for biomarker and diagnostic studies. In this paper, we propose an interpretable Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) framework for the identification and classification of Alzheimer's disease (AD) using multi-modality brain imaging data. Specifically, we extended the Gradient Class Activation Mapping (Grad-CAM) technique to quantify the most discriminative features identified by GCN from brain connectivity patterns. We then utilized them to find signature regions of interest (ROIs) by detecting the difference of features between regions in healthy control (HC), mild cognitive impairment (MCI), and AD groups. We conducted the experiments on the ADNI database with imaging data from three modalities, including VBM-MRI, FDG-PET, and AV45-PET, and showed that the ROI features learned by our method were effective for enhancing the performances of both clinical score prediction and disease status identification. It also successfully identified biomarkers associated with AD and MCI.
abstract_zh: 识别与特定神经系统疾病相关的大脑区域对于生物标志物和诊断研究非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种可解释的图卷积网络（GCN）框架，用于使用多模态脑成像数据来识别和分类阿尔茨海默病（AD）。具体来说，我们扩展了梯度类激活映射（Grad-CAM）技术来量化 GCN 从大脑连接模式中识别出的最具辨别力的特征。然后，我们利用它们通过检测健康对照 (HC)、轻度认知障碍 (MCI) 和 AD 组区域之间的特征差异来找到感兴趣的特征区域 (ROI)。我们使用 VBM-MRI、FDG-PET 和 AV45-PET 等三种模态的影像数据在 ADNI 数据库上进行了实验，结果表明，通过我们的方法学习的 ROI 特征可有效提高临床评分预测和疾病状态识别的性能。它还成功鉴定了与 AD 和 MCI 相关的生物标志物。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的图卷积网络框架，利用多模态脑影像数据识别阿尔茨海默病相关脑区并进行疾病诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在阿尔茨海默病诊断中缺乏对关键脑区的可解释性分析，难以有效识别疾病相关生物标志物。
AI.method: 扩展Grad-CAM技术量化图卷积网络提取的判别特征，通过比较健康组、轻度认知障碍组与阿尔茨海默病组的特征差异，定位显著感兴趣区域（ROI）。
AI.result: 在ADNI数据库的三种影像模态数据上验证，方法有效提升临床评分预测和疾病分类性能，并成功识别AD及MCI相关生物标志物。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多模态数据与可解释性分析相结合，为阿尔茨海默病的早期诊断和生物标志物发现提供了新思路。

title: An Adversarial Attack Analysis on Malicious Advertisement URL Detection Framework
title_zh: 恶意广告URL检测框架的对抗性攻击分析
abstract: Malicious advertisement URLs pose a security risk since they are the source of cyber-attacks, and the need to address this issue is growing in both industry and academia. Generally, the attacker delivers an attack vector to the user by means of an email, an advertisement link or any other means of communication and directs them to a malicious website to steal sensitive information and to defraud them. Existing malicious URL detection techniques are limited and to handle unseen features as well as generalize to test data. In this study, we extract a novel set of lexical and web-scrapped features and employ machine learning technique to set up system for fraudulent advertisement URLs detection. The combination set of six different kinds of features precisely overcome the obfuscation in fraudulent URL classification. Based on different statistical properties, we use twelve different formatted datasets for detection, prediction and classification task. We extend our prediction analysis for mismatched and unlabelled datasets. For this framework, we analyze the performance of four machine learning techniques: Random Forest, Gradient Boost, XGBoost and AdaBoost in the detection part. With our proposed method, we can achieve a false negative rate as low as 0.0037 while maintaining high accuracy of 99.63%. Moreover, we devise a novel unsupervised technique for data clustering using K- Means algorithm for the visual analysis. This paper analyses the vulnerability of decision tree-based models using the limited knowledge attack scenario. We considered the exploratory attack and implemented Zeroth Order Optimization adversarial attack on the detection models.
summary: Malicious advertisement URLs pose a security risk since they are the source of cyber-attacks, and the need to address this issue is growing in both industry and academia. Generally, the attacker delivers an attack vector to the user by means of an email, an advertisement link or any other means of communication and directs them to a malicious website to steal sensitive information and to defraud them. Existing malicious URL detection techniques are limited and to handle unseen features as well as generalize to test data. In this study, we extract a novel set of lexical and web-scrapped features and employ machine learning technique to set up system for fraudulent advertisement URLs detection. The combination set of six different kinds of features precisely overcome the obfuscation in fraudulent URL classification. Based on different statistical properties, we use twelve different formatted datasets for detection, prediction and classification task. We extend our prediction analysis for mismatched and unlabelled datasets. For this framework, we analyze the performance of four machine learning techniques: Random Forest, Gradient Boost, XGBoost and AdaBoost in the detection part. With our proposed method, we can achieve a false negative rate as low as 0.0037 while maintaining high accuracy of 99.63%. Moreover, we devise a novel unsupervised technique for data clustering using K- Means algorithm for the visual analysis. This paper analyses the vulnerability of decision tree-based models using the limited knowledge attack scenario. We considered the exploratory attack and implemented Zeroth Order Optimization adversarial attack on the detection models.
abstract_zh: 恶意广告 URL 会带来安全风险，因为它们是网络攻击的来源，而且业界和学术界对解决此问题的需求都在不断增长。通常，攻击者通过电子邮件、广告链接或任何其他通信方式向用户传递攻击向量，并将他们引导至恶意网站以窃取敏感信息并欺骗他们。现有的恶意 URL 检测技术是有限的，无法处理看不见的特征以及泛化到测试数据。在这项研究中，我们提取了一组新颖的词汇和网络抓取特征，并采用机器学习技术来建立欺诈性广告 URL 检测系统。六种不同特征的组合精确地克服了欺诈性URL分类中的混淆。基于不同的统计特性，我们使用十二种不同格式的数据集来进行检测、预测和分类任务。我们扩展了对不匹配和未标记数据集的预测分析。对于这个框架，我们分析了四种机器学习技术：随机森林、梯度提升、XGBoost 和 AdaBoost 在检测部分的性能。通过我们提出的方法，我们可以实现低至 0.0037 的假阴性率，同时保持 99.63% 的高精度。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的无监督数据聚类技术，使用 K-Means 算法进行可视化分析。本文使用有限知识攻击场景分析了基于决策树的模型的脆弱性。我们考虑了探索性攻击，并对检测模型实施了零阶优化对抗攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种恶意广告URL检测框架，并分析其对抗攻击的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 现有恶意URL检测技术难以处理未见过的特征且泛化能力不足，需提升检测系统鲁棒性以应对安全威胁。
AI.method: 提取词法和网络爬取特征，结合随机森林、梯度提升等机器学习模型进行检测；采用K-Means聚类分析数据，并实施零阶优化对抗攻击测试模型脆弱性。
AI.result: 实现0.0037的低误判率与99.63%高准确率，发现决策树模型在有限知识攻击下存在漏洞。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效但决策树模型易受对抗攻击，需进一步增强模型鲁棒性。

search_text: An Adversarial Attack Analysis on Malicious Advertisement URL Detection Framework 恶意广告URL检测框架的对抗性攻击分析 Malicious advertisement URLs pose a security risk since they are the source of cyber-attacks, and the need to address this issue is growing in both industry and academia. Generally, the attacker delivers an attack vector to the user by means of an email, an advertisement link or any other means of communication and directs them to a malicious website to steal sensitive information and to defraud them. Existing malicious URL detection techniques are limited and to handle unseen features as well as generalize to test data. In this study, we extract a novel set of lexical and web-scrapped features and employ machine learning technique to set up system for fraudulent advertisement URLs detection. The combination set of six different kinds of features precisely overcome the obfuscation in fraudulent URL classification. Based on different statistical properties, we use twelve different formatted datasets for detection, prediction and classification task. We extend our prediction analysis for mismatched and unlabelled datasets. For this framework, we analyze the performance of four machine learning techniques: Random Forest, Gradient Boost, XGBoost and AdaBoost in the detection part. With our proposed method, we can achieve a false negative rate as low as 0.0037 while maintaining high accuracy of 99.63%. Moreover, we devise a novel unsupervised technique for data clustering using K- Means algorithm for the visual analysis. This paper analyses the vulnerability of decision tree-based models using the limited knowledge attack scenario. We considered the exploratory attack and implemented Zeroth Order Optimization adversarial attack on the detection models. 恶意广告 URL 会带来安全风险，因为它们是网络攻击的来源，而且业界和学术界对解决此问题的需求都在不断增长。通常，攻击者通过电子邮件、广告链接或任何其他通信方式向用户传递攻击向量，并将他们引导至恶意网站以窃取敏感信息并欺骗他们。现有的恶意 URL 检测技术是有限的，无法处理看不见的特征以及泛化到测试数据。在这项研究中，我们提取了一组新颖的词汇和网络抓取特征，并采用机器学习技术来建立欺诈性广告 URL 检测系统。六种不同特征的组合精确地克服了欺诈性URL分类中的混淆。基于不同的统计特性，我们使用十二种不同格式的数据集来进行检测、预测和分类任务。我们扩展了对不匹配和未标记数据集的预测分析。对于这个框架，我们分析了四种机器学习技术：随机森林、梯度提升、XGBoost 和 AdaBoost 在检测部分的性能。通过我们提出的方法，我们可以实现低至 0.0037 的假阴性率，同时保持 99.63% 的高精度。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的无监督数据聚类技术，使用 K-Means 算法进行可视化分析。本文使用有限知识攻击场景分析了基于决策树的模型的脆弱性。我们考虑了探索性攻击，并对检测模型实施了零阶优化对抗攻击。 本文提出一种恶意广告URL检测框架，并分析其对抗攻击的脆弱性。 Ehsan Nowroozi,Abhishek,Mohammadreza Mohammadi,Mauro Conti cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.NI

authors_text: Farshid Varno,Marzie Saghayi,Laya Rafiee Sevyeri,Sharut Gupta,Stan Matwin,Mohammad Havaei
title: AdaBest: Minimizing Client Drift in Federated Learning via Adaptive Bias Estimation
title_zh: AdaBest：通过自适应偏差估计最小化联合学习中的客户端漂移
comment: Published as a conference paper at ECCV 2022; Corrected some typos in the text and a baseline algorithm
comments: Published as a conference paper at ECCV 2022; Corrected some typos in the text and a baseline algorithm
abstract: In Federated Learning (FL), a number of clients or devices collaborate to train a model without sharing their data. Models are optimized locally at each client and further communicated to a central hub for aggregation. While FL is an appealing decentralized training paradigm, heterogeneity among data from different clients can cause the local optimization to drift away from the global objective. In order to estimate and therefore remove this drift, variance reduction techniques have been incorporated into FL optimization recently. However, these approaches inaccurately estimate the clients' drift and ultimately fail to remove it properly. In this work, we propose an adaptive algorithm that accurately estimates drift across clients. In comparison to previous works, our approach necessitates less storage and communication bandwidth, as well as lower compute costs. Additionally, our proposed methodology induces stability by constraining the norm of estimates for client drift, making it more practical for large scale FL. Experimental findings demonstrate that the proposed algorithm converges significantly faster and achieves higher accuracy than the baselines across various FL benchmarks.
summary: In Federated Learning (FL), a number of clients or devices collaborate to train a model without sharing their data. Models are optimized locally at each client and further communicated to a central hub for aggregation. While FL is an appealing decentralized training paradigm, heterogeneity among data from different clients can cause the local optimization to drift away from the global objective. In order to estimate and therefore remove this drift, variance reduction techniques have been incorporated into FL optimization recently. However, these approaches inaccurately estimate the clients' drift and ultimately fail to remove it properly. In this work, we propose an adaptive algorithm that accurately estimates drift across clients. In comparison to previous works, our approach necessitates less storage and communication bandwidth, as well as lower compute costs. Additionally, our proposed methodology induces stability by constraining the norm of estimates for client drift, making it more practical for large scale FL. Experimental findings demonstrate that the proposed algorithm converges significantly faster and achieves higher accuracy than the baselines across various FL benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 在联邦学习 (FL) 中，许多客户端或设备协作训练模型而不共享数据。模型在每个客户端进行本地优化，并进一步传送到中央枢纽进行聚合。虽然 FL 是一种颇具吸引力的去中心化训练范式，但来自不同客户端的数据之间的异质性可能会导致局部优化偏离全局目标。为了估计并消除这种漂移，最近已将方差减少技术纳入 FL 优化中。然而，这些方法不能准确地估计客户的漂移，最终无法正确消除它。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种自适应算法，可以准确估计客户端之间的漂移。与以前的工作相比，我们的方法需要更少的存储和通信带宽，以及更低的计算成本。此外，我们提出的方法通过限制客户端漂移的估计范数来提高稳定性，使其对于大规模 FL 更加实用。实验结果表明，与各种 FL 基准的基线相比，所提出的算法收敛速度明显更快，并且精度更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AdaBest的自适应偏差估计算法，旨在通过减少联邦学习中的客户端漂移问题，提高模型训练的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中客户端数据异构性导致本地优化偏离全局目标，现有方法对漂移估计不准确且计算成本高，亟需更高效稳定的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过自适应偏差估计技术，结合范数约束限制漂移估计值，降低存储、通信和计算开销，提升算法稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明，AdaBest在多个联邦学习基准测试中收敛速度更快，准确率显著高于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: AdaBest有效缓解了联邦学习中的客户端漂移问题，在计算效率和模型性能上均优于现有方法，适用于大规模联邦学习场景。

title: R-MBO: A Multi-surrogate Approach for Preference Incorporation in Multi-objective Bayesian Optimisation
title_zh: R-MBO：多目标贝叶斯优化中偏好合并的多代理方法
abstract: Many real-world multi-objective optimisation problems rely on computationally expensive function evaluations. Multi-objective Bayesian optimisation (BO) can be used to alleviate the computation time to find an approximated set of Pareto optimal solutions. In many real-world problems, a decision-maker has some preferences on the objective functions. One approach to incorporate the preferences in multi-objective BO is to use a scalarising function and build a single surrogate model (mono-surrogate approach) on it. This approach has two major limitations. Firstly, the fitness landscape of the scalarising function and the objective functions may not be similar. Secondly, the approach assumes that the scalarising function distribution is Gaussian, and thus a closed-form expression of an acquisition function e.g., expected improvement can be used. We overcome these limitations by building independent surrogate models (multi-surrogate approach) on each objective function and show that the distribution of the scalarising function is not Gaussian. We approximate the distribution using Generalised value distribution. We present an a-priori multi-surrogate approach to incorporate the desirable objective function values (or reference point) as the preferences of a decision-maker in multi-objective BO. The results and comparison with the existing mono-surrogate approach on benchmark and real-world optimisation problems show the potential of the proposed approach.
summary: Many real-world multi-objective optimisation problems rely on computationally expensive function evaluations. Multi-objective Bayesian optimisation (BO) can be used to alleviate the computation time to find an approximated set of Pareto optimal solutions. In many real-world problems, a decision-maker has some preferences on the objective functions. One approach to incorporate the preferences in multi-objective BO is to use a scalarising function and build a single surrogate model (mono-surrogate approach) on it. This approach has two major limitations. Firstly, the fitness landscape of the scalarising function and the objective functions may not be similar. Secondly, the approach assumes that the scalarising function distribution is Gaussian, and thus a closed-form expression of an acquisition function e.g., expected improvement can be used. We overcome these limitations by building independent surrogate models (multi-surrogate approach) on each objective function and show that the distribution of the scalarising function is not Gaussian. We approximate the distribution using Generalised value distribution. We present an a-priori multi-surrogate approach to incorporate the desirable objective function values (or reference point) as the preferences of a decision-maker in multi-objective BO. The results and comparison with the existing mono-surrogate approach on benchmark and real-world optimisation problems show the potential of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的多目标优化问题依赖于计算成本高昂的函数评估。多目标贝叶斯优化 (BO) 可用于减少计算时间，以找到一组近似的帕累托最优解。在许多现实问题中，决策者对目标函数有一些偏好。将偏好纳入多目标 BO 的一种方法是使用标量函数并在其上构建单个代理模型（单代理方法）。这种方法有两个主要限制。首先，标量函数和目标函数的适应度景观可能不相似。其次，该方法假设标量函数分布是高斯分布，因此可以使用获取函数的封闭形式表达式，例如预期改进。我们通过在每个目标函数上构建独立的代理模型（多代理方法）来克服这些限制，并表明标量函数的分布不是高斯分布。我们使用广义值分布来近似分布。我们提出了一种先验多代理方法，将所需的目标函数值（或参考点）纳入多目标 BO 中决策者的偏好。结果以及与现有单一代理方法在基准和现实世界优化问题上的比较显示了所提出方法的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多代理方法（R-MBO），用于在多目标贝叶斯优化中整合决策者的偏好。
AI.motivation: 多目标优化问题在实际应用中常依赖计算成本高的函数评估，而传统的单代理方法在整合决策者偏好时存在两个主要限制：标量化函数与目标函数的适应度景观可能不相似，且假设标量化函数分布为高斯分布。
AI.method: 本文通过为每个目标函数构建独立的代理模型，采用广义值分布近似标量化函数的分布，提出了一种先验多代理方法，以整合决策者的偏好。
AI.result: 在基准和实际优化问题上的实验结果表明，该方法在整合决策者偏好方面具有潜力。
AI.conclusion: R-MBO方法克服了传统单代理方法的局限性，能够更有效地整合决策者的偏好，为多目标贝叶斯优化提供了一种新的解决方案。
