We approximate the distribution using Generalised value distribution. We present an a-priori multi-surrogate approach to incorporate the desirable objective function values (or reference point) as the preferences of a decision-maker in multi-objective BO. The results and comparison with the existing mono-surrogate approach on benchmark and real-world optimisation problems show the potential of the proposed approach. 许多现实世界的多目标优化问题依赖于计算成本高昂的函数评估。多目标贝叶斯优化 (BO) 可用于减少计算时间，以找到一组近似的帕累托最优解。在许多现实问题中，决策者对目标函数有一些偏好。将偏好纳入多目标 BO 的一种方法是使用标量函数并在其上构建单个代理模型（单代理方法）。这种方法有两个主要限制。首先，标量函数和目标函数的适应度景观可能不相似。其次，该方法假设标量函数分布是高斯分布，因此可以使用获取函数的封闭形式表达式，例如预期改进。我们通过在每个目标函数上构建独立的代理模型（多代理方法）来克服这些限制，并表明标量函数的分布不是高斯分布。我们使用广义值分布来近似分布。我们提出了一种先验多代理方法，将所需的目标函数值（或参考点）纳入多目标 BO 中决策者的偏好。结果以及与现有单一代理方法在基准和现实世界优化问题上的比较显示了所提出方法的潜力。 本文提出了一种多代理方法（R-MBO），用于在多目标贝叶斯优化中整合决策者的偏好。 Tinkle Chugh stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG,math.PR

authors_text: Alex J. Chiluisa,Nicholas E. Pacheco,Hoang S. Do,Ryan M. Tougas,Emily V. Minch,Rositsa Mihaleva,Yao Shen,Yuxiang Liu,Thomas L. Carroll,Loris Fichera
title: Light in the Larynx: a Miniaturized Robotic Optical Fiber for In-office Laser Surgery of the Vocal Folds
title_zh: 喉部之光：用于声带办公室激光手术的微型机器人光纤
abstract: This letter reports the design, construction, and experimental validation of a novel hand-held robot for in-office laser surgery of the vocal folds. In-office endoscopic laser surgery is an emerging trend in Laryngology: It promises to deliver the same patient outcomes of traditional surgical treatment (i.e., in the operating room), at a fraction of the cost. Unfortunately, office procedures can be challenging to perform; the optical fibers used for laser delivery can only emit light forward in a line-of-sight fashion, which severely limits anatomical access. The robot we present in this letter aims to overcome these challenges. The end effector of the robot is a steerable laser fiber, created through the combination of a thin optical fiber (0.225 mm) with a tendon-actuated Nickel-Titanium notched sheath that provides bending. This device can be seamlessly used with most commercially available endoscopes, as it is sufficiently small (1.1 mm) to pass through a working channel. To control the fiber, we propose a compact actuation unit that can be mounted on top of the endoscope handle, so that, during a procedure, the operating physician can operate both the endoscope and the steerable fiber with a single hand. We report simulation and phantom experiments demonstrating that the proposed device substantially enhances surgical access compared to current clinical fibers.
summary: This letter reports the design, construction, and experimental validation of a novel hand-held robot for in-office laser surgery of the vocal folds. In-office endoscopic laser surgery is an emerging trend in Laryngology: It promises to deliver the same patient outcomes of traditional surgical treatment (i.e., in the operating room), at a fraction of the cost. Unfortunately, office procedures can be challenging to perform; the optical fibers used for laser delivery can only emit light forward in a line-of-sight fashion, which severely limits anatomical access. The robot we present in this letter aims to overcome these challenges. The end effector of the robot is a steerable laser fiber, created through the combination of a thin optical fiber (0.225 mm) with a tendon-actuated Nickel-Titanium notched sheath that provides bending. This device can be seamlessly used with most commercially available endoscopes, as it is sufficiently small (1.1 mm) to pass through a working channel. To control the fiber, we propose a compact actuation unit that can be mounted on top of the endoscope handle, so that, during a procedure, the operating physician can operate both the endoscope and the steerable fiber with a single hand. We report simulation and phantom experiments demonstrating that the proposed device substantially enhances surgical access compared to current clinical fibers.
abstract_zh: 这封信报告了一种用于办公室内声带激光手术的新型手持式机器人的设计、构造和实验验证。诊室内窥镜激光手术是喉科的一个新兴趋势：它有望以传统手术治疗（即在手术室）相同的患者治疗效果，而成本仅为传统手术治疗的一小部分。不幸的是，执行办公室程序可能具有挑战性；用于激光传输的光纤只能以视线方式向前发射光，这严重限制了解剖学的进入。我们在这封信中介绍的机器人旨在克服这些挑战。机器人的末端执行器是可操纵的激光光纤，由细光纤（0.225毫米）与可弯曲的腱驱动镍钛缺口护套组合而成。该设备可以与大多数市售内窥镜无缝使用，因为它足够小（1.1 毫米），可以通过工作通道。为了控制光纤，我们提出了一种紧凑的驱动单元，可以安装在内窥镜手柄的顶部，以便在手术过程中，手术医生可以用单手操作内窥镜和可操纵光纤。我们报告的模拟和模型实验表明，与当前的临床纤维相比，所提出的装置大大增强了手术通道。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种微型机器人光纤，用于门诊激光手术中声带的微创手术。
AI.motivation: 门诊内窥镜激光手术成本低但受限于传统光纤只能直线发射激光，难以灵活操作。
AI.method: 结合0.225毫米光纤与镍钛合金腱驱动鞘管实现光纤弯曲，通过1.1毫米直径适配内窥镜通道，并设计手持式驱动单元实现单手操作。
AI.result: 仿真和仿真实验证明该装置显著提升了手术器械的解剖学可及性。
AI.conclusion: 该机器人光纤为门诊声带手术提供了更灵活的解决方案，有望推动喉科手术的临床应用革新。

title: AutoLossGen: Automatic Loss Function Generation for Recommender Systems
title_zh: AutoLossGen：推荐系统的自动损失函数生成
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures. Conference: Proceedings of the 45th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval (SIGIR '22)
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures. Conference: Proceedings of the 45th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval (SIGIR '22)
abstract: In recommendation systems, the choice of loss function is critical since a good loss may significantly improve the model performance. However, manually designing a good loss is a big challenge due to the complexity of the problem. A large fraction of previous work focuses on handcrafted loss functions, which needs significant expertise and human effort. In this paper, inspired by the recent development of automated machine learning, we propose an automatic loss function generation framework, AutoLossGen, which is able to generate loss functions directly constructed from basic mathematical operators without prior knowledge on loss structure. More specifically, we develop a controller model driven by reinforcement learning to generate loss functions, and develop iterative and alternating optimization schedule to update the parameters of both the controller model and the recommender model. One challenge for automatic loss generation in recommender systems is the extreme sparsity of recommendation datasets, which leads to the sparse reward problem for loss generation and search. To solve the problem, we further develop a reward filtering mechanism for efficient and effective loss generation. Experimental results show that our framework manages to create tailored loss functions for different recommendation models and datasets, and the generated loss gives better recommendation performance than commonly used baseline losses. Besides, most of the generated losses are transferable, i.e., the loss generated based on one model and dataset also works well for another model or dataset. Source code of the work is available at https://github.com/rutgerswiselab/AutoLossGen.
summary: In recommendation systems, the choice of loss function is critical since a good loss may significantly improve the model performance. However, manually designing a good loss is a big challenge due to the complexity of the problem. A large fraction of previous work focuses on handcrafted loss functions, which needs significant expertise and human effort. In this paper, inspired by the recent development of automated machine learning, we propose an automatic loss function generation framework, AutoLossGen, which is able to generate loss functions directly constructed from basic mathematical operators without prior knowledge on loss structure. More specifically, we develop a controller model driven by reinforcement learning to generate loss functions, and develop iterative and alternating optimization schedule to update the parameters of both the controller model and the recommender model. One challenge for automatic loss generation in recommender systems is the extreme sparsity of recommendation datasets, which leads to the sparse reward problem for loss generation and search. To solve the problem, we further develop a reward filtering mechanism for efficient and effective loss generation. Experimental results show that our framework manages to create tailored loss functions for different recommendation models and datasets, and the generated loss gives better recommendation performance than commonly used baseline losses. Besides, most of the generated losses are transferable, i.e., the loss generated based on one model and dataset also works well for another model or dataset. Source code of the work is available at https://github.com/rutgerswiselab/AutoLossGen.
abstract_zh: 在推荐系统中，损失函数的选择至关重要，因为良好的损失可以显着提高模型性能。然而，由于问题的复杂性，手动设计一个好的损失是一个很大的挑战。之前的大部分工作都集中在手工制作的损失函数上，这需要大量的专业知识和人力。在本文中，受自动化机器学习最新发展的启发，我们提出了一种自动损失函数生成框架AutoLossGen，它能够生成直接由基本数学算子构造的损失函数，而无需先验损失结构知识。更具体地说，我们开发了一个由强化学习驱动的控制器模型来生成损失函数，并开发迭代和交替优化计划来更新控制器模型和推荐模型的参数。推荐系统中自动损失生成的一项挑战是推荐数据集的极度稀疏，这导致损失生成和搜索的稀疏奖励问题。为了解决这个问题，我们进一步开发了一种奖励过滤机制，以高效、有效地产生损失。实验结果表明，我们的框架成功地为不同的推荐模型和数据集创建了定制的损失函数，并且生成的损失比常用的基线损失提供了更好的推荐性能。此外，大多数生成的损失是可转移的，即基于一个模型和数据集生成的损失也适用于另一个模型或数据集。该工作的源代码可在 https://github.com/rutgerswiselab/AutoLossGen 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AutoLossGen的自动损失函数生成框架，用于推荐系统，旨在通过自动化方法生成高效的损失函数以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 手动设计推荐系统的损失函数复杂且耗时，传统方法依赖人工经验，难以适应不同模型和数据集的需求。
AI.method: 基于强化学习设计控制器模型生成损失函数，并结合迭代优化策略更新参数；通过奖励过滤机制解决数据稀疏性导致的稀疏奖励问题。
AI.result: 生成的损失函数在多个推荐模型和数据集上表现优于基线方法，且具有跨模型和跨数据集的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: AutoLossGen有效实现了损失函数的自动化生成，提升了推荐系统的性能与适应性，代码已开源。

title: Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 人员重新识别
abstract: Person Re-Identification (Re-ID) is an important problem in computer vision-based surveillance applications, in which one aims to identify a person across different surveillance photographs taken from different cameras having varying orientations and field of views. Due to the increasing demand for intelligent video surveillance, Re-ID has gained significant interest in the computer vision community. In this work, we experiment on some existing Re-ID methods that obtain state of the art performance in some open benchmarks. We qualitatively and quantitaively analyse their performance on a provided dataset, and then propose methods to improve the results. This work was the report submitted for COL780 final project at IIT Delhi.
summary: Person Re-Identification (Re-ID) is an important problem in computer vision-based surveillance applications, in which one aims to identify a person across different surveillance photographs taken from different cameras having varying orientations and field of views. Due to the increasing demand for intelligent video surveillance, Re-ID has gained significant interest in the computer vision community. In this work, we experiment on some existing Re-ID methods that obtain state of the art performance in some open benchmarks. We qualitatively and quantitaively analyse their performance on a provided dataset, and then propose methods to improve the results. This work was the report submitted for COL780 final project at IIT Delhi.
abstract_zh: 人员重新识别（Re-ID）是基于计算机视觉的监控应用中的一个重要问题，其目的是通过具有不同方向和视场的不同摄像机拍摄的不同监控照片来识别人员。由于智能视频监控的需求不断增长，Re-ID 引起了计算机视觉界的极大兴趣。在这项工作中，我们对一些现有的 Re-ID 方法进行了实验，这些方法在一些开放基准测试中获得了最先进的性能。我们定性和定量分析他们在提供的数据集上的表现，然后提出改进结果的方法。这项工作是为德里印度理工学院 COL780 最终项目提交的报告。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究如何在不同摄像头视角和视野下实现行人重识别技术，通过分析现有方法并提出改进方案。
AI.motivation: 随着智能视频监控需求的增长，行人重识别（Re-ID）成为关键问题，需提升跨摄像头图像识别的准确性。
AI.method: 实验现有Re-ID方法，基于公开基准测试进行定性和定量分析，并提出优化策略以提高识别效果。
AI.result: 通过分析现有方法在数据集上的表现，验证了改进方法的有效性，提升了行人重识别的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本研究作为课程项目总结了Re-ID技术现状，为后续研究提供了优化方向和实践参考。

title: On the Relationship Between Explanations, Fairness Perceptions, and Decisions
title_zh: 论解释、公平感和决策之间的关系
comment: ACM CHI 2022 Workshop on Human-Centered Explainable AI (HCXAI), May 12--13, 2022, New Orleans, LA, USA
comments: ACM CHI 2022 Workshop on Human-Centered Explainable AI (HCXAI), May 12--13, 2022, New Orleans, LA, USA
abstract: It is known that recommendations of AI-based systems can be incorrect or unfair. Hence, it is often proposed that a human be the final decision-maker. Prior work has argued that explanations are an essential pathway to help human decision-makers enhance decision quality and mitigate bias, i.e., facilitate human-AI complementarity. For these benefits to materialize, explanations should enable humans to appropriately rely on AI recommendations and override the algorithmic recommendation when necessary to increase distributive fairness of decisions. The literature, however, does not provide conclusive empirical evidence as to whether explanations enable such complementarity in practice. In this work, we (a) provide a conceptual framework to articulate the relationships between explanations, fairness perceptions, reliance, and distributive fairness, (b) apply it to understand (seemingly) contradictory research findings at the intersection of explanations and fairness, and (c) derive cohesive implications for the formulation of research questions and the design of experiments.
summary: It is known that recommendations of AI-based systems can be incorrect or unfair. Hence, it is often proposed that a human be the final decision-maker. Prior work has argued that explanations are an essential pathway to help human decision-makers enhance decision quality and mitigate bias, i.e., facilitate human-AI complementarity. For these benefits to materialize, explanations should enable humans to appropriately rely on AI recommendations and override the algorithmic recommendation when necessary to increase distributive fairness of decisions. The literature, however, does not provide conclusive empirical evidence as to whether explanations enable such complementarity in practice. In this work, we (a) provide a conceptual framework to articulate the relationships between explanations, fairness perceptions, reliance, and distributive fairness, (b) apply it to understand (seemingly) contradictory research findings at the intersection of explanations and fairness, and (c) derive cohesive implications for the formulation of research questions and the design of experiments.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，基于人工智能的系统的推荐可能是不正确或不公平的。因此，人们经常建议人类作为最终决策者。先前的研究认为，解释是帮助人类决策者提高决策质量和减少偏见的重要途径，即促进人类与人工智能的互补性。为了实现这些好处，解释应该使人类能够适当地依赖人工智能建议，并在必要时推翻算法建议，以提高决策的分配公平性。然而，文献并没有提供决定性的经验证据来证明解释是否能够在实践中实现这种互补性。在这项工作中，我们（a）提供了一个概念框架来阐明解释、公平观念、依赖和分配公平之间的关系，（b）应用它来理解解释和公平交叉点上（看似）矛盾的研究结果，以及（c）得出对研究问题的制定和实验设计的凝聚力影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在建立解释、公平感知、依赖与分配公平之间的概念框架，并用于解析解释与公平交叉领域的矛盾研究发现，从而指导未来研究问题的制定和实验设计。
AI.motivation: 尽管解释被认为是提升人类决策质量与减少偏见的关键，但现有研究尚未提供明确证据证明解释能否在实践中实现人类与AI的互补性，尤其在公平性方面存在矛盾结论。
AI.method: 提出概念框架以明确解释、公平感知、依赖及分配公平的关系；应用该框架分析现有矛盾研究；推导出研究问题设计与实验的统一指导原则。
AI.result: 构建了解释影响公平感知与人类决策依赖的理论框架，揭示了矛盾研究背后的机制差异，并为实验设计提供了可操作的理论依据。
AI.conclusion: 解释通过影响人类对公平的感知和对AI的依赖程度，间接影响决策公平性；未来研究需基于此框架系统设计实验以验证理论假设。

authors_text: Pham H. Nguyen,Karishma Patnaik,Shatadal Mishra,Panagiotis Polygerinos,Wenlong Zhang
title: A Soft-Bodied Aerial Robot for Collision Resilience and Contact-Reactive Perching
title_zh: 一种具有碰撞弹性和接触反应栖息功能的软体空中机器人
comment: Accepted for Publication, Soft Robotics Journal - Mary Ann Liebert Inc., Manuscript Details - 20 pages, 17 Figures, 2 Tables
comments: Accepted for Publication, Soft Robotics Journal - Mary Ann Liebert Inc., Manuscript Details - 20 pages, 17 Figures, 2 Tables
abstract: Current aerial robots demonstrate limited interaction capabilities in unstructured environments when compared with their biological counterparts. Some examples include their inability to tolerate collisions and to successfully land or perch on objects of unknown shapes, sizes, and texture. Efforts to include compliance have introduced designs that incorporate external mechanical impact protection at the cost of reduced agility and flight time due to the added weight. In this work, we propose and develop a light-weight, inflatable, soft-bodied aerial robot (SoBAR) that can pneumatically vary its body stiffness to achieve intrinsic collision resilience. Unlike the conventional rigid aerial robots, SoBAR successfully demonstrates its ability to repeatedly endure and recover from collisions in various directions, not only limited to in-plane ones. Furthermore, we exploit its capabilities to demonstrate perching where the 3D collision resilience helps in improving the perching success rates. We also augment SoBAR with a novel hybrid fabric-based, bistable (HFB) grasper that can utilize impact energies to perform contact-reactive grasping through rapid shape conforming abilities. We exhaustively study and offer insights into the collision resilience, impact absorption, and manipulation capabilities of SoBAR with the HFB grasper. Finally, we compare the performance of conventional aerial robots with the SoBAR through collision characterizations, grasping identifications, and experimental validations of collision resilience and perching in various scenarios and on differently shaped objects.
summary: Current aerial robots demonstrate limited interaction capabilities in unstructured environments when compared with their biological counterparts. Some examples include their inability to tolerate collisions and to successfully land or perch on objects of unknown shapes, sizes, and texture. Efforts to include compliance have introduced designs that incorporate external mechanical impact protection at the cost of reduced agility and flight time due to the added weight. In this work, we propose and develop a light-weight, inflatable, soft-bodied aerial robot (SoBAR) that can pneumatically vary its body stiffness to achieve intrinsic collision resilience. Unlike the conventional rigid aerial robots, SoBAR successfully demonstrates its ability to repeatedly endure and recover from collisions in various directions, not only limited to in-plane ones. Furthermore, we exploit its capabilities to demonstrate perching where the 3D collision resilience helps in improving the perching success rates. We also augment SoBAR with a novel hybrid fabric-based, bistable (HFB) grasper that can utilize impact energies to perform contact-reactive grasping through rapid shape conforming abilities. We exhaustively study and offer insights into the collision resilience, impact absorption, and manipulation capabilities of SoBAR with the HFB grasper. Finally, we compare the performance of conventional aerial robots with the SoBAR through collision characterizations, grasping identifications, and experimental validations of collision resilience and perching in various scenarios and on differently shaped objects.
abstract_zh: 与生物机器人相比，当前的空中机器人在非结构化环境中表现出有限的交互能力。一些例子包括它们无法容忍碰撞，也无法成功着陆或栖息在未知形状、大小和纹理的物体上。为了满足合规性，我们引入了包含外部机械冲击保护的设计，但由于重量增加而导致敏捷性和飞行时间降低。在这项工作中，我们提出并开发了一种轻质、充气、软体空中机器人（SoBAR），它可以通过气动方式改变其身体刚度，以实现内在的碰撞弹性。与传统的刚性空中机器人不同，SoBAR 成功地展示了其反复承受各个方向碰撞并从碰撞中恢复的能力，而不仅限于平面内碰撞。此外，我们利用其功能来演示栖息，其中 3D 碰撞弹性有助于提高栖息成功率。我们还用一种新型的基于混合织物的双稳态 (HFB) 抓取器增强了 SoBAR，该抓取器可以利用冲击能量，通过快速形状适应能力来执行接触反应抓取。我们对 SoBAR 与 HFB 抓取器的碰撞弹性、冲击吸收和操纵能力进行了详尽的研究并提供了见解。最后，我们通过碰撞表征、抓取识别以及在各种场景和不同形状物体上的碰撞弹性和栖息实验验证，比较了传统空中机器人与 SoBAR 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级充气软体空中机器人（SoBAR），通过调节身体刚度实现碰撞恢复能力，并结合新型双稳态抓取器实现接触反应式着陆。
AI.motivation: 传统空中机器人缺乏与复杂环境交互能力，无法有效应对碰撞和未知物体着陆，且现有合规设计牺牲了机动性与续航时间。
AI.method: 开发可充气软体机身实现内在碰撞韧性，设计基于双稳态织物的混合抓取器利用冲击能量完成抓取，并通过实验验证碰撞吸收、抓取能力及多场景着陆性能。
AI.result: SoBAR可承受多方向重复碰撞，着陆成功率提升，HFB抓取器实现快速形状适配抓取，整体性能优于传统刚性无人机。
AI.conclusion: 软体结构与双稳态抓取器的结合解决了空中机器人碰撞韧性与复杂环境交互难题，为下一代仿生飞行器设计提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级充气软体空中机器人（SoBAR），通过调节身体刚度实现碰撞恢复能力，并结合新型双稳态抓取器实现接触反应式着陆。

search_text: A Soft-Bodied Aerial Robot for Collision Resilience and Contact-Reactive Perching 一种具有碰撞弹性和接触反应栖息功能的软体空中机器人 Current aerial robots demonstrate limited interaction capabilities in unstructured environments when compared with their biological counterparts. Some examples include their inability to tolerate collisions and to successfully land or perch on objects of unknown shapes, sizes, and texture. Efforts to include compliance have introduced designs that incorporate external mechanical impact protection at the cost of reduced agility and flight time due to the added weight. In this work, we propose and develop a light-weight, inflatable, soft-bodied aerial robot (SoBAR) that can pneumatically vary its body stiffness to achieve intrinsic collision resilience. Unlike the conventional rigid aerial robots, SoBAR successfully demonstrates its ability to repeatedly endure and recover from collisions in various directions, not only limited to in-plane ones. Furthermore, we exploit its capabilities to demonstrate perching where the 3D collision resilience helps in improving the perching success rates. We also augment SoBAR with a novel hybrid fabric-based, bistable (HFB) grasper that can utilize impact energies to perform contact-reactive grasping through rapid shape conforming abilities. We exhaustively study and offer insights into the collision resilience, impact absorption, and manipulation capabilities of SoBAR with the HFB grasper. Finally, we compare the performance of conventional aerial robots with the SoBAR through collision characterizations, grasping identifications, and experimental validations of collision resilience and perching in various scenarios and on differently shaped objects. 与生物机器人相比，当前的空中机器人在非结构化环境中表现出有限的交互能力。一些例子包括它们无法容忍碰撞，也无法成功着陆或栖息在未知形状、大小和纹理的物体上。为了满足合规性，我们引入了包含外部机械冲击保护的设计，但由于重量增加而导致敏捷性和飞行时间降低。在这项工作中，我们提出并开发了一种轻质、充气、软体空中机器人（SoBAR），它可以通过气动方式改变其身体刚度，以实现内在的碰撞弹性。与传统的刚性空中机器人不同，SoBAR 成功地展示了其反复承受各个方向碰撞并从碰撞中恢复的能力，而不仅限于平面内碰撞。此外，我们利用其功能来演示栖息，其中 3D 碰撞弹性有助于提高栖息成功率。我们还用一种新型的基于混合织物的双稳态 (HFB) 抓取器增强了 SoBAR，该抓取器可以利用冲击能量，通过快速形状适应能力来执行接触反应抓取。我们对 SoBAR 与 HFB 抓取器的碰撞弹性、冲击吸收和操纵能力进行了详尽的研究并提供了见解。最后，我们通过碰撞表征、抓取识别以及在各种场景和不同形状物体上的碰撞弹性和栖息实验验证，比较了传统空中机器人与 SoBAR 的性能。 本文提出一种轻量级充气软体空中机器人（SoBAR），通过调节身体刚度实现碰撞恢复能力，并结合新型双稳态抓取器实现接触反应式着陆。 Pham H. Nguyen,Karishma Patnaik,Shatadal Mishra,Panagiotis Polygerinos,Wenlong Zhang cs.RO,eess.SY

title: SSR-GNNs: Stroke-based Sketch Representation with Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: SSR-GNN：使用图神经网络进行基于笔划的草图表示
abstract: This paper follows cognitive studies to investigate a graph representation for sketches, where the information of strokes, i.e., parts of a sketch, are encoded on vertices and information of inter-stroke on edges. The resultant graph representation facilitates the training of a Graph Neural Networks for classification tasks, and achieves accuracy and robustness comparable to the state-of-the-art against translation and rotation attacks, as well as stronger attacks on graph vertices and topologies, i.e., modifications and addition of strokes, all without resorting to adversarial training. Prior studies on sketches, e.g., graph transformers, encode control points of stroke on vertices, which are not invariant to spatial transformations. In contrary, we encode vertices and edges using pairwise distances among control points to achieve invariance. Compared with existing generative sketch model for one-shot classification, our method does not rely on run-time statistical inference. Lastly, the proposed representation enables generation of novel sketches that are structurally similar to while separable from the existing dataset.
summary: This paper follows cognitive studies to investigate a graph representation for sketches, where the information of strokes, i.e., parts of a sketch, are encoded on vertices and information of inter-stroke on edges. The resultant graph representation facilitates the training of a Graph Neural Networks for classification tasks, and achieves accuracy and robustness comparable to the state-of-the-art against translation and rotation attacks, as well as stronger attacks on graph vertices and topologies, i.e., modifications and addition of strokes, all without resorting to adversarial training. Prior studies on sketches, e.g., graph transformers, encode control points of stroke on vertices, which are not invariant to spatial transformations. In contrary, we encode vertices and edges using pairwise distances among control points to achieve invariance. Compared with existing generative sketch model for one-shot classification, our method does not rely on run-time statistical inference. Lastly, the proposed representation enables generation of novel sketches that are structurally similar to while separable from the existing dataset.
abstract_zh: 本文遵循认知研究来研究草图的图形表示，其中笔画的信息（即草图的部分）被编码在顶点上，而笔画间的信息被编码在边缘上。由此产生的图表示有利于图神经网络用于分类任务的训练，并实现了与最先进的平移和旋转攻击相当的准确性和鲁棒性，以及对图顶点和拓扑的更强攻击，即修改和添加笔划，所有这些都无需诉诸对抗性训练。先前对草图的研究，例如图变换器，对顶点上的笔划控制点进行编码，这对于空间变换不是不变的。相反，我们使用控制点之间的成对距离对顶点和边进行编码以实现不变性。与现有的一次性分类生成草图模型相比，我们的方法不依赖于运行时统计推断。最后，所提出的表示能够生成结构类似于现有数据集但又可与现有数据集分离的新颖草图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于笔画的草图图表示方法（SSR-GNNs），利用图神经网络（GNN）对草图进行分类和生成。
AI.motivation: 现有草图表示方法（如图变压器）使用笔画控制点编码，无法抵抗空间变换攻击。作者旨在构建一种具有空间不变性的图表示，无需对抗训练即可提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将笔画信息编码到图顶点，笔画间关系编码到边，通过控制点的成对距离实现空间不变性，并基于该图结构训练GNN。
AI.result: 在翻译、旋转及拓扑攻击下分类准确率与最先进方法相当，且无需运行时统计推断，可生成结构相似但独立于现有数据集的新草图。
AI.conclusion: SSR-GNNs通过图表示和GNN实现了鲁棒的草图分类与生成，优于依赖控制点的现有方法，并支持新颖草图生成。

title: Polynomial Time Algorithm for ARRIVAL on Tree-like Multigraphs
title_zh: 树状多重图上的到达多项式时间算法
abstract: A rotor walk in a directed graph can be thought of as a deterministic version of a Markov Chain, where a pebble moves from vertex to vertex following a simple rule until a terminal vertex, or sink, is reached. The ARRIVAL problem, as defined by Dohrau and al., consists in determining which sink will be reached. While the walk itself can take an exponential number of steps, this problem belongs to the complexity class NP$\cap$co-NP without being known to be in P. Several variants have been studied where we add one or two players to the model, defining deterministic analogs of stochastic models (e.g., Markovian decision processes, Stochastic Games) with rotor-routing rules instead of random transitions. The corresponding decision problem address the existence of strategies for players that ensure some condition on the reached sink. These problems are known to be $NP$-complete for one player and $PSPACE$-complete for two players. In this work, we define a class of directed graphs, namely tree-like multigraphs, which are multigraphs having the global shape of an undirected tree. We prove that the different variants of the reachability problem with zero, one, or two players can be solved in linear time, while the number of steps of rotor walks can still be exponential. To achieve this, we define a notion of return flow, which counts the number of times the pebble will bounce back in subtrees of the graph.
summary: A rotor walk in a directed graph can be thought of as a deterministic version of a Markov Chain, where a pebble moves from vertex to vertex following a simple rule until a terminal vertex, or sink, is reached. The ARRIVAL problem, as defined by Dohrau and al., consists in determining which sink will be reached. While the walk itself can take an exponential number of steps, this problem belongs to the complexity class NP$\cap$co-NP without being known to be in P. Several variants have been studied where we add one or two players to the model, defining deterministic analogs of stochastic models (e.g., Markovian decision processes, Stochastic Games) with rotor-routing rules instead of random transitions. The corresponding decision problem address the existence of strategies for players that ensure some condition on the reached sink. These problems are known to be $NP$-complete for one player and $PSPACE$-complete for two players. In this work, we define a class of directed graphs, namely tree-like multigraphs, which are multigraphs having the global shape of an undirected tree. We prove that the different variants of the reachability problem with zero, one, or two players can be solved in linear time, while the number of steps of rotor walks can still be exponential. To achieve this, we define a notion of return flow, which counts the number of times the pebble will bounce back in subtrees of the graph.
abstract_zh: 有向图中的转子行走可以被认为是马尔可夫链的确定性版本，其中卵石遵循简单的规则从一个顶点移动到另一个顶点，直到到达终端顶点或汇点。 Dohrau 等人定义的到达问题在于确定将到达哪个汇点。虽然步行本身可以采取指数步数，但这个问题属于复杂性类别 NP$\cap$co-NP，但不知道是否在 P 中。已经研究了几种变体，其中我们向模型中添加一两个参与者，用转子路由规则而不是随机转换定义随机模型的确定性模拟（例如，马尔可夫决策过程、随机博弈）。相应的决策问题解决了玩家确保到达水槽的某些条件的策略的存在。已知这些问题对于一名玩家来说是 $NP$ 完成的，对于两名玩家来说是 $PSPACE$ 完成的。在这项工作中，我们定义了一类有向图，即树状多重图，它们是具有无向树全局形状的多重图。我们证明了零个、一个或两个玩家的可达性问题的不同变体可以在线性时间内解决，而转子行走的步数仍然可以是指数级的。为了实现这一目标，我们定义了返回流的概念，它计算卵石在图的子树中反弹的次数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在树状多重图上解决ARRIVAL问题的多项式时间算法。
AI.motivation: ARRIVAL问题属于NP∩co-NP类但未被证明属于P类，且其变体在存在玩家时复杂度更高。研究树状多重图结构以寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 定义树状多重图结构，并引入'返回流'概念，通过分析子树中的反弹次数实现线性时间求解。
AI.result: 零、一或两名玩家的可达性问题在树状多重图上均可在线性时间内解决，尽管旋转行走步数可能呈指数级。
AI.conclusion: 树状多重图结构为ARRIVAL问题及其变体提供了高效的求解方法，揭示了图结构对复杂度的影响。

The corresponding decision problem address the existence of strategies for players that ensure some condition on the reached sink. These problems are known to be $NP$-complete for one player and $PSPACE$-complete for two players. In this work, we define a class of directed graphs, namely tree-like multigraphs, which are multigraphs having the global shape of an undirected tree. We prove that the different variants of the reachability problem with zero, one, or two players can be solved in linear time, while the number of steps of rotor walks can still be exponential. To achieve this, we define a notion of return flow, which counts the number of times the pebble will bounce back in subtrees of the graph. 有向图中的转子行走可以被认为是马尔可夫链的确定性版本，其中卵石遵循简单的规则从一个顶点移动到另一个顶点，直到到达终端顶点或汇点。 Dohrau 等人定义的到达问题在于确定将到达哪个汇点。虽然步行本身可以采取指数步数，但这个问题属于复杂性类别 NP$\cap$co-NP，但不知道是否在 P 中。已经研究了几种变体，其中我们向模型中添加一两个参与者，用转子路由规则而不是随机转换定义随机模型的确定性模拟（例如，马尔可夫决策过程、随机博弈）。相应的决策问题解决了玩家确保到达水槽的某些条件的策略的存在。已知这些问题对于一名玩家来说是 $NP$ 完成的，对于两名玩家来说是 $PSPACE$ 完成的。在这项工作中，我们定义了一类有向图，即树状多重图，它们是具有无向树全局形状的多重图。我们证明了零个、一个或两个玩家的可达性问题的不同变体可以在线性时间内解决，而转子行走的步数仍然可以是指数级的。为了实现这一目标，我们定义了返回流的概念，它计算卵石在图的子树中反弹的次数。 本文提出了一种在树状多重图上解决ARRIVAL问题的多项式时间算法。 David Auger,Pierre Coucheney,Loric Duhaze cs.GT,cs.DS

title: ForeSight: Reducing SWAPs in NISQ Programs via Adaptive Multi-Candidate Evaluations
title_zh: ForeSight：通过自适应多候选人评估减少 NISQ 项目中的 SWAP
abstract: Near-term quantum computers are noisy and have limited connectivity between qubits. Compilers are required to introduce SWAP operations in order to perform two-qubit gates between non-adjacent qubits. SWAPs increase the number of gates and depth of programs, making them even more vulnerable to errors. Moreover, they relocate qubits which affect SWAP selections for future gates in a program. Thus, compilers must select SWAP routes that not only minimize the overheads for the current operation, but also for future gates. Existing compilers tend to select paths with the fewest SWAPs for the current operations, but do not evaluate the impact of the relocations from the selected SWAP candidate on future SWAPs. Also, they converge on SWAP candidates for the current operation and only then decide SWAP routes for future gates, thus severely restricting the SWAP candidate search space for future operations. We propose ForeSight, a compiler that simultaneously evaluates multiple SWAP candidates for several operations into the future, delays SWAP selections to analyze their impact on future SWAP decisions and avoids early convergence on sub-optimal candidates. Moreover, ForeSight evaluates slightly longer SWAP routes for current operations if they have the potential to reduce SWAPs for future gates, thus reducing SWAPs for the program globally. As compilation proceeds, ForeSight dynamically adds new SWAP candidates to the solution space and eliminates the weaker ones. This allows ForeSight to reduce SWAP overheads at program-level while keeping the compilation complexity tractable. Our evaluations with a hundred benchmarks across three devices show that ForeSight reduces SWAP overheads by 17% on average and 81% in the best-case, compared to the baseline. ForeSight takes minutes, making it scalable to large programs.

We propose ForeSight, a compiler that simultaneously evaluates multiple SWAP candidates for several operations into the future, delays SWAP selections to analyze their impact on future SWAP decisions and avoids early convergence on sub-optimal candidates. Moreover, ForeSight evaluates slightly longer SWAP routes for current operations if they have the potential to reduce SWAPs for future gates, thus reducing SWAPs for the program globally. abstract_zh: 近期的量子计算机噪音很大，并且量子位之间的连接性有限。编译器需要引入 SWAP 操作，以便在非相邻量子位之间执行两个量子位门。交换增加了程序的门数和深度，使它们更容易出错。此外，他们重新定位了影响程序中未来门的交换选择的量子位。因此，编译器必须选择 SWAP 路由，不仅要最小化当前操作的开销，还要最小化未来门的开销。现有编译器倾向于为当前操作选择具有最少 SWAP 的路径，但不会评估所选 SWAP 候选的重定位对未来 SWAP 的影响。此外，它们会集中当前操作的 SWAP 候选者，然后才决定未来门的 SWAP 路线，从而严重限制了未来操作的 SWAP 候选者搜索空间。我们提出了 ForeSight，这是一种编译器，可以同时评估未来多个操作的多个 SWAP 候选者，延迟 SWAP 选择以分析它们对未来 SWAP 决策的影响，并避免过早收敛于次优候选者。此外，ForeSight 会评估当前运营的稍长的 SWAP 路线，如果它们有可能减少未来登机口的 SWAP，从而减少全球计划的 SWAP。随着编译的进行，ForeSight 会动态地将新的 SWAP 候选项添加到解决方案空间中，并消除较弱的候选项。这使得 ForeSight 能够减少程序级别的 SWAP 开销，同时保持编译复杂性易于处理。我们对三种设备的一百个基准进行的评估表明，与基准相比，ForeSight 平均将 SWAP 开销减少了 17%，在最佳情况下减少了 81%。 ForeSight 只需几分钟的时间，使其可扩展到大型程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ForeSight编译器，通过自适应多候选评估减少NISQ程序中的SWAP操作。
AI.motivation: 现有编译器仅关注当前操作的SWAP最小化，忽略对后续操作的影响，导致整体SWAP开销无法优化。
AI.method: 同时评估多个未来操作的SWAP候选路径，延迟决策以避免过早收敛，并动态更新候选集以优化全局SWAP数量。
AI.result: 在三个设备的100个基准测试中，平均减少17%的SWAP开销，最佳情况下减少81%。
AI.conclusion: ForeSight通过前瞻性评估和动态优化，有效降低程序级SWAP开销，提升量子程序的错误鲁棒性。

title: An Improved Nearest Neighbour Classifier
title_zh: 一种改进的最近邻分类器
abstract: A windowed version of the Nearest Neighbour (WNN) classifier for images is described. While its construction is inspired by the architecture of Artificial Neural Networks, the underlying theoretical framework is based on approximation theory. We illustrate WNN on the datasets MNIST and EMNIST of images of handwritten digits. In order to calibrate the parameters of WNN, we first study it on the classical MNIST dataset. We then apply WNN with these parameters to the challenging EMNIST dataset. It is demonstrated that WNN misclassifies 0.42% of the images of EMNIST and therefore significantly outperforms predictions by humans and shallow ANNs that both have more than 1.3% of errors.
summary: A windowed version of the Nearest Neighbour (WNN) classifier for images is described. While its construction is inspired by the architecture of Artificial Neural Networks, the underlying theoretical framework is based on approximation theory. We illustrate WNN on the datasets MNIST and EMNIST of images of handwritten digits. In order to calibrate the parameters of WNN, we first study it on the classical MNIST dataset. We then apply WNN with these parameters to the challenging EMNIST dataset. It is demonstrated that WNN misclassifies 0.42% of the images of EMNIST and therefore significantly outperforms predictions by humans and shallow ANNs that both have more than 1.3% of errors.
abstract_zh: 描述了图像最近邻 (WNN) 分类器的窗口版本。虽然其构造受到人工神经网络架构的启发，但其底层理论框架基于近似理论。我们在手写数字图像数据集 MNIST 和 EMNIST 上说明 WNN。为了校准WNN的参数，我们首先在经典的MNIST数据集上进行研究。然后，我们将具有这些参数的 WNN 应用到具有挑战性的 EMNIST 数据集。结果表明，WNN 对 EMNIST 图像的 0.42% 进行了错误分类，因此明显优于人类和浅层 ANN 的预测，两者的错误率均超过 1.3%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种改进的窗口化最近邻分类器（WNN），用于图像分类任务，并在MNIST和EMNIST数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统最近邻分类器在处理复杂图像数据时可能存在局限性，本文旨在通过结合神经网络架构与逼近理论，提升分类性能。
AI.method: 基于逼近理论设计窗口化最近邻分类器（WNN），通过在MNIST数据集上调整参数后，应用于EMNIST数据集进行测试。
AI.result: WNN在EMNIST数据集上实现0.42%的误分类率，显著优于人类及浅层人工神经网络（ANN）的1.3%以上错误率。
AI.conclusion: 窗口化最近邻分类器在图像分类任务中表现出优越性能，尤其在复杂数据集上显著超越传统方法。

title: HRDA: Context-Aware High-Resolution Domain-Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: HRDA：上下文感知高分辨率域自适应语义分割
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims to adapt a model trained on the source domain (e.g. synthetic data) to the target domain (e.g. real-world data) without requiring further annotations on the target domain. This work focuses on UDA for semantic segmentation as real-world pixel-wise annotations are particularly expensive to acquire. As UDA methods for semantic segmentation are usually GPU memory intensive, most previous methods operate only on downscaled images. We question this design as low-resolution predictions often fail to preserve fine details. The alternative of training with random crops of high-resolution images alleviates this problem but falls short in capturing long-range, domain-robust context information. Therefore, we propose HRDA, a multi-resolution training approach for UDA, that combines the strengths of small high-resolution crops to preserve fine segmentation details and large low-resolution crops to capture long-range context dependencies with a learned scale attention, while maintaining a manageable GPU memory footprint. HRDA enables adapting small objects and preserving fine segmentation details. It significantly improves the state-of-the-art performance by 5.5 mIoU for GTA-to-Cityscapes and 4.9 mIoU for Synthia-to-Cityscapes, resulting in unprecedented 73.8 and 65.8 mIoU, respectively. The implementation is available at https://github.com/lhoyer/HRDA.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims to adapt a model trained on the source domain (e.g. synthetic data) to the target domain (e.g. real-world data) without requiring further annotations on the target domain. Therefore, we propose HRDA, a multi-resolution training approach for UDA, that combines the strengths of small high-resolution crops to preserve fine segmentation details and large low-resolution crops to capture long-range context dependencies with a learned scale attention, while maintaining a manageable GPU memory footprint. It significantly improves the state-of-the-art performance by 5.5 mIoU for GTA-to-Cityscapes and 4.9 mIoU for Synthia-to-Cityscapes, resulting in unprecedented 73.8 and 65.8 mIoU, respectively. The implementation is available at https://github.com/lhoyer/HRDA.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在使在源域（例如合成数据）上训练的模型适应目标域（例如真实世界数据），而不需要对目标域进行进一步注释。这项工作重点关注用于语义分割的 UDA，因为现实世界中的像素级注释的获取成本特别高。由于用于语义分割的 UDA 方法通常需要大量 GPU 内存，因此大多数先前的方法仅适用于缩小尺寸的图像。我们质疑这种设计，因为低分辨率预测通常无法保留精细细节。使用高分辨率图像的随机裁剪进行训练的替代方案可以缓解这个问题，但在捕获远程、域鲁棒的上下文信息方面存在不足。因此，我们提出了 HRDA，一种 UDA 的多分辨率训练方法，它结合了小型高分辨率裁剪的优点来保留精细的分割细节和大型低分辨率裁剪的优点，以通过学习的尺度注意力来捕获远程上下文依赖关系，同时保持可管理的 GPU 内存占用。 HRDA 能够适应小对象并保留精细的分割细节。它将 GTA 到 Cityscapes 的最先进性能显着提高了 5.5 mIoU，将 Synthia 到 Cityscapes 提高了 4.9 mIoU，分别达到了前所未有的 73.8 mIoU 和 65.8 mIoU。该实施可在 https://github.com/lhoyer/HRDA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HRDA方法，在无需目标域标注的情况下，通过多分辨率训练策略提升无监督域适应语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法因GPU内存限制仅使用低分辨率图像进行域适应，导致细节丢失；而高分辨率随机裁剪虽保留细节但无法捕捉长距离上下文信息，需兼顾两者优势。
AI.method: HRDA采用多分辨率训练框架，结合小尺寸高分辨率裁剪（保留细节）与大尺寸低分辨率裁剪（捕捉长距离上下文），通过学习尺度注意力机制实现有效融合。
AI.result: 在GTA→Cityscapes和Synthia→Cityscapes数据集上分别提升5.5 mIoU和4.9 mIoU，达到73.8和65.8 mIoU的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: HRDA通过多尺度特征融合有效平衡了细节保留与上下文建模，为高分辨率域适应语义分割提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: HRDA: Context-Aware High-Resolution Domain-Adaptive Semantic Segmentation HRDA：上下文感知高分辨率域自适应语义分割 Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims to adapt a model trained on the source domain (e.g. synthetic data) to the target domain (e.g. real-world data) without requiring further annotations on the target domain. This work focuses on UDA for semantic segmentation as real-world pixel-wise annotations are particularly expensive to acquire. As UDA methods for semantic segmentation are usually GPU memory intensive, most previous methods operate only on downscaled images. We question this design as low-resolution predictions often fail to preserve fine details. The alternative of training with random crops of high-resolution images alleviates this problem but falls short in capturing long-range, domain-robust context information. Therefore, we propose HRDA, a multi-resolution training approach for UDA, that combines the strengths of small high-resolution crops to preserve fine segmentation details and large low-resolution crops to capture long-range context dependencies with a learned scale attention, while maintaining a manageable GPU memory footprint. HRDA enables adapting small objects and preserving fine segmentation details. It significantly improves the state-of-the-art performance by 5.5 mIoU for GTA-to-Cityscapes and 4.9 mIoU for Synthia-to-Cityscapes, resulting in unprecedented 73.8 and 65.8 mIoU, respectively. The implementation is available at https://github.com/lhoyer/HRDA. 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在使在源域（例如合成数据）上训练的模型适应目标域（例如真实世界数据），而不需要对目标域进行进一步注释。这项工作重点关注用于语义分割的 UDA，因为现实世界中的像素级注释的获取成本特别高。由于用于语义分割的 UDA 方法通常需要大量 GPU 内存，因此大多数先前的方法仅适用于缩小尺寸的图像。我们质疑这种设计，因为低分辨率预测通常无法保留精细细节。使用高分辨率图像的随机裁剪进行训练的替代方案可以缓解这个问题，但在捕获远程、域鲁棒的上下文信息方面存在不足。因此，我们提出了 HRDA，一种 UDA 的多分辨率训练方法，它结合了小型高分辨率裁剪的优点来保留精细的分割细节和大型低分辨率裁剪的优点，以通过学习的尺度注意力来捕获远程上下文依赖关系，同时保持可管理的 GPU 内存占用。 HRDA 能够适应小对象并保留精细的分割细节。它将 GTA 到 Cityscapes 的最先进性能显着提高了 5.5 mIoU，将 Synthia 到 Cityscapes 提高了 4.9 mIoU，分别达到了前所未有的 73.8 mIoU 和 65.8 mIoU。该实施可在 https://github.com/lhoyer/HRDA 获取。 本文提出HRDA方法，在无需目标域标注的情况下，通过多分辨率训练策略提升无监督域适应语义分割性能。 Lukas Hoyer,Dengxin Dai,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

title: Self-Supervised Learning of Object Parts for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的对象部分的自监督学习
abstract: Progress in self-supervised learning has brought strong general image representation learning methods. Yet so far, it has mostly focused on image-level learning. In turn, tasks such as unsupervised image segmentation have not benefited from this trend as they require spatially-diverse representations. However, learning dense representations is challenging, as in the unsupervised context it is not clear how to guide the model to learn representations that correspond to various potential object categories. In this paper, we argue that self-supervised learning of object parts is a solution to this issue. Object parts are generalizable: they are a priori independent of an object definition, but can be grouped to form objects a posteriori. To this end, we leverage the recently proposed Vision Transformer's capability of attending to objects and combine it with a spatially dense clustering task for fine-tuning the spatial tokens. Our method surpasses the state-of-the-art on three semantic segmentation benchmarks by 17%-3%, showing that our representations are versatile under various object definitions. Finally, we extend this to fully unsupervised segmentation - which refrains completely from using label information even at test-time - and demonstrate that a simple method for automatically merging discovered object parts based on community detection yields substantial gains.
summary: Progress in self-supervised learning has brought strong general image representation learning methods. Yet so far, it has mostly focused on image-level learning. In turn, tasks such as unsupervised image segmentation have not benefited from this trend as they require spatially-diverse representations. However, learning dense representations is challenging, as in the unsupervised context it is not clear how to guide the model to learn representations that correspond to various potential object categories. In this paper, we argue that self-supervised learning of object parts is a solution to this issue. Object parts are generalizable: they are a priori independent of an object definition, but can be grouped to form objects a posteriori. To this end, we leverage the recently proposed Vision Transformer's capability of attending to objects and combine it with a spatially dense clustering task for fine-tuning the spatial tokens. Our method surpasses the state-of-the-art on three semantic segmentation benchmarks by 17%-3%, showing that our representations are versatile under various object definitions. Finally, we extend this to fully unsupervised segmentation - which refrains completely from using label information even at test-time - and demonstrate that a simple method for automatically merging discovered object parts based on community detection yields substantial gains.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习的进步带来了强大的通用图像表示学习方法。但到目前为止，它主要集中在图像级学习上。反过来，诸如无监督图像分割之类的任务并没有从这种趋势中受益，因为它们需要空间多样化的表示。然而，学习密集表示具有挑战性，因为在无监督环境中，尚不清楚如何引导模型学习与各种潜在对象类别相对应的表示。在本文中，我们认为对象部分的自监督学习是解决这个问题的方法。对象部分是可概括的：它们先验地独立于对象定义，但可以后验地分组以形成对象。为此，我们利用最近提出的 Vision Transformer 关注对象的能力，并将其与空间密集聚类任务相结合，以微调空间标记。我们的方法在三个语义分割基准上超越了最先进的方法 17%-3%，这表明我们的表示在各种对象定义下是通用的。最后，我们将其扩展到完全无监督的分割（即使在测试时也完全避免使用标签信息），并证明基于社区检测自动合并发现的对象部分的简单方法可以产生巨大的收益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过自监督学习对象部分以提升语义分割性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习在图像级学习上取得了进展，但像无监督图像分割这样的任务尚未从中受益，因为它们需要空间多样化的表示，而学习密集表示在无监督环境下具有挑战性。
AI.method: 作者利用视觉Transformer对对象的注意力机制，并结合空间密集聚类任务来微调空间标记，从而学习对象部分的表示。
AI.result: 该方法在三个语义分割基准测试中超越了现有最佳方法17%-3%，并且在完全无监督分割中也取得了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习对象部分的方法可以生成适用于不同对象定义的通用表示，并且可以扩展到完全无监督的分割任务中。

title: CATrans: Context and Affinity Transformer for Few-Shot Segmentation
title_zh: CATrans：用于少镜头分割的上下文和亲和力转换器
abstract: Few-shot segmentation (FSS) aims to segment novel categories given scarce annotated support images. The crux of FSS is how to aggregate dense correlations between support and query images for query segmentation while being robust to the large variations in appearance and context. To this end, previous Transformer-based methods explore global consensus either on context similarity or affinity map between support-query pairs. In this work, we effectively integrate the context and affinity information via the proposed novel Context and Affinity Transformer (CATrans) in a hierarchical architecture. Specifically, the Relation-guided Context Transformer (RCT) propagates context information from support to query images conditioned on more informative support features. Based on the observation that a huge feature distinction between support and query pairs brings barriers for context knowledge transfer, the Relation-guided Affinity Transformer (RAT) measures attention-aware affinity as auxiliary information for FSS, in which the self-affinity is responsible for more reliable cross-affinity. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Few-shot segmentation (FSS) aims to segment novel categories given scarce annotated support images. The crux of FSS is how to aggregate dense correlations between support and query images for query segmentation while being robust to the large variations in appearance and context. To this end, previous Transformer-based methods explore global consensus either on context similarity or affinity map between support-query pairs. In this work, we effectively integrate the context and affinity information via the proposed novel Context and Affinity Transformer (CATrans) in a hierarchical architecture. Specifically, the Relation-guided Context Transformer (RCT) propagates context information from support to query images conditioned on more informative support features. Based on the observation that a huge feature distinction between support and query pairs brings barriers for context knowledge transfer, the Relation-guided Affinity Transformer (RAT) measures attention-aware affinity as auxiliary information for FSS, in which the self-affinity is responsible for more reliable cross-affinity. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 少镜头分割（FSS）旨在在给定稀缺注释支持图像的情况下分割新类别。 FSS 的关键是如何聚合支持图像和查询图像之间的密集相关性以进行查询分割，同时对外观和上下文的巨大变化保持鲁棒性。为此，之前基于 Transformer 的方法探索支持查询对之间的上下文相似性或亲和力图的全局共识。在这项工作中，我们通过分层架构中提出的新颖的上下文和亲和力转换器（CATrans）有效地集成了上下文和亲和力信息。具体来说，关系引导上下文转换器（RCT）将上下文信息从支持传播到以信息更丰富的支持特征为条件的查询图像。基于支持和查询对之间巨大的特征差异给上下文知识迁移带来障碍的观察，关系引导亲和力变换器（RAT）将注意感知亲和力作为 FSS 的辅助信息，其中自亲和力负责更可靠的交叉亲和力。我们进行实验来证明所提出模型的有效性，优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种结合上下文和亲和力信息的Transformer模型CATrans，用于解决少样本分割任务中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer方法在处理支持图像与查询图像间的外观和上下文差异时鲁棒性不足，难以有效聚合密集相关性。
AI.method: 设计分层架构，包含关系引导的上下文Transformer（RCT）和亲和力Transformer（RAT）。RCT基于支持特征传播上下文信息，RAT通过自亲和力提升交叉亲和力可靠性。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在少样本分割任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CATrans通过有效整合上下文与亲和力信息，解决了少样本分割中跨图像相关性聚合的难题，推动了该领域的发展。

search_text: CATrans: Context and Affinity Transformer for Few-Shot Segmentation CATrans：用于少镜头分割的上下文和亲和力转换器 Few-shot segmentation (FSS) aims to segment novel categories given scarce annotated support images. The crux of FSS is how to aggregate dense correlations between support and query images for query segmentation while being robust to the large variations in appearance and context. To this end, previous Transformer-based methods explore global consensus either on context similarity or affinity map between support-query pairs. In this work, we effectively integrate the context and affinity information via the proposed novel Context and Affinity Transformer (CATrans) in a hierarchical architecture. Specifically, the Relation-guided Context Transformer (RCT) propagates context information from support to query images conditioned on more informative support features. Based on the observation that a huge feature distinction between support and query pairs brings barriers for context knowledge transfer, the Relation-guided Affinity Transformer (RAT) measures attention-aware affinity as auxiliary information for FSS, in which the self-affinity is responsible for more reliable cross-affinity. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods. 少镜头分割（FSS）旨在在给定稀缺注释支持图像的情况下分割新类别。 FSS 的关键是如何聚合支持图像和查询图像之间的密集相关性以进行查询分割，同时对外观和上下文的巨大变化保持鲁棒性。为此，之前基于 Transformer 的方法探索支持查询对之间的上下文相似性或亲和力图的全局共识。在这项工作中，我们通过分层架构中提出的新颖的上下文和亲和力转换器（CATrans）有效地集成了上下文和亲和力信息。具体来说，关系引导上下文转换器（RCT）将上下文信息从支持传播到以信息更丰富的支持特征为条件的查询图像。基于支持和查询对之间巨大的特征差异给上下文知识迁移带来障碍的观察，关系引导亲和力变换器（RAT）将注意感知亲和力作为 FSS 的辅助信息，其中自亲和力负责更可靠的交叉亲和力。我们进行实验来证明所提出模型的有效性，优于最先进的方法。 该论文提出一种结合上下文和亲和力信息的Transformer模型CATrans，用于解决少样本分割任务中的挑战。 Shan Zhang,Tianyi Wu,Sitong Wu,Guodong Guo cs.CV

authors_text: Spyridon Baxevanakis,Giorgos Kordopatis-Zilos,Panagiotis Galopoulos,Lazaros Apostolidis,Killian Levacher,Ipek B. Schlicht,Denis Teyssou,Ioannis Kompatsiaris,Symeon Papadopoulos
title: The MeVer DeepFake Detection Service: Lessons Learnt from Developing and Deploying in the Wild
title_zh: NeVer DeepFake 检测服务：从实际开发和部署中汲取的经验教训
abstract: Enabled by recent improvements in generation methodologies, DeepFakes have become mainstream due to their increasingly better visual quality, the increase in easy-to-use generation tools and the rapid dissemination through social media. This fact poses a severe threat to our societies with the potential to erode social cohesion and influence our democracies. To mitigate the threat, numerous DeepFake detection schemes have been introduced in the literature but very few provide a web service that can be used in the wild. In this paper, we introduce the MeVer DeepFake detection service, a web service detecting deep learning manipulations in images and video. We present the design and implementation of the proposed processing pipeline that involves a model ensemble scheme, and we endow the service with a model card for transparency. Experimental results show that our service performs robustly on the three benchmark datasets while being vulnerable to Adversarial Attacks. Finally, we outline our experience and lessons learned when deploying a research system into production in the hopes that it will be useful to other academic and industry teams.
summary: Enabled by recent improvements in generation methodologies, DeepFakes have become mainstream due to their increasingly better visual quality, the increase in easy-to-use generation tools and the rapid dissemination through social media. This fact poses a severe threat to our societies with the potential to erode social cohesion and influence our democracies. To mitigate the threat, numerous DeepFake detection schemes have been introduced in the literature but very few provide a web service that can be used in the wild. In this paper, we introduce the MeVer DeepFake detection service, a web service detecting deep learning manipulations in images and video. We present the design and implementation of the proposed processing pipeline that involves a model ensemble scheme, and we endow the service with a model card for transparency. Experimental results show that our service performs robustly on the three benchmark datasets while being vulnerable to Adversarial Attacks. Finally, we outline our experience and lessons learned when deploying a research system into production in the hopes that it will be useful to other academic and industry teams.
abstract_zh: 在生成方法的最新改进的推动下，DeepFakes 因其越来越好的视觉质量、易于使用的生成工具的增加以及通过社交媒体的快速传播而成为主流。这一事实对我们的社会构成了严重威胁，有可能削弱社会凝聚力并影响我们的民主国家。为了减轻威胁，文献中介绍了许多 DeepFake 检测方案，但很少提供可在野外使用的 Web 服务。在本文中，我们介绍了 MeVer DeepFake 检测服务，这是一种检测图像和视频中深度学习操作的 Web 服务。我们展示了所提议的处理管道的设计和实现，其中涉及模型集成方案，并且我们为该服务赋予了模型卡以提高透明度。实验结果表明，我们的服务在三个基准数据集上表现稳健，同时容易受到对抗性攻击。最后，我们概述了将研究系统部署到生产中时吸取的经验和教训，希望对其他学术和行业团队有用。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍MeVer深度伪造检测服务的设计与实现，旨在通过模型集成方案检测图像和视频中的深度伪造内容，并分享部署经验。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造技术因生成质量提升和社交媒体传播而威胁社会凝聚力与民主制度，但现有检测方案缺乏可用的网络服务，亟需有效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用模型集成方案构建检测流水线，并通过模型卡片增强服务透明性，以应对实际部署中的挑战。
AI.result: 实验表明服务在三个基准数据集上表现稳健，但存在对抗攻击漏洞，且部署过程中面临技术与工程化挑战。
AI.conclusion: 通过部署MeVer服务，作者总结了从研究系统到生产环境的实践经验，为学术界和工业界提供参考。

authors_text: Weijie Chen,Yongzhu Chang,Rongsheng Zhang,Jiashu Pu,Guandan Chen,Le Zhang,Yadong Xi,Yijiang Chen,Chang Su
title: Probing Simile Knowledge from Pre-trained Language Models
title_zh: 从预训练的语言模型中探究明喻知识
abstract: Simile interpretation (SI) and simile generation (SG) are challenging tasks for NLP because models require adequate world knowledge to produce predictions. Previous works have employed many hand-crafted resources to bring knowledge-related into models, which is time-consuming and labor-intensive. In recent years, pre-trained language models (PLMs) based approaches have become the de-facto standard in NLP since they learn generic knowledge from a large corpus. The knowledge embedded in PLMs may be useful for SI and SG tasks. Nevertheless, there are few works to explore it. In this paper, we probe simile knowledge from PLMs to solve the SI and SG tasks in the unified framework of simile triple completion for the first time. The backbone of our framework is to construct masked sentences with manual patterns and then predict the candidate words in the masked position. In this framework, we adopt a secondary training process (Adjective-Noun mask Training) with the masked language model (MLM) loss to enhance the prediction diversity of candidate words in the masked position. Moreover, pattern ensemble (PE) and pattern search (PS) are applied to improve the quality of predicted words. Finally, automatic and human evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework in both SI and SG tasks.
summary: Simile interpretation (SI) and simile generation (SG) are challenging tasks for NLP because models require adequate world knowledge to produce predictions. Previous works have employed many hand-crafted resources to bring knowledge-related into models, which is time-consuming and labor-intensive. In recent years, pre-trained language models (PLMs) based approaches have become the de-facto standard in NLP since they learn generic knowledge from a large corpus. The knowledge embedded in PLMs may be useful for SI and SG tasks. Nevertheless, there are few works to explore it. In this paper, we probe simile knowledge from PLMs to solve the SI and SG tasks in the unified framework of simile triple completion for the first time. The backbone of our framework is to construct masked sentences with manual patterns and then predict the candidate words in the masked position. In this framework, we adopt a secondary training process (Adjective-Noun mask Training) with the masked language model (MLM) loss to enhance the prediction diversity of candidate words in the masked position. Moreover, pattern ensemble (PE) and pattern search (PS) are applied to improve the quality of predicted words. Finally, automatic and human evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework in both SI and SG tasks.
abstract_zh: 明喻解释 (SI) 和明喻生成 (SG) 对于 NLP 来说是具有挑战性的任务，因为模型需要足够的世界知识来产生预测。以前的工作使用了许多手工制作的资源将相关知识带入模型中，这既费时又费力。近年来，基于预训练语言模型（PLM）的方法已经成为 NLP 的事实上的标准，因为它们从大型语料库中学习通用知识。 PLM 中嵌入的知识可能对 SI 和 SG 任务有用。然而，对其进行探索的著作却很少。在本文中，我们首次探讨了 PLM 中的明喻知识，以在明喻三重补全的统一框架中解决 SI 和 SG 任务。我们框架的支柱是使用手动模式构建屏蔽句子，然后预测屏蔽位置的候选词。在此框架中，我们采用带有掩码语言模型（MLM）损失的二次训练过程（形容词-名词掩码训练）来增强掩码位置候选词的预测多样性。此外，应用模式集成（PE）和模式搜索（PS）来提高预测词的质量。最后，自动和人工评估证明了我们的框架在 SI 和 SG 任务中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一框架，通过探索单元知识完成隐喻三元组来解决隐喻解释和生成任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖人工构建资源耗时费力，而预训练语言模型（PLMs）蕴含的通用知识尚未被充分用于隐喻任务。
AI.method: 构建带掩码的句式模式，通过二次训练（Adjective-Noun掩码训练）和模式集成/搜索优化候选词预测。
AI.result: 自动评估和人工评估均表明框架在隐喻解释和生成任务中效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 该框架验证了PLMs中隐喻知识的有效性，为隐喻任务提供了无需人工资源的新解决方案。

In this framework, we adopt a secondary training process (Adjective-Noun mask Training) with the masked language model (MLM) loss to enhance the prediction diversity of candidate words in the masked position. Moreover, pattern ensemble (PE) and pattern search (PS) are applied to improve the quality of predicted words. Finally, automatic and human evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework in both SI and SG tasks. 明喻解释 (SI) 和明喻生成 (SG) 对于 NLP 来说是具有挑战性的任务，因为模型需要足够的世界知识来产生预测。以前的工作使用了许多手工制作的资源将相关知识带入模型中，这既费时又费力。近年来，基于预训练语言模型（PLM）的方法已经成为 NLP 的事实上的标准，因为它们从大型语料库中学习通用知识。 PLM 中嵌入的知识可能对 SI 和 SG 任务有用。然而，对其进行探索的著作却很少。在本文中，我们首次探讨了 PLM 中的明喻知识，以在明喻三重补全的统一框架中解决 SI 和 SG 任务。我们框架的支柱是使用手动模式构建屏蔽句子，然后预测屏蔽位置的候选词。在此框架中，我们采用带有掩码语言模型（MLM）损失的二次训练过程（形容词-名词掩码训练）来增强掩码位置候选词的预测多样性。此外，应用模式集成（PE）和模式搜索（PS）来提高预测词的质量。最后，自动和人工评估证明了我们的框架在 SI 和 SG 任务中的有效性。 本文提出一种统一框架，通过探索单元知识完成隐喻三元组来解决隐喻解释和生成任务。 Weijie Chen,Yongzhu Chang,Rongsheng Zhang,Jiashu Pu,Guandan Chen,Le Zhang,Yadong Xi,Yijiang Chen,Chang Su cs.CL,cs.AI

title: A Scalable Combinatorial Solver for Elastic Geometrically Consistent 3D Shape Matching
title_zh: 用于弹性几何一致 3D 形状匹配的可扩展组合求解器
abstract: We present a scalable combinatorial algorithm for globally optimizing over the space of geometrically consistent mappings between 3D shapes. We use the mathematically elegant formalism proposed by Windheuser et al. (ICCV 2011) where 3D shape matching was formulated as an integer linear program over the space of orientation-preserving diffeomorphisms. Until now, the resulting formulation had limited practical applicability due to its complicated constraint structure and its large size. We propose a novel primal heuristic coupled with a Lagrange dual problem that is several orders of magnitudes faster compared to previous solvers. This allows us to handle shapes with substantially more triangles than previously solvable. We demonstrate compelling results on diverse datasets, and, even showcase that we can address the challenging setting of matching two partial shapes without availability of complete shapes. Our code is publicly available at http://github.com/paul0noah/sm-comb .
summary: We present a scalable combinatorial algorithm for globally optimizing over the space of geometrically consistent mappings between 3D shapes. We use the mathematically elegant formalism proposed by Windheuser et al. (ICCV 2011) where 3D shape matching was formulated as an integer linear program over the space of orientation-preserving diffeomorphisms. Until now, the resulting formulation had limited practical applicability due to its complicated constraint structure and its large size. We propose a novel primal heuristic coupled with a Lagrange dual problem that is several orders of magnitudes faster compared to previous solvers. This allows us to handle shapes with substantially more triangles than previously solvable. We demonstrate compelling results on diverse datasets, and, even showcase that we can address the challenging setting of matching two partial shapes without availability of complete shapes. Our code is publicly available at http://github.com/paul0noah/sm-comb .
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种可扩展的组合算法，用于在 3D 形状之间的几何一致映射空间上进行全局优化。我们使用 Windheuser 等人提出的数学上优雅的形式主义。 (ICCV 2011)，其中 3D 形状匹配被表述为在方向保持微分同胚空间上的整数线性程序。迄今为止，由于约束结构复杂且尺寸大，所得公式的实际适用性有限。我们提出了一种新颖的原始启发式与拉格朗日对偶问题相结合，与以前的求解器相比，速度快了几个数量级。这使我们能够处理具有比以前可解更多的三角形的形状。我们在不同的数据集上展示了令人信服的结果，甚至展示了我们可以在没有完整形状的情况下解决匹配两个部分形状的挑战性设置。我们的代码可在 http://github.com/paul0noah/sm-comb 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的组合优化算法，用于在几何一致映射空间中全局优化3D形状匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于整数线性规划的3D形状匹配方法因约束结构复杂和规模大，难以实际应用，需更高效的求解方案。
AI.method: 设计新型原始启发式算法结合拉格朗日对偶问题，显著提升求解速度，支持处理更大规模三角形数据。
AI.result: 在多样化数据集上验证有效性，成功处理部分形状匹配难题，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在计算效率和适用范围上实现突破，为复杂3D形状匹配提供可行解决方案。

title: GTNet: A Tree-Based Deep Graph Learning Architecture
title_zh: GTNet：基于树的深度图学习架构
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
comments: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
abstract: We propose Graph Tree Networks (GTNets), a deep graph learning architecture with a new general message passing scheme that originates from the tree representation of graphs. In the tree representation, messages propagate upward from the leaf nodes to the root node, and each node preserves its initial information prior to receiving information from its child nodes (neighbors). We formulate a general propagation rule following the nature of message passing in the tree to update a node's feature by aggregating its initial feature and its neighbor nodes' updated features. Two graph representation learning models are proposed within this GTNet architecture - Graph Tree Attention Network (GTAN) and Graph Tree Convolution Network (GTCN), with experimentally demonstrated state-of-the-art performance on several popular benchmark datasets. Unlike the vanilla Graph Attention Network (GAT) and Graph Convolution Network (GCN) which have the "over-smoothing" issue, the proposed GTAN and GTCN models can go deep as demonstrated by comprehensive experiments and rigorous theoretical analysis.
summary: We propose Graph Tree Networks (GTNets), a deep graph learning architecture with a new general message passing scheme that originates from the tree representation of graphs. In the tree representation, messages propagate upward from the leaf nodes to the root node, and each node preserves its initial information prior to receiving information from its child nodes (neighbors). We formulate a general propagation rule following the nature of message passing in the tree to update a node's feature by aggregating its initial feature and its neighbor nodes' updated features. Two graph representation learning models are proposed within this GTNet architecture - Graph Tree Attention Network (GTAN) and Graph Tree Convolution Network (GTCN), with experimentally demonstrated state-of-the-art performance on several popular benchmark datasets. Unlike the vanilla Graph Attention Network (GAT) and Graph Convolution Network (GCN) which have the "over-smoothing" issue, the proposed GTAN and GTCN models can go deep as demonstrated by comprehensive experiments and rigorous theoretical analysis.
abstract_zh: 我们提出图树网络（GTNets），这是一种深度图学习架构，具有源自图的树表示的新通用消息传递方案。在树表示中，消息从叶节点向上传播到根节点，并且每个节点在从其子节点（邻居）接收信息之前保留其初始信息。我们根据树中消息传递的性质制定了通用传播规则，通过聚合节点的初始特征及其邻居节点的更新特征来更新节点的特征。在此 GTNet 架构中提出了两种图表示学习模型 - 图树注意力网络 (GTAN) 和图树卷积网络 (GTCN)，并在几个流行的基准数据集上通过实验证明了最先进的性能。与普通的图注意力网络（GAT）和图卷积网络（GCN）存在“过度平滑”问题不同，所提出的 GTAN 和 GTCN 模型可以通过全面的实验和严格的理论分析进行深入研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于树结构的深度图学习架构GTNet，通过改进消息传递机制解决现有图神经网络的过平滑问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图注意力网络（GAT）和图卷积网络（GCN）在深度增加时易出现过平滑现象，限制了模型性能。本文旨在通过树结构的消息传递机制提升图学习效果。
AI.method: 基于图的树表示，设计自底向上的消息传播方案：叶节点信息向根节点传递，节点在聚合邻居更新特征前保留初始特征。提出两种模型——图树注意力网络（GTAN）和图树卷积网络（GTCN）。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，GTAN和GTCN达到当时最先进的性能，且相比GAT/GCN有效缓解了过平滑问题。
AI.conclusion: GTNet通过树结构消息传递机制成功解决了图神经网络的深度扩展难题，理论分析与实验验证了其有效性。

title: Speeding Hirschberg Algorithm for Sequence Alignment
title_zh: 用于序列比对的加速 Hirschberg 算法
abstract: The use of Hirschberg algorithm reduces the spatial cost of recovering the Longest Common Subsequence to linear space. The same technique can be applied to similar problems like Sequence Alignment. However, the price to pay is a duplication of temporal cost. We present here a technique to reduce this time overhead to a negligible amount.
summary: The use of Hirschberg algorithm reduces the spatial cost of recovering the Longest Common Subsequence to linear space. The same technique can be applied to similar problems like Sequence Alignment. However, the price to pay is a duplication of temporal cost. We present here a technique to reduce this time overhead to a negligible amount.
abstract_zh: Hirschberg算法的使用降低了将最长公共子序列恢复到线性空间的空间成本。相同的技术可以应用于类似的问题，例如序列比对。然而，付出的代价是时间成本的重复。我们在这里提出一种技术，可以将时间开销减少到可以忽略不计的程度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种优化Hirschberg算法的方法，以降低序列比对中的时间开销，同时保持线性空间复杂度。
AI.motivation: Hirschberg算法虽然将最长公共子序列问题的空间复杂度降至线性，但导致时间复杂度翻倍，影响实际应用效率。
AI.method: 通过改进Hirschberg算法的分治策略，减少重复计算的冗余步骤，从而降低时间开销。
AI.result: 成功将时间开销的增加幅度降至可忽略范围，实现了空间效率与时间效率的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了Hirschberg算法的时间成本问题，为大规模序列比对提供了更高效的解决方案。

method: 通过改进Hirschberg算法的分治策略，减少重复计算的冗余步骤，从而降低时间开销。
result: 成功将时间开销的增加幅度降至可忽略范围，实现了空间效率与时间效率的平衡。
conclusion: 该方法有效解决了Hirschberg算法的时间成本问题，为大规模序列比对提供了更高效的解决方案。
search_text: Speeding Hirschberg Algorithm for Sequence Alignment 用于序列比对的加速 Hirschberg 算法 The use of Hirschberg algorithm reduces the spatial cost of recovering the Longest Common Subsequence to linear space. The same technique can be applied to similar problems like Sequence Alignment. However, the price to pay is a duplication of temporal cost. We present here a technique to reduce this time overhead to a negligible amount. Hirschberg算法的使用降低了将最长公共子序列恢复到线性空间的空间成本。相同的技术可以应用于类似的问题，例如序列比对。然而，付出的代价是时间成本的重复。我们在这里提出一种技术，可以将时间开销减少到可以忽略不计的程度。 本文提出了一种优化Hirschberg算法的方法，以降低序列比对中的时间开销，同时保持线性空间复杂度。 David Llorens,Juan Miguel Vilar cs.DS

authors_text: Lvxiaowei Xu,Xiaoxuan Pang,Jianwang Wu,Ming Cai,Jiawei Peng
title: Learn from Structural Scope: Improving Aspect-Level Sentiment Analysis with Hybrid Graph Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 从结构范围中学习：使用混合图卷积网络改进方面级情感分析
abstract: Aspect-level sentiment analysis aims to determine the sentiment polarity towards a specific target in a sentence. The main challenge of this task is to effectively model the relation between targets and sentiments so as to filter out noisy opinion words from irrelevant targets. Most recent efforts capture relations through target-sentiment pairs or opinion spans from a word-level or phrase-level perspective. Based on the observation that targets and sentiments essentially establish relations following the grammatical hierarchy of phrase-clause-sentence structure, it is hopeful to exploit comprehensive syntactic information for better guiding the learning process. Therefore, we introduce the concept of Scope, which outlines a structural text region related to a specific target. To jointly learn structural Scope and predict the sentiment polarity, we propose a hybrid graph convolutional network (HGCN) to synthesize information from constituency tree and dependency tree, exploring the potential of linking two syntax parsing methods to enrich the representation. Experimental results on four public datasets illustrate that our HGCN model outperforms current state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Aspect-level sentiment analysis aims to determine the sentiment polarity towards a specific target in a sentence. The main challenge of this task is to effectively model the relation between targets and sentiments so as to filter out noisy opinion words from irrelevant targets. Most recent efforts capture relations through target-sentiment pairs or opinion spans from a word-level or phrase-level perspective. Based on the observation that targets and sentiments essentially establish relations following the grammatical hierarchy of phrase-clause-sentence structure, it is hopeful to exploit comprehensive syntactic information for better guiding the learning process. Therefore, we introduce the concept of Scope, which outlines a structural text region related to a specific target. To jointly learn structural Scope and predict the sentiment polarity, we propose a hybrid graph convolutional network (HGCN) to synthesize information from constituency tree and dependency tree, exploring the potential of linking two syntax parsing methods to enrich the representation. Experimental results on four public datasets illustrate that our HGCN model outperforms current state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 方面级情感分析旨在确定句子中针对特定目标的情感极性。该任务的主要挑战是有效地对目标和情绪之间的关系进行建模，以过滤掉不相关目标中的嘈杂意见词。最近的大多数工作都是从单词级或短语级的角度通过目标情感对或意见范围来捕获关系。基于目标和情感本质上按照短语-从句-句子结构的语法层次结构建立关系的观察，希望利用全面的句法信息来更好地指导学习过程。因此，我们引入了Scope的概念，它勾勒出与特定目标相关的结构文本区域。为了共同学习结构范围并预测情感极性，我们提出了一种混合图卷积网络（HGCN）来合成来自选区树和依赖树的信息，探索连接两种语法解析方法以丰富表示的潜力。四个公共数据集的实验结果表明，我们的 HGCN 模型优于当前最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过结构化范围建模，提升方面级情感分析的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在词或短语级别处理目标与情感关系时，未能有效利用语法结构信息，导致噪音干扰。
AI.method: 提出混合图卷积网络（HGCN），结合短语结构树与依存树，通过结构化范围（Scope）建模增强语法信息整合。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上，HGCN模型性能优于当前最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构化范围与混合图卷积网络能有效捕捉语法层次信息，为方面级情感分析提供新思路。

title: A Branch-and-Price Approach to a Variant of the Cognitive Radio Resource Allocation Problem
title_zh: 认知无线电资源分配问题变体的分支与价格方法
abstract: Radio-frequency portion of the electromagnetic spectrum is a scarce resource. Cognitive radio technology has emerged as a promising solution to overcome the spectrum scarcity bottleneck. Through this technology, secondary users (SUs) sense the spectrum opportunities free from primary users (PUs), and opportunistically take advantage of these (temporarily) idle portions, known as spectrum holes. In this correspondence, we consider a variant of the cognitive radio resource allocation problem posed by Martinovic et al. in 2017. The distinguishing feature of this version of the problem is that each SU, due to its hardware limitations, imposes the requirement that the to-be-aggregated spectrum holes cannot be arbitrarily far from each other. We call this restriction as the Maximal Aggregation Range (MAR) constraint, and refer to this variant of the problem as the MAR-constrained hole assignment problem. The problem can be formalized as an NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem. We propose a novel binary integer linear programming (ILP) formulation to the problem. The number of constraints in this formulation is the number of spectrum holes plus the number of SUs. On the other hand, the number of binary decision variables in the formulation can be prohibitively large, as for each legitimate spectrum allocation to each SU, one variable is needed. We propose a branch-and-price (B&P) framework to tackle this challenge. This framework is in fact a branch-and-bound procedure in which at each node of the search tree, we utilize the so-called (delayed) column generation technique for solving the LP relaxation of the corresponding subproblem. As evidenced by the numerical results, the LP relaxation bounds are very tight. This allows for a very effective pruning of the search space. Compared to the previously suggested formulations, the proposed technique can require much less computational effort.
summary: Radio-frequency portion of the electromagnetic spectrum is a scarce resource. Cognitive radio technology has emerged as a promising solution to overcome the spectrum scarcity bottleneck. Through this technology, secondary users (SUs) sense the spectrum opportunities free from primary users (PUs), and opportunistically take advantage of these (temporarily) idle portions, known as spectrum holes. In this correspondence, we consider a variant of the cognitive radio resource allocation problem posed by Martinovic et al. in 2017. The distinguishing feature of this version of the problem is that each SU, due to its hardware limitations, imposes the requirement that the to-be-aggregated spectrum holes cannot be arbitrarily far from each other. We call this restriction as the Maximal Aggregation Range (MAR) constraint, and refer to this variant of the problem as the MAR-constrained hole assignment problem. The problem can be formalized as an NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem. We propose a novel binary integer linear programming (ILP) formulation to the problem. The number of constraints in this formulation is the number of spectrum holes plus the number of SUs. On the other hand, the number of binary decision variables in the formulation can be prohibitively large, as for each legitimate spectrum allocation to each SU, one variable is needed. We propose a branch-and-price (B&P) framework to tackle this challenge. This framework is in fact a branch-and-bound procedure in which at each node of the search tree, we utilize the so-called (delayed) column generation technique for solving the LP relaxation of the corresponding subproblem. As evidenced by the numerical results, the LP relaxation bounds are very tight. This allows for a very effective pruning of the search space. Compared to the previously suggested formulations, the proposed technique can require much less computational effort.
abstract_zh: 电磁频谱的射频部分是稀缺资源。认知无线电技术已成为克服频谱稀缺瓶颈的有前景的解决方案。通过这项技术，次要用户 (SU) 感知到主要用户 (PU) 没有的频谱机会，并伺机利用这些（暂时）空闲部分（称为频谱空洞）。在这篇文章中，我们考虑了 Martinovic 等人提出的认知无线电资源分配问题的一种变体。 2017年。这个版本问题的显着特征是，每个SU由于其硬件限制，都要求待聚合的频谱空洞彼此之间不能任意远离。我们将此限制称为最大聚合范围 (MAR) 约束，并将问题的这种变体称为 MAR 约束空洞分配问题。该问题可以形式化为 NP 难组合优化问题。我们针对该问题提出了一种新颖的二进制整数线性规划（ILP）公式。该公式中的约束数量是频谱空洞的数量加上 SU 的数量。另一方面，公式中二元决策变量的数量可能非常大，因为对于每个 SU 的每个合法频谱分配都需要一个变量。我们提出了一个分支与价格 (B&P) 框架来应对这一挑战。该框架实际上是一个分支定界过程，其中在搜索树的每个节点，我们利用所谓的（延迟）列生成技术来解决相应子问题的LP松弛。数值结果证明，LP 松弛界限非常严格。这可以非常有效地修剪搜索空间。与之前建议的公式相比，所提出的技术需要更少的计算工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分支定界和列生成的算法，解决具有最大聚合范围约束的认知无线电频谱分配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统频谱分配方法在处理次级用户硬件限制导致的频谱空洞聚合范围约束时，面临变量爆炸和计算效率低下的问题。
AI.method: 构建包含频谱空洞数与用户数之和约束的二进制整数规划模型，并采用分支定界框架结合延迟列生成技术求解线性松弛问题。
AI.result: 数值实验表明该方法的线性松弛界紧致有效，显著减少搜索空间，相比现有方法降低计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分支定价框架为处理MAR约束的认知无线电资源分配问题提供了高效可行的求解方案。

authors_text: Sanyuan Chen,Yu Wu,Zhuo Chen,Jian Wu,Takuya Yoshioka,Shujie Liu,Jinyu Li,Xiangzhan Yu
title: Ultra Fast Speech Separation Model with Teacher Student Learning
title_zh: 师生学习的超快速语音分离模型
abstract: Transformer has been successfully applied to speech separation recently with its strong long-dependency modeling capacity using a self-attention mechanism. However, Transformer tends to have heavy run-time costs due to the deep encoder layers, which hinders its deployment on edge devices. A small Transformer model with fewer encoder layers is preferred for computational efficiency, but it is prone to performance degradation. In this paper, an ultra fast speech separation Transformer model is proposed to achieve both better performance and efficiency with teacher student learning (T-S learning). We introduce layer-wise T-S learning and objective shifting mechanisms to guide the small student model to learn intermediate representations from the large teacher model. Compared with the small Transformer model trained from scratch, the proposed T-S learning method reduces the word error rate (WER) by more than 5% for both multi-channel and single-channel speech separation on LibriCSS dataset. Utilizing more unlabeled speech data, our ultra fast speech separation models achieve more than 10% relative WER reduction.
summary: Transformer has been successfully applied to speech separation recently with its strong long-dependency modeling capacity using a self-attention mechanism. However, Transformer tends to have heavy run-time costs due to the deep encoder layers, which hinders its deployment on edge devices. A small Transformer model with fewer encoder layers is preferred for computational efficiency, but it is prone to performance degradation. In this paper, an ultra fast speech separation Transformer model is proposed to achieve both better performance and efficiency with teacher student learning (T-S learning). We introduce layer-wise T-S learning and objective shifting mechanisms to guide the small student model to learn intermediate representations from the large teacher model. Compared with the small Transformer model trained from scratch, the proposed T-S learning method reduces the word error rate (WER) by more than 5% for both multi-channel and single-channel speech separation on LibriCSS dataset. Utilizing more unlabeled speech data, our ultra fast speech separation models achieve more than 10% relative WER reduction.
abstract_zh: Transformer 最近凭借其强大的使用自注意力机制的长依赖建模能力已成功应用于语音分离。然而，由于编码器层较深，Transformer 往往会产生较高的运行时成本，这阻碍了其在边缘设备上的部署。考虑到计算效率，编码器层数较少的小型 Transformer 模型是首选，但它很容易出现性能下降。本文提出了一种超快速语音分离 Transformer 模型，以通过教师学生学习（T-S 学习）实现更好的性能和效率。我们引入分层 T-S 学习和目标转移机制来引导小型学生模型从大型教师模型中学习中间表示。与从头开始训练的小型 Transformer 模型相比，所提出的 T-S 学习方法在 LibriCSS 数据集上的多通道和单通道语音分离中，单词错误率 (WER) 降低了 5% 以上。利用更多未标记的语音数据，我们的超快速语音分离模型实现了 10% 以上的相对 WER 降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合教师-学生学习的超快速语音分离模型，旨在提升小规模Transformer模型的性能与计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer模型因深层结构导致计算成本高，难以部署于边缘设备；小型化模型虽效率高但性能下降明显，需寻求性能与效率的平衡方案。
AI.method: 引入层-wise教师-学生学习机制与目标转移策略，引导小型学生模型学习大型教师模型的中间表示，结合更多未标注数据优化模型。
AI.result: 在LibriCSS数据集上，相较从头训练的小型模型，该方法使词错误率（WER）降低超5%；利用未标注数据后，相对WER进一步减少10%。
AI.conclusion: 教师-学生学习有效提升小型模型性能，为资源受限场景下的高效语音分离提供可行方案。
