search_text: Ultra Fast Speech Separation Model with Teacher Student Learning 师生学习的超快速语音分离模型 Transformer has been successfully applied to speech separation recently with its strong long-dependency modeling capacity using a self-attention mechanism. However, Transformer tends to have heavy run-time costs due to the deep encoder layers, which hinders its deployment on edge devices. A small Transformer model with fewer encoder layers is preferred for computational efficiency, but it is prone to performance degradation. In this paper, an ultra fast speech separation Transformer model is proposed to achieve both better performance and efficiency with teacher student learning (T-S learning). We introduce layer-wise T-S learning and objective shifting mechanisms to guide the small student model to learn intermediate representations from the large teacher model. Compared with the small Transformer model trained from scratch, the proposed T-S learning method reduces the word error rate (WER) by more than 5% for both multi-channel and single-channel speech separation on LibriCSS dataset. Utilizing more unlabeled speech data, our ultra fast speech separation models achieve more than 10% relative WER reduction. Transformer 最近凭借其强大的使用自注意力机制的长依赖建模能力已成功应用于语音分离。然而，由于编码器层较深，Transformer 往往会产生较高的运行时成本，这阻碍了其在边缘设备上的部署。考虑到计算效率，编码器层数较少的小型 Transformer 模型是首选，但它很容易出现性能下降。本文提出了一种超快速语音分离 Transformer 模型，以通过教师学生学习（T-S 学习）实现更好的性能和效率。我们引入分层 T-S 学习和目标转移机制来引导小型学生模型从大型教师模型中学习中间表示。与从头开始训练的小型 Transformer 模型相比，所提出的 T-S 学习方法在 LibriCSS 数据集上的多通道和单通道语音分离中，单词错误率 (WER) 降低了 5% 以上。利用更多未标记的语音数据，我们的超快速语音分离模型实现了 10% 以上的相对 WER 降低。 本文提出一种结合教师-学生学习的超快速语音分离模型，旨在提升小规模Transformer模型的性能与计算效率。 Sanyuan Chen,Yu Wu,Zhuo Chen,Jian Wu,Takuya Yoshioka,Shujie Liu,Jinyu Li,Xiangzhan Yu eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

title: Run Time Analysis for Random Local Search on Generalized Majority Functions
title_zh: 广义多数函数随机局部搜索的运行时分析
abstract: Run time analysis of evolutionary algorithms recently makes significant progress in linking algorithm performance to algorithm parameters. However, settings that study the impact of problem parameters are rare. The recently proposed W-model provides a good framework for such analyses, generating pseudo-Boolean optimization problems with tunable properties. We initiate theoretical research of the W-model by studying how one of its properties -- neutrality -- influences the run time of random local search. Neutrality creates plateaus in the search space by first performing a majority vote for subsets of the solution candidate and then evaluating the smaller-dimensional string via a low-level fitness function. We prove upper bounds for the expected run time of random local search on this MAJORITY problem for its entire parameter spectrum. To this end, we provide a theorem, applicable to many optimization algorithms, that links the run time of MAJORITY with its symmetric version HASMAJORITY, where a sufficient majority is needed to optimize the subset. We also introduce a generalized version of classic drift theorems as well as a generalized version of Wald's equation, both of which we believe to be of independent interest.
summary: Run time analysis of evolutionary algorithms recently makes significant progress in linking algorithm performance to algorithm parameters. However, settings that study the impact of problem parameters are rare. The recently proposed W-model provides a good framework for such analyses, generating pseudo-Boolean optimization problems with tunable properties. We initiate theoretical research of the W-model by studying how one of its properties -- neutrality -- influences the run time of random local search. Neutrality creates plateaus in the search space by first performing a majority vote for subsets of the solution candidate and then evaluating the smaller-dimensional string via a low-level fitness function. We prove upper bounds for the expected run time of random local search on this MAJORITY problem for its entire parameter spectrum. To this end, we provide a theorem, applicable to many optimization algorithms, that links the run time of MAJORITY with its symmetric version HASMAJORITY, where a sufficient majority is needed to optimize the subset. We also introduce a generalized version of classic drift theorems as well as a generalized version of Wald's equation, both of which we believe to be of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 进化算法的运行时分析最近在将算法性能与算法参数联系起来方面取得了重大进展。然而，研究问题参数影响的设置很少。最近提出的 W 模型为此类分析提供了一个良好的框架，生成具有可调属性的伪布尔优化问题。我们通过研究 W 模型的属性之一（中立性）如何影响随机局部搜索的运行时间来启动 W 模型的理论研究。中立性首先对候选解决方案的子集进行多数投票，然后通过低级适应度函数评估较小维的字符串，从而在搜索空间中形成平台。我们证明了这个 MAJORITY 问题的整个参数谱的随机局部搜索的预期运行时间的上限。为此，我们提供了一个适用于许多优化算法的定理，它将 MAJORITY 的运行时间与其对称版本 HASMAJORITY 联系起来，其中需要足够的多数来优化子集。我们还介绍了经典漂移定理的广义版本以及 Wald 方程的广义版本，我们认为这两者具有独立的意义。

AI.tldr: 本文研究随机局部搜索（RLS）在广义多数函数上的运行时间分析，重点探讨W模型中中性特性对算法性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管进化算法的运行时间分析已取得进展，但针对问题参数影响的研究仍较少。W模型提供了可调节问题特性的框架，因此本文旨在通过该模型分析中性特性对RLS运行时间的影响。
AI.method: 基于W模型构建伪布尔优化问题，通过理论分析证明RLS在MAJORITY问题上的运行时间上界，并引入广义漂移定理和沃尔德方程以支持分析。
AI.result: 为整个参数范围内的MAJORITY问题提供了运行时间上界，建立了MAJORITY与HASMAJORITY问题的关联定理，并提出了两个具有独立价值的数学工具。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了中性特性对RLS性能的影响机制，为理解问题参数与算法效率的关系提供了理论支持，同时扩展了运行时间分析的工具集。

authors_text: Wenyu Li,Xinyu Zhang,Zijun Wang,Shichun Guo,Nan Qiu,Jun Li
title: Dynamic Registration: Joint Ego Motion Estimation and 3D Moving Object Detection in Dynamic Environment
title_zh: 动态配准：动态环境中的联合自我运动估计和 3D 运动物体检测
abstract: Localization in a dynamic environment suffers from moving objects. Removing dynamic object is crucial in this situation but become tricky when ego-motion is coupled. In this paper, instead of proposing a new slam framework, we aim at a more general strategy for a localization scenario. In that case, Dynamic Registration is available for integrating with any lidar slam system. We utilize 3D object detection to obtain potential moving objects and remove them temporarily. Then we proposed Dynamic Registration, to iteratively estimate ego-motion and segment moving objects until no static object generates. Static objects are merged with the environment. Finally, we successfully segment dynamic objects, static environments with static objects, and ego-motion estimation in a dynamic environment. We evaluate the performance of our proposed method on KITTI Tracking datasets. Results show stable and consistent improvements based on other classical registration algorithms.
summary: Localization in a dynamic environment suffers from moving objects. Removing dynamic object is crucial in this situation but become tricky when ego-motion is coupled. In this paper, instead of proposing a new slam framework, we aim at a more general strategy for a localization scenario. In that case, Dynamic Registration is available for integrating with any lidar slam system. We utilize 3D object detection to obtain potential moving objects and remove them temporarily. Then we proposed Dynamic Registration, to iteratively estimate ego-motion and segment moving objects until no static object generates. Static objects are merged with the environment. Finally, we successfully segment dynamic objects, static environments with static objects, and ego-motion estimation in a dynamic environment. We evaluate the performance of our proposed method on KITTI Tracking datasets. Results show stable and consistent improvements based on other classical registration algorithms.
abstract_zh: 动态环境中的定位会受到移动物体的影响。在这种情况下，移除动态对象至关重要，但当自我运动耦合时就会变得棘手。在本文中，我们不是提出一个新的 slam 框架，而是针对本地化场景提出一个更通用的策略。在这种情况下，动态配准可与任何激光雷达 SLAM 系统集成。我们利用 3D 物体检测来获取潜在的移动物体并暂时将其移除。然后我们提出了动态配准，以迭代地估计自我运动并分割移动对象，直到没有静态对象生成。静态对象与环境合并。最后，我们成功地分割了动态对象、具有静态对象的静态环境以及动态环境中的自我运动估计。我们评估了我们提出的方法在 KITTI 跟踪数据集上的性能。结果显示基于其他经典配准算法的稳定且一致的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用的动态注册方法，用于动态环境中的自我运动估计和3D移动物体检测，可集成至任意LiDAR SLAM系统。
AI.motivation: 动态环境中的定位受移动物体干扰，传统方法难以处理自我运动与动态物体的耦合问题，需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用3D目标检测识别动态物体并临时移除，通过动态注册迭代估计自我运动与分割动态物体，直至静态环境稳定，最终合并静态物体。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上验证，相比经典注册算法实现稳定且一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 成功实现动态物体分割、静态环境建模及自我运动估计，方法通用性强且适用于动态环境下的SLAM系统。

search_text: Dynamic Registration: Joint Ego Motion Estimation and 3D Moving Object Detection in Dynamic Environment 动态配准：动态环境中的联合自我运动估计和 3D 运动物体检测 Localization in a dynamic environment suffers from moving objects. Removing dynamic object is crucial in this situation but become tricky when ego-motion is coupled. In this paper, instead of proposing a new slam framework, we aim at a more general strategy for a localization scenario. In that case, Dynamic Registration is available for integrating with any lidar slam system. We utilize 3D object detection to obtain potential moving objects and remove them temporarily. Then we proposed Dynamic Registration, to iteratively estimate ego-motion and segment moving objects until no static object generates. Static objects are merged with the environment. Finally, we successfully segment dynamic objects, static environments with static objects, and ego-motion estimation in a dynamic environment. We evaluate the performance of our proposed method on KITTI Tracking datasets. Results show stable and consistent improvements based on other classical registration algorithms. 动态环境中的定位会受到移动物体的影响。在这种情况下，移除动态对象至关重要，但当自我运动耦合时就会变得棘手。在本文中，我们不是提出一个新的 slam 框架，而是针对本地化场景提出一个更通用的策略。在这种情况下，动态配准可与任何激光雷达 SLAM 系统集成。我们利用 3D 物体检测来获取潜在的移动物体并暂时将其移除。然后我们提出了动态配准，以迭代地估计自我运动并分割移动对象，直到没有静态对象生成。静态对象与环境合并。最后，我们成功地分割了动态对象、具有静态对象的静态环境以及动态环境中的自我运动估计。我们评估了我们提出的方法在 KITTI 跟踪数据集上的性能。结果显示基于其他经典配准算法的稳定且一致的改进。 本文提出一种通用的动态注册方法，用于动态环境中的自我运动估计和3D移动物体检测，可集成至任意LiDAR SLAM系统。 Wenyu Li,Xinyu Zhang,Zijun Wang,Shichun Guo,Nan Qiu,Jun Li cs.RO

title: Masked Spectrogram Prediction For Self-Supervised Audio Pre-Training
title_zh: 用于自监督音频预训练的掩蔽频谱图预测
abstract: Transformer-based models attain excellent results and generalize well when trained on sufficient amounts of data. However, constrained by the limited data available in the audio domain, most transformer-based models for audio tasks are finetuned from pre-trained models in other domains (e.g. image), which has a notable gap with the audio domain. Other methods explore the self-supervised learning approaches directly in the audio domain but currently do not perform well in the downstream tasks. In this paper, we present a novel self-supervised learning method for transformer-based audio models, called masked spectrogram prediction (MaskSpec), to learn powerful audio representations from unlabeled audio data (AudioSet used in this paper). Our method masks random patches of the input spectrogram and reconstructs the masked regions with an encoder-decoder architecture. Without using extra model weights or supervision, experimental results on multiple downstream datasets demonstrate MaskSpec achieves a significant performance gain against the supervised methods and outperforms the previous pre-trained models. In particular, our best model reaches the performance of 0.471 (mAP) on AudioSet, 0.854 (mAP) on OpenMIC2018, 0.982 (accuracy) on ESC-50, 0.976 (accuracy) on SCV2, and 0.823 (accuracy) on DCASE2019 Task1A respectively.
summary: Transformer-based models attain excellent results and generalize well when trained on sufficient amounts of data. However, constrained by the limited data available in the audio domain, most transformer-based models for audio tasks are finetuned from pre-trained models in other domains (e.g. image), which has a notable gap with the audio domain. Other methods explore the self-supervised learning approaches directly in the audio domain but currently do not perform well in the downstream tasks. In this paper, we present a novel self-supervised learning method for transformer-based audio models, called masked spectrogram prediction (MaskSpec), to learn powerful audio representations from unlabeled audio data (AudioSet used in this paper). Our method masks random patches of the input spectrogram and reconstructs the masked regions with an encoder-decoder architecture. Without using extra model weights or supervision, experimental results on multiple downstream datasets demonstrate MaskSpec achieves a significant performance gain against the supervised methods and outperforms the previous pre-trained models. In particular, our best model reaches the performance of 0.471 (mAP) on AudioSet, 0.854 (mAP) on OpenMIC2018, 0.982 (accuracy) on ESC-50, 0.976 (accuracy) on SCV2, and 0.823 (accuracy) on DCASE2019 Task1A respectively.
abstract_zh: 当基于足够数量的数据进行训练时，基于 Transformer 的模型可以获得出色的结果并具有良好的泛化能力。然而，受音频领域可用数据有限的限制，大多数基于 Transformer 的音频任务模型都是根据其他领域（例如图像）中的预训练模型进行微调的，这与音频领域存在显着差距。其他方法直接在音频领域探索自监督学习方法，但目前在下游任务中表现不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的音频模型的新型自监督学习方法，称为掩蔽频谱图预测（MaskSpec），用于从未标记的音频数据（本文中使用的 AudioSet）中学习强大的音频表示。我们的方法屏蔽输入频谱图的随机补丁，并使用编码器-解码器架构重建屏蔽区域。在不使用额外的模型权重或监督的情况下，多个下游数据集上的实验结果表明，MaskSpec 相对于监督方法取得了显着的性能提升，并且优于之前的预训练模型。特别是，我们的最佳模型在 AudioSet 上分别达到了 0.471（mAP）、OpenMIC2018 上 0.854（mAP）、ESC-50 上 0.982（准确度）、SCV2 上 0.976（准确度）和 DCASE2019 Task1A 上 0.823（准确度）的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MaskSpec的自监督学习方法，通过掩码频谱图预测来预训练音频模型，以提升音频表示能力。
AI.motivation: 音频领域数据有限，现有模型多依赖其他领域预训练，存在领域差距；直接使用的自监督方法在下游任务中效果不佳，需更有效的自监督方案。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构，随机掩码输入频谱图的局部区域并重建，无需额外监督或模型权重。
AI.result: 在AudioSet、OpenMIC2018等数据集上，MaskSpec分别达到0.471 mAP、0.854 mAP、0.982准确率等指标，优于监督方法和先前预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: MaskSpec通过掩码频谱预测有效学习音频表示，在多个下游任务中显著提升性能，证明了该自监督方法的优越性。

authors_text: Sanyuan Chen,Yu Wu,Chengyi Wang,Shujie Liu,Zhuo Chen,Peidong Wang,Gang Liu,Jinyu Li,Jian Wu,Xiangzhan Yu,Furu Wei
title: Why does Self-Supervised Learning for Speech Recognition Benefit Speaker Recognition?
title_zh: 为什么语音识别的自监督学习有利于说话人识别？
abstract: Recently, self-supervised learning (SSL) has demonstrated strong performance in speaker recognition, even if the pre-training objective is designed for speech recognition. In this paper, we study which factor leads to the success of self-supervised learning on speaker-related tasks, e.g. speaker verification (SV), through a series of carefully designed experiments. Our empirical results on the Voxceleb-1 dataset suggest that the benefit of SSL to SV task is from a combination of mask speech prediction loss, data scale, and model size, while the SSL quantizer has a minor impact. We further employ the integrated gradients attribution method and loss landscape visualization to understand the effectiveness of self-supervised learning for speaker recognition performance.
summary: Recently, self-supervised learning (SSL) has demonstrated strong performance in speaker recognition, even if the pre-training objective is designed for speech recognition. In this paper, we study which factor leads to the success of self-supervised learning on speaker-related tasks, e.g. speaker verification (SV), through a series of carefully designed experiments. Our empirical results on the Voxceleb-1 dataset suggest that the benefit of SSL to SV task is from a combination of mask speech prediction loss, data scale, and model size, while the SSL quantizer has a minor impact. We further employ the integrated gradients attribution method and loss landscape visualization to understand the effectiveness of self-supervised learning for speaker recognition performance.
abstract_zh: 最近，自监督学习（SSL）在说话人识别方面表现出了强大的性能，即使预训练目标是为语音识别而设计的。在本文中，我们研究了哪些因素导致自我监督学习在与说话者相关的任务上取得成功，例如，说话人验证（SV），通过一系列精心设计的实验。我们在 Voxceleb-1 数据集上的实证结果表明，SSL 到 SV 任务的好处来自于掩码语音预测损失、数据规模和模型大小的组合，而 SSL 量化器的影响较小。我们进一步采用集成梯度归因方法和损失景观可视化来了解自监督学习对说话人识别性能的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究自监督学习（SSL）在说话人识别任务中的成功因素，通过实验分析其关键影响因素。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习在语音识别预训练下对说话人识别表现优异，但其成功机制尚未明确，需系统性探究关键因素。
AI.method: 在Voxceleb-1数据集上设计对比实验，结合集成梯度归因与损失景观可视化分析SSL对说话人识别的贡献。
AI.result: 实验表明，掩码语音预测损失、数据规模和模型大小是SSL提升说话人验证性能的主要因素，而量化器影响较小。
AI.conclusion: SSL在说话人识别中的优势源于多因素协同作用，通过模型结构与训练策略的优化可进一步提升性能。

title: Talking Head Generation Driven by Speech-Related Facial Action Units and Audio- Based on Multimodal Representation Fusion
title_zh: 由语音相关面部动作单元和基于多模态表示融合的音频驱动的说话头生成
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.09951
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.09951
abstract: Talking head generation is to synthesize a lip-synchronized talking head video by inputting an arbitrary face image and corresponding audio clips. Existing methods ignore not only the interaction and relationship of cross-modal information, but also the local driving information of the mouth muscles. In this study, we propose a novel generative framework that contains a dilated non-causal temporal convolutional self-attention network as a multimodal fusion module to promote the relationship learning of cross-modal features. In addition, our proposed method uses both audio- and speech-related facial action units (AUs) as driving information. Speech-related AU information can guide mouth movements more accurately. Because speech is highly correlated with speech-related AUs, we propose an audio-to-AU module to predict speech-related AU information. We utilize pre-trained AU classifier to ensure that the generated images contain correct AU information. We verify the effectiveness of the proposed model on the GRID and TCD-TIMIT datasets. An ablation study is also conducted to verify the contribution of each component. The results of quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms existing methods in terms of both image quality and lip-sync accuracy.
summary: Talking head generation is to synthesize a lip-synchronized talking head video by inputting an arbitrary face image and corresponding audio clips. Existing methods ignore not only the interaction and relationship of cross-modal information, but also the local driving information of the mouth muscles. In this study, we propose a novel generative framework that contains a dilated non-causal temporal convolutional self-attention network as a multimodal fusion module to promote the relationship learning of cross-modal features. In addition, our proposed method uses both audio- and speech-related facial action units (AUs) as driving information. Speech-related AU information can guide mouth movements more accurately. Because speech is highly correlated with speech-related AUs, we propose an audio-to-AU module to predict speech-related AU information. We utilize pre-trained AU classifier to ensure that the generated images contain correct AU information. We verify the effectiveness of the proposed model on the GRID and TCD-TIMIT datasets. An ablation study is also conducted to verify the contribution of each component. The results of quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms existing methods in terms of both image quality and lip-sync accuracy.
abstract_zh: 头像生成是通过输入任意人脸图像和相应的音频片段来合成唇同步的头像视频。现有方法不仅忽略了跨模态信息的交互和关系，而且忽略了口腔肌肉的局部驱动信息。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的生成框架，其中包含扩张的非因果时间卷积自注意力网络作为多模态融合模块，以促进跨模态特征的关系学习。此外，我们提出的方法使用音频和语音相关的面部动作单元（AU）作为驾驶信息。与语音相关的AU信息可以更准确地指导嘴部运动。由于语音与语音相关的 AU 高度相关，因此我们提出了音频到 AU 模块来预测语音相关的 AU 信息。我们利用预先训练的 AU 分类器来确保生成的图像包含正确的 AU 信息。我们在 GRID 和 TCD-TIMIT 数据集上验证了所提出模型的有效性。还进行了消融研究以验证每个组件的贡献。定量和定性实验的结果表明，我们的方法在图像质量和唇形同步精度方面均优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模态表示融合的生成框架，通过结合音频和语音相关面部动作单元（AUs）驱动 talking head 视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了跨模态信息的交互关系及口部肌肉的局部驱动信息，导致生成效果受限。
AI.method: 设计扩张非因果时序卷积自注意力网络作为多模态融合模块，结合音频和语音相关AUs作为驱动信息，并引入音频到AU预测模块与预训练AU分类器确保生成准确性。
AI.result: 在GRID和TCD-TIMIT数据集上验证，定量与定性实验表明方法在图像质量与唇形同步精度上优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态特征融合与语音相关AU驱动，有效提升了 talking head 生成的准确性与自然度。

authors_text: Hojoon Lee,Dongyoon Hwang,Hyunseung Kim,Byungkun Lee,Jaegul Choo
title: DraftRec: Personalized Draft Recommendation for Winning in Multi-Player Online Battle Arena Games
title_zh: DraftRec：多人在线竞技场游戏获胜的个性化选秀推荐
abstract: This paper presents a personalized character recommendation system for Multiplayer Online Battle Arena (MOBA) games which are considered as one of the most popular online video game genres around the world. When playing MOBA games, players go through a draft stage, where they alternately select a virtual character to play. When drafting, players select characters by not only considering their character preferences, but also the synergy and competence of their team's character combination. However, the complexity of drafting induces difficulties for beginners to choose the appropriate characters based on the characters of their team while considering their own champion preferences. To alleviate this problem, we propose DraftRec, a novel hierarchical model which recommends characters by considering each player's champion preferences and the interaction between the players. DraftRec consists of two networks: the player network and the match network. The player network captures the individual player's champion preference, and the match network integrates the complex relationship between the players and their respective champions. We train and evaluate our model from a manually collected 280,000 matches of League of Legends and a publicly available 50,000 matches of Dota2. Empirically, our method achieved state-of-the-art performance in character recommendation and match outcome prediction task. Furthermore, a comprehensive user survey confirms that DraftRec provides convincing and satisfying recommendations. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/dojeon-ai/DraftRec.
summary: This paper presents a personalized character recommendation system for Multiplayer Online Battle Arena (MOBA) games which are considered as one of the most popular online video game genres around the world. When playing MOBA games, players go through a draft stage, where they alternately select a virtual character to play. When drafting, players select characters by not only considering their character preferences, but also the synergy and competence of their team's character combination. However, the complexity of drafting induces difficulties for beginners to choose the appropriate characters based on the characters of their team while considering their own champion preferences. To alleviate this problem, we propose DraftRec, a novel hierarchical model which recommends characters by considering each player's champion preferences and the interaction between the players. DraftRec consists of two networks: the player network and the match network. The player network captures the individual player's champion preference, and the match network integrates the complex relationship between the players and their respective champions. We train and evaluate our model from a manually collected 280,000 matches of League of Legends and a publicly available 50,000 matches of Dota2. Empirically, our method achieved state-of-the-art performance in character recommendation and match outcome prediction task. Furthermore, a comprehensive user survey confirms that DraftRec provides convincing and satisfying recommendations. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/dojeon-ai/DraftRec.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种针对多人在线战斗竞技场（MOBA）游戏的个性化角色推荐系统，MOBA 游戏被认为是世界上最流行的在线视频游戏类型之一。玩 MOBA 游戏时，玩家会经历选秀阶段，轮流选择要玩的虚拟角色。玩家在选秀时不仅会考虑自己的角色喜好，还会考虑团队角色组合的协同性和能力。然而，选秀的复杂性让新手很难根据队伍的角色，同时考虑到自己的英雄偏好来选择合适的角色。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了 DraftRec，这是一种新颖的分层模型，它通过考虑每个玩家的冠军偏好和玩家之间的互动来推荐角色。 DraftRec 由两个网络组成：玩家网络和比赛网络。玩家网络捕获了单个玩家的冠军偏好，而比赛网络则整合了玩家与其各自冠军之间的复杂关系。我们根据手动收集的 280,000 场英雄联盟比赛和公开的 50,000 场 Dota2 比赛来训练和评估我们的模型。根据经验，我们的方法在角色推荐和比赛结果预测任务中实现了最先进的性能。此外，一项全面的用户调查证实，DraftRec 提供了令人信服且令人满意的推荐。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/dojeon-ai/DraftRec 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DraftRec系统，通过个性化推荐帮助MOBA游戏玩家在选秀阶段选择角色，兼顾个人偏好与团队协同。
AI.motivation: MOBA游戏选秀阶段需平衡个人角色偏好与团队组合策略，新手玩家常因复杂性难以做出最佳选择。
AI.method: 构建分层模型DraftRec，包含捕捉玩家角色偏好的玩家网络和建模玩家间交互关系的匹配网络，基于League of Legends和Dota2数据训练。
AI.result: 在角色推荐和比赛结果预测任务中达到SOTA性能，用户调查显示推荐结果具有说服力和满意度。
AI.conclusion: DraftRec有效解决了选秀决策难题，代码和数据集已开源，为MOBA游戏智能辅助系统提供新思路。

title: Self-Driving Car Steering Angle Prediction: Let Transformer Be a Car Again
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车转向角预测：让变形金刚再次成为汽车
abstract: Self-driving vehicles are expected to be a massive economic influence over the coming decades. Udacity https://www.udacity.com/ has been working on a completely open-source self driving car. Thus, it regularly organizes various competitions, one of which was dedicated to steering angle prediction task. In this work, we perform an extensive study on this particular task by exploring the Udacity Self-driving Car Challenge 2. We provide insights on the previous teams' solutions. Moreover, we propose our new architecture that is inspired by some of the teams. We report our performance and compare it with multiple baseline architectures as well as other teams' solutions. We make our work available on GitHub and hope it is useful for the Udacity community and brings insights for future works https://github.com/chingisooinar/AI_self-driving-car
summary: Self-driving vehicles are expected to be a massive economic influence over the coming decades. Udacity https://www.udacity.com/ has been working on a completely open-source self driving car. Thus, it regularly organizes various competitions, one of which was dedicated to steering angle prediction task. In this work, we perform an extensive study on this particular task by exploring the Udacity Self-driving Car Challenge 2. We provide insights on the previous teams' solutions. Moreover, we propose our new architecture that is inspired by some of the teams. We report our performance and compare it with multiple baseline architectures as well as other teams' solutions. We make our work available on GitHub and hope it is useful for the Udacity community and brings insights for future works https://github.com/chingisooinar/AI_self-driving-car
abstract_zh: 预计自动驾驶汽车将在未来几十年产生巨大的经济影响。 Udacity https://www.udacity.com/ 一直致力于开发完全开源的自动驾驶汽车。因此，它定期组织各种比赛，其中之一就是专门针对转向角预测任务的比赛。在这项工作中，我们通过探索 Udacity 自动驾驶汽车挑战赛 2 对这一特定任务进行了广泛的研究。我们提供了对之前团队解决方案的见解。此外，我们提出的新架构受到一些团队的启发。我们报告我们的性能并将其与多个基准架构以及其他团队的解决方案进行比较。我们将我们的工作发布在 GitHub 上，希望它对 Udacity 社区有用，并为未来的工作带来见解 https://github.com/chingisooinar/AI_self-driven-car

AI.tldr: 本文针对Udacity自动驾驶汽车挑战赛中的转向角预测任务，提出了一种受其他团队启发的新架构，并与多种基线模型及其他团队方案进行了性能对比。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶汽车具有巨大的经济潜力，而转向角预测是实现自动驾驶的关键技术。通过分析已有解决方案并提出改进方法，可为后续研究提供参考。
AI.method: 基于Udacity数据集，设计了一种受其他团队方案启发的新型神经网络架构，结合Transformer结构进行转向角预测，并与多种基线模型进行对比实验。

AI.conclusion: 本文提出的架构在自动驾驶转向预测任务中展现出竞争力，代码已开源，可为Udacity社区及未来研究提供参考。

search_text: Self-Driving Car Steering Angle Prediction: Let Transformer Be a Car Again 自动驾驶汽车转向角预测：让变形金刚再次成为汽车 Self-driving vehicles are expected to be a massive economic influence over the coming decades. Udacity https://www.udacity.com/ has been working on a completely open-source self driving car. Thus, it regularly organizes various competitions, one of which was dedicated to steering angle prediction task. In this work, we perform an extensive study on this particular task by exploring the Udacity Self-driving Car Challenge 2. We provide insights on the previous teams' solutions. Moreover, we propose our new architecture that is inspired by some of the teams. We report our performance and compare it with multiple baseline architectures as well as other teams' solutions. We make our work available on GitHub and hope it is useful for the Udacity community and brings insights for future works https://github.com/chingisooinar/AI_self-driving-car 预计自动驾驶汽车将在未来几十年产生巨大的经济影响。 Udacity https://www.udacity.com/ 一直致力于开发完全开源的自动驾驶汽车。因此，它定期组织各种比赛，其中之一就是专门针对转向角预测任务的比赛。在这项工作中，我们通过探索 Udacity 自动驾驶汽车挑战赛 2 对这一特定任务进行了广泛的研究。我们提供了对之前团队解决方案的见解。此外，我们提出的新架构受到一些团队的启发。我们报告我们的性能并将其与多个基准架构以及其他团队的解决方案进行比较。我们将我们的工作发布在 GitHub 上，希望它对 Udacity 社区有用，并为未来的工作带来见解 https://github.com/chingisooinar/AI_self-driven-car 本文针对Udacity自动驾驶汽车挑战赛中的转向角预测任务，提出了一种受其他团队启发的新架构，并与多种基线模型及其他团队方案进行了性能对比。 Chingis Oinar,Eunmin Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Gangwei Jiang,Shiyao Wang,Tiezheng Ge,Yuning Jiang,Ying Wei,Defu Lian
title: Self-Supervised Text Erasing with Controllable Image Synthesis
title_zh: 具有可控图像合成的自监督文本擦除
abstract: Recent efforts on scene text erasing have shown promising results. However, existing methods require rich yet costly label annotations to obtain robust models, which limits the use for practical applications. To this end, we study an unsupervised scenario by proposing a novel Self-supervised Text Erasing (STE) framework that jointly learns to synthesize training images with erasure ground-truth and accurately erase texts in the real world. We first design a style-aware image synthesis function to generate synthetic images with diverse styled texts based on two synthetic mechanisms. To bridge the text style gap between the synthetic and real-world data, a policy network is constructed to control the synthetic mechanisms by picking style parameters with the guidance of two specifically designed rewards. The synthetic training images with erasure ground-truth are then fed to train a coarse-to-fine erasing network. To produce better erasing outputs, a triplet erasure loss is designed to enforce the refinement stage to recover background textures. Moreover, we provide a new dataset (called PosterErase), which contains 60K high-resolution posters with texts and is more challenging for the text erasing task. The proposed method has been extensively evaluated with both PosterErase and the widely-used SCUT-Enstext dataset. Notably, on PosterErase, our unsupervised method achieves 5.07 in terms of FID, with a relative performance of 20.9% over existing supervised baselines.
summary: Recent efforts on scene text erasing have shown promising results. However, existing methods require rich yet costly label annotations to obtain robust models, which limits the use for practical applications. To this end, we study an unsupervised scenario by proposing a novel Self-supervised Text Erasing (STE) framework that jointly learns to synthesize training images with erasure ground-truth and accurately erase texts in the real world. We first design a style-aware image synthesis function to generate synthetic images with diverse styled texts based on two synthetic mechanisms. To bridge the text style gap between the synthetic and real-world data, a policy network is constructed to control the synthetic mechanisms by picking style parameters with the guidance of two specifically designed rewards. The synthetic training images with erasure ground-truth are then fed to train a coarse-to-fine erasing network. To produce better erasing outputs, a triplet erasure loss is designed to enforce the refinement stage to recover background textures. Moreover, we provide a new dataset (called PosterErase), which contains 60K high-resolution posters with texts and is more challenging for the text erasing task. The proposed method has been extensively evaluated with both PosterErase and the widely-used SCUT-Enstext dataset. Notably, on PosterErase, our unsupervised method achieves 5.07 in terms of FID, with a relative performance of 20.9% over existing supervised baselines.
abstract_zh: 最近在场景文本擦除方面的努力已经显示出有希望的结果。然而，现有的方法需要丰富但昂贵的标签注释来获得鲁棒的模型，这限制了实际应用的使用。为此，我们通过提出一种新颖的自监督文本擦除（STE）框架来研究无监督场景，该框架共同学习合成具有擦除基础事实的训练图像并准确擦除现实世界中的文本。我们首先设计了一个风格感知的图像合成函数，基于两种合成机制生成具有多种风格文本的合成图像。为了弥合合成数据和真实数据之间的文本风格差距，构建了一个策略网络，通过在两个专门设计的奖励的指导下选择风格参数来控制合成机制。然后将具有擦除地面实况的合成训练图像输入到训练从粗到细的擦除网络。为了产生更好的擦除输出，设计了三元组擦除损失来强制细化阶段以恢复背景纹理。此外，我们提供了一个新的数据集（称为 PosterErase），其中包含 60K 高分辨率带有文本的海报，对于文本擦除任务更具挑战性。所提出的方法已通过 PosterErase 和广泛使用的 SCUT-Enstext 数据集进行了广泛评估。值得注意的是，在 PosterErase 上，我们的无监督方法在 FID 方面达到了 5.07，相对性能比现有监督基线提高了 20.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督文本擦除框架，通过可控图像合成生成带擦除标注的训练图像，实现无需人工标注的文本擦除任务。
AI.motivation: 现有文本擦除方法依赖昂贵的人工标注数据，限制了实际应用。本文旨在探索无需标注数据的自监督学习方法以提升实用性。
AI.method: 设计风格感知图像合成函数生成多样化文本图像，构建策略网络控制合成风格参数，采用粗到细擦除网络并引入三元组擦除损失优化背景纹理恢复。
AI.result: 在PosterErase数据集上以5.07的FID值超越现有监督方法20.9%，并在SCUT-Enstext数据集上验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自监督框架在无标注数据情况下实现 competitive 文本擦除效果，为实际应用提供了新思路。

To this end, we study an unsupervised scenario by proposing a novel Self-supervised Text Erasing (STE) framework that jointly learns to synthesize training images with erasure ground-truth and accurately erase texts in the real world. We first design a style-aware image synthesis function to generate synthetic images with diverse styled texts based on two synthetic mechanisms. To bridge the text style gap between the synthetic and real-world data, a policy network is constructed to control the synthetic mechanisms by picking style parameters with the guidance of two specifically designed rewards. The proposed method has been extensively evaluated with both PosterErase and the widely-used SCUT-Enstext dataset. title: Minimum Displacement Motion Planning for Movable Obstacles
title_zh: 可移动障碍物的最小位移运动规划
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 17th International Conference on Intelligent Autonomous Systems (IAS-17)
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 17th International Conference on Intelligent Autonomous Systems (IAS-17)
abstract: This paper presents a minimum displacement motion planning problem wherein obstacles are displaced by a minimum amount to find a feasible path. We define a metric for robot-obstacle intersection that measures the extent of the intersection and use this to penalize robot-obstacle overlaps. Employing the actual robot dynamics, the planner first finds a path through the obstacles that minimizes the robot-obstacle intersections. The metric is then used to iteratively displace the obstacles to achieve a feasible path. Several examples are provided that successfully demonstrates the proposed problem.
summary: This paper presents a minimum displacement motion planning problem wherein obstacles are displaced by a minimum amount to find a feasible path. We define a metric for robot-obstacle intersection that measures the extent of the intersection and use this to penalize robot-obstacle overlaps. Employing the actual robot dynamics, the planner first finds a path through the obstacles that minimizes the robot-obstacle intersections. The metric is then used to iteratively displace the obstacles to achieve a feasible path. Several examples are provided that successfully demonstrates the proposed problem.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了最小位移运动规划问题，其中障碍物位移最小量以找到可行路径。我们定义了一个机器人与障碍物交叉点的度量，用于测量交叉点的范围，并用它来惩罚机器人与障碍物的重叠。利用实际的机器人动力学，规划器首先找到一条穿过障碍物的路径，最大限度地减少机器人与障碍物的交叉点。然后使用该度量迭代地移动障碍物以实现可行路径。提供的几个例子成功地证明了所提出的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对可移动障碍物的最小位移运动规划方法，通过最小化机器人与障碍物的交集来寻找可行路径。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划难以处理动态或可移动障碍物场景，需设计一种能有效调整障碍物位移以实现路径可行性的方法。
AI.method: 定义机器人-障碍物交集度量指标，结合实际机器人动力学规划路径，并通过迭代位移障碍物实现最小化交集的可行路径。
AI.result: 通过多个实例验证了该方法在可移动障碍物场景下成功生成可行路径的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种基于最小位移的运动规划框架，为动态障碍物环境下的路径规划提供了新思路。

The metric is then used to iteratively displace the obstacles to achieve a feasible path. Several examples are provided that successfully demonstrates the proposed problem. 本文提出了最小位移运动规划问题，其中障碍物位移最小量以找到可行路径。我们定义了一个机器人与障碍物交叉点的度量，用于测量交叉点的范围，并用它来惩罚机器人与障碍物的重叠。利用实际的机器人动力学，规划器首先找到一条穿过障碍物的路径，最大限度地减少机器人与障碍物的交叉点。然后使用该度量迭代地移动障碍物以实现可行路径。提供的几个例子成功地证明了所提出的问题。 本文提出了一种针对可移动障碍物的最小位移运动规划方法，通过最小化机器人与障碍物的交集来寻找可行路径。 Antony Thomas,Fulvio Mastrogiovanni cs.RO,cs.AI

title: A Multi-Head Convolutional Neural Network With Multi-path Attention improves Image Denoising
title_zh: 具有多路径注意力的多头卷积神经网络改善图像去噪
abstract: Recently, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and attention mechanisms have been widely used in image denoising and achieved satisfactory performance. However, the previous works mostly use a single head to receive the noisy image, limiting the richness of extracted features. Therefore, a novel CNN with multiple heads (MH) named MHCNN is proposed in this paper, whose heads will receive the input images rotated by different rotation angles. MH makes MHCNN simultaneously utilize features of rotated images to remove noise. To integrate these features effectively, we present a novel multi-path attention mechanism (MPA). Unlike previous attention mechanisms that handle pixel-level, channel-level, or patch-level features, MPA focuses on features at the image level. Experiments show MHCNN surpasses other state-of-the-art CNN models on additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN) denoising and real-world image denoising. Its peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) results are higher than other networks, such as BRDNet, RIDNet, PAN-Net, and CSANN. The code is accessible at https://github.com/JiaHongZ/MHCNN.
summary: Recently, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and attention mechanisms have been widely used in image denoising and achieved satisfactory performance. However, the previous works mostly use a single head to receive the noisy image, limiting the richness of extracted features. Therefore, a novel CNN with multiple heads (MH) named MHCNN is proposed in this paper, whose heads will receive the input images rotated by different rotation angles. MH makes MHCNN simultaneously utilize features of rotated images to remove noise. To integrate these features effectively, we present a novel multi-path attention mechanism (MPA). Unlike previous attention mechanisms that handle pixel-level, channel-level, or patch-level features, MPA focuses on features at the image level. Experiments show MHCNN surpasses other state-of-the-art CNN models on additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN) denoising and real-world image denoising. Its peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) results are higher than other networks, such as BRDNet, RIDNet, PAN-Net, and CSANN. The code is accessible at https://github.com/JiaHongZ/MHCNN.
abstract_zh: 近年来，卷积神经网络（CNN）和注意力机制已广泛应用于图像去噪，并取得了令人满意的性能。然而，之前的工作大多使用单头接收噪声图像，限制了提取特征的丰富性。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的多头CNN（MH），称为MHCNN，其头将接收旋转不同旋转角度的输入图像。 MH使得MHCNN同时利用旋转图像的特征来去除噪声。为了有效地整合这些特征，我们提出了一种新颖的多路径注意力机制（MPA）。与之前处理像素级、通道级或块级特征的注意力机制不同，MPA 关注图像级的特征。实验表明，MHCNN 在加性高斯白噪声 (AWGN) 去噪和真实图像去噪方面超越了其他最先进的 CNN 模型。其峰值信噪比（PSNR）结果高于其他网络，如 BRDNet、RIDNet、PAN-Net 和 CSANN。该代码可在 https://github.com/JiahongZ/MHCNN 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多头卷积神经网络（MHCNN）结合多路径注意力机制，用于提升图像去噪性能。
AI.motivation: 传统单头网络限制了特征多样性，无法充分利用旋转图像的特征信息，导致去噪效果受限。
AI.method: 设计多头结构接收不同角度旋转的输入图像，并引入多路径注意力机制（MPA）在图像层级整合特征。
AI.result: 在AWGN和真实场景去噪任务中，MHCNN的PSNR指标优于BRDNet、RIDNet等先进模型，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 多头结构与图像级注意力机制有效提升了特征利用效率，实现了去噪性能的突破。

authors_text: Guanhong Wang,Keyu Lu,Yang Zhou,Zhanhao He,Gaoang Wang
title: Human-Centered Prior-Guided and Task-Dependent Multi-Task Representation Learning for Action Recognition Pre-Training
title_zh: 以人为中心的先验引导和任务依赖的多任务表示学习用于动作识别预训练
comment: This paper has been accepted by ICME 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by ICME 2022
abstract: Recently, much progress has been made for self-supervised action recognition. Most existing approaches emphasize the contrastive relations among videos, including appearance and motion consistency. However, two main issues remain for existing pre-training methods: 1) the learned representation is neutral and not informative for a specific task; 2) multi-task learning-based pre-training sometimes leads to sub-optimal solutions due to inconsistent domains of different tasks. To address the above issues, we propose a novel action recognition pre-training framework, which exploits human-centered prior knowledge that generates more informative representation, and avoids the conflict between multiple tasks by using task-dependent representations. Specifically, we distill knowledge from a human parsing model to enrich the semantic capability of representation. In addition, we combine knowledge distillation with contrastive learning to constitute a task-dependent multi-task framework. We achieve state-of-the-art performance on two popular benchmarks for action recognition task, i.e., UCF101 and HMDB51, verifying the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Recently, much progress has been made for self-supervised action recognition. Most existing approaches emphasize the contrastive relations among videos, including appearance and motion consistency. However, two main issues remain for existing pre-training methods: 1) the learned representation is neutral and not informative for a specific task; 2) multi-task learning-based pre-training sometimes leads to sub-optimal solutions due to inconsistent domains of different tasks. To address the above issues, we propose a novel action recognition pre-training framework, which exploits human-centered prior knowledge that generates more informative representation, and avoids the conflict between multiple tasks by using task-dependent representations. Specifically, we distill knowledge from a human parsing model to enrich the semantic capability of representation. In addition, we combine knowledge distillation with contrastive learning to constitute a task-dependent multi-task framework. We achieve state-of-the-art performance on two popular benchmarks for action recognition task, i.e., UCF101 and HMDB51, verifying the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 最近，自监督动作识别取得了很大进展。大多数现有方法强调视频之间的对比关系，包括外观和运动一致性。然而，现有的预训练方法仍然存在两个主要问题：1）学习到的表示是中性的，对于特定任务没有提供信息； 2）基于多任务学习的预训练有时会由于不同任务的域不一致而导致次优解决方案。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新颖的动作识别预训练框架，该框架利用以人为中心的先验知识来生成更多信息表示，并通过使用依赖于任务的表示来避免多个任务之间的冲突。具体来说，我们从人类解析模型中提取知识以丰富表示的语义能力。此外，我们将知识蒸馏与对比学习相结合，构建了一个任务依赖的多任务框架。我们在两个流行的动作识别任务基准（即 UCF101 和 HMDB51）上实现了最先进的性能，验证了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于以人为中心的先验知识和任务依赖的多任务表征学习框架，用于改进动作识别的预训练方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督动作识别方法存在表征信息不足和多任务冲突的问题，需通过引入先验知识和任务依赖机制提升预训练效果。
AI.method: 结合知识蒸馏与对比学习，利用人类解析模型增强语义表征，并构建任务依赖的多任务框架以避免任务冲突。
AI.result: 在UCF101和HMDB51基准测试中达到最先进的动作识别性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过融合先验知识和任务依赖机制，有效解决了现有预训练方法的不足，提升了动作识别的准确性和泛化能力。

authors_text: Yameng Peng,Andy Song,Vic Ciesielski,Haytham M. Fayek,Xiaojun Chang
title: PRE-NAS: Predictor-assisted Evolutionary Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: PRE-NAS：预测器辅助的进化神经架构搜索
abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) aims to automate architecture engineering in neural networks. This often requires a high computational overhead to evaluate a number of candidate networks from the set of all possible networks in the search space during the search. Prediction of the networks' performance can alleviate this high computational overhead by mitigating the need for evaluating every candidate network. Developing such a predictor typically requires a large number of evaluated architectures which may be difficult to obtain. We address this challenge by proposing a novel evolutionary-based NAS strategy, Predictor-assisted E-NAS (PRE-NAS), which can perform well even with an extremely small number of evaluated architectures. PRE-NAS leverages new evolutionary search strategies and integrates high-fidelity weight inheritance over generations. Unlike one-shot strategies, which may suffer from bias in the evaluation due to weight sharing, offspring candidates in PRE-NAS are topologically homogeneous, which circumvents bias and leads to more accurate predictions. Extensive experiments on NAS-Bench-201 and DARTS search spaces show that PRE-NAS can outperform state-of-the-art NAS methods. With only a single GPU searching for 0.6 days, competitive architecture can be found by PRE-NAS which achieves 2.40% and 24% test error rates on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet respectively.
summary: Neural architecture search (NAS) aims to automate architecture engineering in neural networks. This often requires a high computational overhead to evaluate a number of candidate networks from the set of all possible networks in the search space during the search. Prediction of the networks' performance can alleviate this high computational overhead by mitigating the need for evaluating every candidate network. Developing such a predictor typically requires a large number of evaluated architectures which may be difficult to obtain. We address this challenge by proposing a novel evolutionary-based NAS strategy, Predictor-assisted E-NAS (PRE-NAS), which can perform well even with an extremely small number of evaluated architectures. PRE-NAS leverages new evolutionary search strategies and integrates high-fidelity weight inheritance over generations. Unlike one-shot strategies, which may suffer from bias in the evaluation due to weight sharing, offspring candidates in PRE-NAS are topologically homogeneous, which circumvents bias and leads to more accurate predictions. Extensive experiments on NAS-Bench-201 and DARTS search spaces show that PRE-NAS can outperform state-of-the-art NAS methods. With only a single GPU searching for 0.6 days, competitive architecture can be found by PRE-NAS which achieves 2.40% and 24% test error rates on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet respectively.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）旨在自动化神经网络中的架构工程。这通常需要很高的计算开销来在搜索期间从搜索空间中的所有可能网络的集合中评估多个候选网络。网络性能的预测可以通过减少评估每个候选网络的需要来减轻这种高计算开销。开发这样的预测器通常需要大量的评估架构，而这可能很难获得。我们通过提出一种新颖的基于进化的 NAS 策略来应对这一挑战，即预测器辅助 E-NAS (PRE-NAS)，即使在评估架构数量极少的情况下，该策略也能表现良好。 PRE-NAS 利用新的进化搜索策略并集成了几代人的高保真权重继承。与一次性策略不同，一次性策略可能因权重共享而在评估中遭受偏差，PRE-NAS 中的后代候选者在拓扑上是同质的，这避免了偏差并导致更准确的预测。在 NAS-Bench-201 和 DARTS 搜索空间上进行的大量实验表明，PRE-NAS 的性能优于最先进的 NAS 方法。只需单个 GPU 搜索 0.6 天，PRE-NAS 就可以找到具有竞争力的架构，在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 上分别实现 2.40% 和 24% 的测试错误率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预测器的进化神经网络架构搜索方法PRE-NAS，通过减少候选网络评估次数来降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 传统神经架构搜索（NAS）需要大量计算资源评估候选网络，而预测器开发依赖于大量已评估架构，存在获取困难的问题。
AI.method: 提出PRE-NAS方法，结合进化搜索策略与高保真权重继承机制，通过拓扑同质化子代候选网络避免权重共享偏差，实现少量评估样本下的高效搜索。
AI.result: 在NAS-Bench-201和DARTS数据集上优于现有NAS方法，单GPU运行0.6天即可在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上达到2.40%和24%的测试误差。

search_text: PRE-NAS: Predictor-assisted Evolutionary Neural Architecture Search PRE-NAS：预测器辅助的进化神经架构搜索 Neural architecture search (NAS) aims to automate architecture engineering in neural networks. This often requires a high computational overhead to evaluate a number of candidate networks from the set of all possible networks in the search space during the search. Prediction of the networks' performance can alleviate this high computational overhead by mitigating the need for evaluating every candidate network. Developing such a predictor typically requires a large number of evaluated architectures which may be difficult to obtain. We address this challenge by proposing a novel evolutionary-based NAS strategy, Predictor-assisted E-NAS (PRE-NAS), which can perform well even with an extremely small number of evaluated architectures. PRE-NAS leverages new evolutionary search strategies and integrates high-fidelity weight inheritance over generations. Unlike one-shot strategies, which may suffer from bias in the evaluation due to weight sharing, offspring candidates in PRE-NAS are topologically homogeneous, which circumvents bias and leads to more accurate predictions. Extensive experiments on NAS-Bench-201 and DARTS search spaces show that PRE-NAS can outperform state-of-the-art NAS methods. With only a single GPU searching for 0.6 days, competitive architecture can be found by PRE-NAS which achieves 2.40% and 24% test error rates on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet respectively. 神经架构搜索（NAS）旨在自动化神经网络中的架构工程。这通常需要很高的计算开销来在搜索期间从搜索空间中的所有可能网络的集合中评估多个候选网络。网络性能的预测可以通过减少评估每个候选网络的需要来减轻这种高计算开销。开发这样的预测器通常需要大量的评估架构，而这可能很难获得。我们通过提出一种新颖的基于进化的 NAS 策略来应对这一挑战，即预测器辅助 E-NAS (PRE-NAS)，即使在评估架构数量极少的情况下，该策略也能表现良好。 PRE-NAS 利用新的进化搜索策略并集成了几代人的高保真权重继承。与一次性策略不同，一次性策略可能因权重共享而在评估中遭受偏差，PRE-NAS 中的后代候选者在拓扑上是同质的，这避免了偏差并导致更准确的预测。在 NAS-Bench-201 和 DARTS 搜索空间上进行的大量实验表明，PRE-NAS 的性能优于最先进的 NAS 方法。只需单个 GPU 搜索 0.6 天，PRE-NAS 就可以找到具有竞争力的架构，在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 上分别实现 2.40% 和 24% 的测试错误率。 本文提出了一种基于预测器的进化神经网络架构搜索方法PRE-NAS，通过减少候选网络评估次数来降低计算开销。 Yameng Peng,Andy Song,Vic Ciesielski,Haytham M. Fayek,Xiaojun Chang cs.CV

title: Regularized Box-Simplex Games and Dynamic Decremental Bipartite Matching
title_zh: 正则化盒单纯形博弈与动态递减二分匹配
abstract: Box-simplex games are a family of bilinear minimax objectives which encapsulate graph-structured problems such as maximum flow [She17], optimal transport [JST19], and bipartite matching [AJJ+22]. We develop efficient near-linear time, high-accuracy solvers for regularized variants of these games. Beyond the immediate applications of such solvers for computing Sinkhorn distances, a prominent tool in machine learning, we show that these solvers can be used to obtain improved running times for maintaining a (fractional) $ε$-approximate maximum matching in a dynamic decremental bipartite graph against an adaptive adversary. We give a generic framework which reduces this dynamic matching problem to solving regularized graph-structured optimization problems to high accuracy. Through our reduction framework, our regularized box-simplex game solver implies a new algorithm for dynamic decremental bipartite matching in total time $\tilde{O}(m \cdot ε^{-3})$, from an initial graph with $m$ edges and $n$ nodes. We further show how to use recent advances in flow optimization [CKL+22] to improve our runtime to $m^{1 + o(1)} \cdot ε^{-2}$, thereby demonstrating the versatility of our reduction-based approach. These results improve upon the previous best runtime of $\tilde{O}(m \cdot ε^{-4})$ [BGS20] and illustrate the utility of using regularized optimization problem solvers for designing dynamic algorithms.
summary: Box-simplex games are a family of bilinear minimax objectives which encapsulate graph-structured problems such as maximum flow [She17], optimal transport [JST19], and bipartite matching [AJJ+22]. We develop efficient near-linear time, high-accuracy solvers for regularized variants of these games. Beyond the immediate applications of such solvers for computing Sinkhorn distances, a prominent tool in machine learning, we show that these solvers can be used to obtain improved running times for maintaining a (fractional) $ε$-approximate maximum matching in a dynamic decremental bipartite graph against an adaptive adversary. We give a generic framework which reduces this dynamic matching problem to solving regularized graph-structured optimization problems to high accuracy. Through our reduction framework, our regularized box-simplex game solver implies a new algorithm for dynamic decremental bipartite matching in total time $\tilde{O}(m \cdot ε^{-3})$, from an initial graph with $m$ edges and $n$ nodes. We further show how to use recent advances in flow optimization [CKL+22] to improve our runtime to $m^{1 + o(1)} \cdot ε^{-2}$, thereby demonstrating the versatility of our reduction-based approach. These results improve upon the previous best runtime of $\tilde{O}(m \cdot ε^{-4})$ [BGS20] and illustrate the utility of using regularized optimization problem solvers for designing dynamic algorithms.
abstract_zh: 盒子单纯形游戏是一系列双线性极小极大目标，封装了图结构问题，例如最大流 [She17]、最优传输 [JST19] 和二分匹配 [AJJ+22]。我们为这些游戏的正则化变体开发了高效的近线性时间、高精度求解器。除了直接应用此类求解器计算 Sinkhorn 距离（机器学习中的一个重要工具）之外，我们还表明，这些求解器还可用于获得改进的运行时间，以在动态递减二分图中与自适应对手保持（分数）$ε$ 近似最大匹配。我们给出了一个通用框架，可以将动态匹配问题简化为高精度地解决正则化图结构优化问题。通过我们的归约框架，我们的正则化盒单纯形博弈求解器暗示了一种新的动态递减二分匹配算法，总时间为 $\tilde{O}(m \cdot ε^{-3})$，来自具有 $m$ 边和 $n$ 节点的初始图。我们进一步展示了如何利用流优化 [CKL+22] 的最新进展将运行时间提高到 $m^{1 + o(1)} \cdot ε^{-2}$，从而证明了我们基于缩减的方法的多功能性。这些结果改进了 $\tilde{O}(m \cdot ε^{-4})$ [BGS20] 之前的最佳运行时间，并说明了使用正则化优化问题求解器设计动态算法的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了正则化箱-单纯形博弈的高效求解方法，并将其应用于动态递减二分图匹配问题，提出了改进的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有动态二分图匹配算法的运行时间较高，且缺乏对正则化优化问题的系统性应用，需设计更高效的求解框架。
AI.method: 开发了近线性时间高精度求解正则化箱-单纯形博弈的算法，并构建通用框架将动态匹配问题转化为此类优化问题，结合最新流优化技术进一步提升效率。
AI.result: 实现了总时间为Õ(m·ε⁻³)的动态匹配算法，通过优化技术改进至m¹⁺o(1)·ε⁻²，优于之前的Õ(m·ε⁻⁴)结果。
AI.conclusion: 正则化优化求解器为设计动态算法提供了有效途径，显著提升了二分图匹配问题的运行效率。

title: Dataset for Robust and Accurate Leading Vehicle Velocity Recognition
title_zh: 用于稳健且准确的领先车辆速度识别的数据集
abstract: Recognition of the surrounding environment using a camera is an important technology in Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems and Autonomous Driving, and recognition technology is often solved by machine learning approaches such as deep learning in recent years. Machine learning requires datasets for learning and evaluation. To develop robust recognition technology in the real world, in addition to normal driving environment, data in environments that are difficult for cameras such as rainy weather or nighttime are essential. We have constructed a dataset that one can benchmark the technology, targeting the velocity recognition of the leading vehicle. This task is an important one for the Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems and Autonomous Driving. The dataset is available at https://signate.jp/competitions/657
summary: Recognition of the surrounding environment using a camera is an important technology in Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems and Autonomous Driving, and recognition technology is often solved by machine learning approaches such as deep learning in recent years. Machine learning requires datasets for learning and evaluation. To develop robust recognition technology in the real world, in addition to normal driving environment, data in environments that are difficult for cameras such as rainy weather or nighttime are essential. This task is an important one for the Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems and Autonomous Driving. The dataset is available at https://signate.jp/competitions/657
abstract_zh: 利用摄像头识别周围环境是高级驾驶辅助系统和自动驾驶中的一项重要技术，而识别技术近年来往往通过深度学习等机器学习方法来解决。机器学习需要数据集来进行学习和评估。为了在现实世界中开发强大的识别技术，除了正常的驾驶环境之外，雨天或夜间等摄像头难以拍摄的环境中的数据也是必不可少的。我们构建了一个数据集，可以对技术进行基准测试，目标是领先车辆的速度识别。这项任务对于高级驾驶辅助系统和自动驾驶来说是一项重要任务。该数据集可在 https://signate.jp/competitions/657 获取

AI.tldr: 构建用于评估前车速度识别技术的鲁棒数据集，包含多种复杂环境下的摄像头数据。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习方法依赖多样化数据集，而恶劣环境（如雨天、夜间）数据不足，影响技术鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采集包含正常及复杂环境（雨天、夜间）的摄像头数据，构建前车速度识别基准数据集。
AI.result: 完成数据集构建并公开，提供技术验证平台，链接为https://signate.jp/competitions/657。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集可推动ADAS及自动驾驶中前车速度识别技术在复杂场景下的准确性和鲁棒性发展。

conclusion: 该数据集可推动ADAS及自动驾驶中前车速度识别技术在复杂场景下的准确性和鲁棒性发展。
search_text: Dataset for Robust and Accurate Leading Vehicle Velocity Recognition 用于稳健且准确的领先车辆速度识别的数据集 Recognition of the surrounding environment using a camera is an important technology in Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems and Autonomous Driving, and recognition technology is often solved by machine learning approaches such as deep learning in recent years. Machine learning requires datasets for learning and evaluation. To develop robust recognition technology in the real world, in addition to normal driving environment, data in environments that are difficult for cameras such as rainy weather or nighttime are essential. We have constructed a dataset that one can benchmark the technology, targeting the velocity recognition of the leading vehicle. This task is an important one for the Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems and Autonomous Driving. The dataset is available at https://signate.jp/competitions/657 利用摄像头识别周围环境是高级驾驶辅助系统和自动驾驶中的一项重要技术，而识别技术近年来往往通过深度学习等机器学习方法来解决。机器学习需要数据集来进行学习和评估。为了在现实世界中开发强大的识别技术，除了正常的驾驶环境之外，雨天或夜间等摄像头难以拍摄的环境中的数据也是必不可少的。我们构建了一个数据集，可以对技术进行基准测试，目标是领先车辆的速度识别。这项任务对于高级驾驶辅助系统和自动驾驶来说是一项重要任务。该数据集可在 https://signate.jp/competitions/657 获取 构建用于评估前车速度识别技术的鲁棒数据集，包含多种复杂环境下的摄像头数据。 Genya Ogawa,Toru Saito,Noriyuki Aoi cs.CV

authors_text: Thilini Wijesiriwardene,Vinh Nguyen,Goonmeet Bajaj,Hong Yung Yip,Vishesh Javangula,Yuqing Mao,Kin Wah Fung,Srinivasan Parthasarathy,Amit P. Sheth,Olivier Bodenreider
title: UBERT: A Novel Language Model for Synonymy Prediction at Scale in the UMLS Metathesaurus
title_zh: UBERT：UMLS Metathesaurus 中大规模同义预测的新型语言模型
abstract: The UMLS Metathesaurus integrates more than 200 biomedical source vocabularies. During the Metathesaurus construction process, synonymous terms are clustered into concepts by human editors, assisted by lexical similarity algorithms. This process is error-prone and time-consuming. Recently, a deep learning model (LexLM) has been developed for the UMLS Vocabulary Alignment (UVA) task. This work introduces UBERT, a BERT-based language model, pretrained on UMLS terms via a supervised Synonymy Prediction (SP) task replacing the original Next Sentence Prediction (NSP) task. The effectiveness of UBERT for UMLS Metathesaurus construction process is evaluated using the UMLS Vocabulary Alignment (UVA) task. We show that UBERT outperforms the LexLM, as well as biomedical BERT-based models. Key to the performance of UBERT are the synonymy prediction task specifically developed for UBERT, the tight alignment of training data to the UVA task, and the similarity of the models used for pretrained UBERT.
summary: The UMLS Metathesaurus integrates more than 200 biomedical source vocabularies. During the Metathesaurus construction process, synonymous terms are clustered into concepts by human editors, assisted by lexical similarity algorithms. This process is error-prone and time-consuming. Recently, a deep learning model (LexLM) has been developed for the UMLS Vocabulary Alignment (UVA) task. This work introduces UBERT, a BERT-based language model, pretrained on UMLS terms via a supervised Synonymy Prediction (SP) task replacing the original Next Sentence Prediction (NSP) task. The effectiveness of UBERT for UMLS Metathesaurus construction process is evaluated using the UMLS Vocabulary Alignment (UVA) task. We show that UBERT outperforms the LexLM, as well as biomedical BERT-based models. Key to the performance of UBERT are the synonymy prediction task specifically developed for UBERT, the tight alignment of training data to the UVA task, and the similarity of the models used for pretrained UBERT.
abstract_zh: UMLS Metathesaurus 集成了 200 多个生物医学源词汇表。在元叙词表构建过程中，人类编辑在词汇相似性算法的协助下将同义术语聚类成概念。这个过程容易出错且耗时。最近，针对 UMLS 词汇对齐（UVA）任务开发了深度学习模型（LexLM）。这项工作引入了 UBERT，一种基于 BERT 的语言模型，通过监督同义词预测 (SP) 任务对 UMLS 术语进行预训练，取代了原始的下一句预测 (NSP) 任务。使用 UMLS 词汇对齐 (UVA) 任务评估 UBERT 对于 UMLS Metathesaurus 构建过程的有效性。我们证明 UBERT 优于 LexLM 以及基于 BERT 的生物医学模型。 UBERT 性能的关键是专门为 UBERT 开发的同义词预测任务、训练数据与 UVA 任务的紧密对齐以及用于预训练 UBERT 的模型的相似性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UBERT，一种基于BERT的预训练语言模型，用于在UMLS Metathesaurus中进行大规模同义词预测。
AI.motivation: UMLS Metathesaurus的同义词聚类过程依赖人工和传统算法，存在效率低、易出错的问题，需更高效的模型支持。
AI.method: 开发UBERT模型，通过监督的同义词预测任务替代BERT的NSP任务，在UMLS术语上预训练，并针对UVA任务优化训练数据对齐。
AI.result: UBERT在UVA任务中优于LexLM及现有生物医学BERT模型，关键因素除了定制化任务外，还包括训练数据与目标任务的紧密匹配。
AI.conclusion: UBERT通过专门设计的同义词预测任务和训练数据对齐策略，显著提升了UMLS Metathesaurus构建中的同义词识别效果。

title: Extending the Technology Acceptance Model 3 to Incorporate the Phenomenon of Warm-Glow
title_zh: 扩展技术接受模型 3 以纳入暖光现象
abstract: In this paper, we extend the third evolution of the Technology Acceptance Model (TAM3) to incorporate warm-glow with the aim of understanding the role this phenomenon plays on user adoption decisions. Warm-glow is the feeling of satisfaction or pleasure (or both) that is experienced by individuals after they do something "good" for their fellow human. Two constructs - perceived extrinsic warm-glow (PEWG) and perceived intrinsic warm-glow (PIWG) - were incorporated into the TAM3 model to measure the two dimensions of user-experienced warm-glow, forming what we refer to as the TAM3 + WG model. An experimental approach was taken to evaluate the suitability of the proposed model (i.e., TAM3 + WG). A vignette was created to present users with a hypothetical technology designed to evoke warm-glow in participants. Our TAM3 + WG model was found to be superior in terms of fit to the TAM3 model. Furthermore, the PEWG and PIWG constructs were confirmed to be unique within the original TAM3 model. The findings indicate that the factors that have the greatest influence on consumer decisions are (in decreasing order) perceived usefulness (PU), PIWG, subjective norm (SN), and PEWG. Additionally, a higher PEWG resulted in the technology being perceived as more useful. In other words, both extrinsic and intrinsic warm-glow play a prominent role in user decisions as to whether or not to adopt a particular technology.
summary: In this paper, we extend the third evolution of the Technology Acceptance Model (TAM3) to incorporate warm-glow with the aim of understanding the role this phenomenon plays on user adoption decisions. Warm-glow is the feeling of satisfaction or pleasure (or both) that is experienced by individuals after they do something "good" for their fellow human. Two constructs - perceived extrinsic warm-glow (PEWG) and perceived intrinsic warm-glow (PIWG) - were incorporated into the TAM3 model to measure the two dimensions of user-experienced warm-glow, forming what we refer to as the TAM3 + WG model. An experimental approach was taken to evaluate the suitability of the proposed model (i.e., TAM3 + WG). A vignette was created to present users with a hypothetical technology designed to evoke warm-glow in participants. Our TAM3 + WG model was found to be superior in terms of fit to the TAM3 model. Furthermore, the PEWG and PIWG constructs were confirmed to be unique within the original TAM3 model. The findings indicate that the factors that have the greatest influence on consumer decisions are (in decreasing order) perceived usefulness (PU), PIWG, subjective norm (SN), and PEWG. Additionally, a higher PEWG resulted in the technology being perceived as more useful. In other words, both extrinsic and intrinsic warm-glow play a prominent role in user decisions as to whether or not to adopt a particular technology.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们扩展了技术接受模型（TAM3）的第三次演进，将暖光纳入其中，旨在了解这种现象对用户采用决策的作用。暖光是个体在为人类同胞做了一些“好事”后所体验到的满足感或愉悦感（或两者兼而有之）。感知外在暖光 (PEWG) 和感知内在暖光 (PIWG) 两种结构被纳入 TAM3 模型中，以测量用户体验的暖光的两个维度，形成我们所说的 TAM3 + WG 模型。采用实验方法来评估所提出模型（即 TAM3 + WG）的适用性。创建一个小插图是为了向用户展示一种假设的技术，旨在唤起参与者的热情。我们的 TAM3 + WG 模型在拟合度方面优于 TAM3 模型。此外，PEWG 和 PIWG 构造被证实在原始 TAM3 模型中是唯一的。研究结果表明，对消费者决策影响最大的因素是（按降序排列）感知有用性（PU）、PIWG、主观规范（SN）和 PEWG。此外，较高的 PEWG 会导致该技术被认为更有用。换句话说，外在和内在的暖光在用户决定是否采用特定技术时都发挥着重要作用。

AI.tldr: 本文将技术接受模型3（TAM3）扩展为TAM3+WG模型，纳入温暖 glow（暖意）的两个维度（外在和内在），以研究其对用户技术采纳决策的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有技术接受模型（如TAM3）未充分考虑用户因行善而产生的温暖 glow 情感对技术采纳的影响，需补充该现象以提升模型解释力。
AI.method: 通过实验方法设计虚拟场景（vignette），向用户展示能激发温暖 glow 的假设技术，并采用结构方程模型验证TAM3+WG的适用性。
AI.result: TAM3+WG模型拟合度优于原TAM3模型；温暖 glow 的内在（PIWG）和外在（PEWG）维度被证实为独立影响因素，其中感知有用性（PU）影响最大，其次为PIWG、主观规范（SN）和PEWG。
AI.conclusion: 温暖 glow（包括内在和外在）显著影响用户技术采纳决策，未来模型应纳入情感因素以更全面解释用户行为。

In other words, both extrinsic and intrinsic warm-glow play a prominent role in user decisions as to whether or not to adopt a particular technology. 在本文中，我们扩展了技术接受模型（TAM3）的第三次演进，将暖光纳入其中，旨在了解这种现象对用户采用决策的作用。暖光是个体在为人类同胞做了一些“好事”后所体验到的满足感或愉悦感（或两者兼而有之）。感知外在暖光 (PEWG) 和感知内在暖光 (PIWG) 两种结构被纳入 TAM3 模型中，以测量用户体验的暖光的两个维度，形成我们所说的 TAM3 + WG 模型。采用实验方法来评估所提出模型（即 TAM3 + WG）的适用性。创建一个小插图是为了向用户展示一种假设的技术，旨在唤起参与者的热情。我们的 TAM3 + WG 模型在拟合度方面优于 TAM3 模型。此外，PEWG 和 PIWG 构造被证实在原始 TAM3 模型中是唯一的。研究结果表明，对消费者决策影响最大的因素是（按降序排列）感知有用性（PU）、PIWG、主观规范（SN）和 PEWG。此外，较高的 PEWG 会导致该技术被认为更有用。换句话说，外在和内在的暖光在用户决定是否采用特定技术时都发挥着重要作用。 本文将技术接受模型3（TAM3）扩展为TAM3+WG模型，纳入温暖 glow（暖意）的两个维度（外在和内在），以研究其对用户技术采纳决策的影响。 Antonios Saravanos,Stavros Zervoudakis,Dongnanzi Zheng cs.CY,cs.HC,cs.IT

authors_text: Jiahong Liu,Min Zhou,Philippe Fournier-Viger,Menglin Yang,Lujia Pan,Mourad Nouioua
title: Discovering Representative Attribute-stars via Minimum Description Length
title_zh: 通过最小描述长度发现代表性属性星
abstract: Graphs are a popular data type found in many domains. Numerous techniques have been proposed to find interesting patterns in graphs to help understand the data and support decision-making. However, there are generally two limitations that hinder their practical use: (1) they have multiple parameters that are hard to set but greatly influence results, (2) and they generally focus on identifying complex subgraphs while ignoring relationships between attributes of nodes.Graphs are a popular data type found in many domains. Numerous techniques have been proposed to find interesting patterns in graphs to help understand the data and support decision-making. However, there are generally two limitations that hinder their practical use: (1) they have multiple parameters that are hard to set but greatly influence results, (2) and they generally focus on identifying complex subgraphs while ignoring relationships between attributes of nodes. To address these problems, we propose a parameter-free algorithm named CSPM (Compressing Star Pattern Miner) which identifies star-shaped patterns that indicate strong correlations among attributes via the concept of conditional entropy and the minimum description length principle. Experiments performed on several benchmark datasets show that CSPM reveals insightful and interpretable patterns and is efficient in runtime. Moreover, quantitative evaluations on two real-world applications show that CSPM has broad applications as it successfully boosts the accuracy of graph attribute completion models by up to 30.68\% and uncovers important patterns in telecommunication alarm data.
summary: Graphs are a popular data type found in many domains. Numerous techniques have been proposed to find interesting patterns in graphs to help understand the data and support decision-making. However, there are generally two limitations that hinder their practical use: (1) they have multiple parameters that are hard to set but greatly influence results, (2) and they generally focus on identifying complex subgraphs while ignoring relationships between attributes of nodes.Graphs are a popular data type found in many domains. Numerous techniques have been proposed to find interesting patterns in graphs to help understand the data and support decision-making. To address these problems, we propose a parameter-free algorithm named CSPM (Compressing Star Pattern Miner) which identifies star-shaped patterns that indicate strong correlations among attributes via the concept of conditional entropy and the minimum description length principle. Experiments performed on several benchmark datasets show that CSPM reveals insightful and interpretable patterns and is efficient in runtime. Moreover, quantitative evaluations on two real-world applications show that CSPM has broad applications as it successfully boosts the accuracy of graph attribute completion models by up to 30.68\% and uncovers important patterns in telecommunication alarm data.
abstract_zh: 图是许多领域中常见的流行数据类型。人们提出了许多技术来寻找图表中有趣的模式，以帮助理解数据并支持决策。然而，通常有两个限制阻碍了它们的实际使用：（1）它们有多个难以设置但对结果影响很大的参数，（2）它们通常专注于识别复杂的子图，而忽略节点属性之间的关系。图是许多领域中常见的流行数据类型。人们提出了许多技术来寻找图表中有趣的模式，以帮助理解数据并支持决策。然而，通常有两个限制阻碍了它们的实际使用：（1）它们有多个难以设置但对结果影响很大的参数，（2）它们通常专注于识别复杂的子图，而忽略节点属性之间的关系。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为 CSPM（压缩星形模式挖掘器）的无参数算法，该算法通过条件熵的概念和最小描述长度原理来识别表明属性之间强相关性的星形模式。在多个基准数据集上进行的实验表明，CSPM 揭示了富有洞察力和可解释的模式，并且在运行时非常高效。此外，对两个实际应用的定量评估表明，CSPM 具有广泛的应用，因为它成功地将图属性完成模型的准确性提高了 30.68%，并揭示了电信警报数据中的重要模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数-free算法CSPM，通过条件熵和最小描述长度原理发现图中具有强属性关联的星型模式。
AI.motivation: 现有图分析技术存在参数设置困难且忽视节点属性间关系的局限性，需开发更实用的模式挖掘方法。
AI.method: 基于条件熵与最小描述长度原理，设计参数-free的CSPM算法，聚焦挖掘表征属性强关联的星型结构模式。
AI.result: 在基准数据集实验显示CSPM具有高效运行表现，实际应用中提升图属性补全模型准确率最高达30.68%，并在电信告警数据中发现关键模式。
AI.conclusion: CSPM有效解决了传统方法的参数依赖性和属性关系忽视问题，在多个应用场景中验证了其有效性与实用性。

title: Mapping suburban bicycle lanes using street scene images and deep learning
title_zh: 使用街景图像和深度学习绘制郊区自行车道
comment: 77 pages, 24 figures. A minor thesis submitted in partial fulfilment of the requirements for the degree of Master of Data Science
comments: 77 pages, 24 figures. A minor thesis submitted in partial fulfilment of the requirements for the degree of Master of Data Science
abstract: On-road bicycle lanes improve safety for cyclists, and encourage participation in cycling for active transport and recreation. With many local authorities responsible for portions of the infrastructure, official maps and datasets of bicycle lanes may be out-of-date and incomplete. Even "crowdsourced" databases may have significant gaps, especially outside popular metropolitan areas. This thesis presents a method to create a map of bicycle lanes in a survey area by taking sample street scene images from each road, and then applying a deep learning model that has been trained to recognise bicycle lane symbols. The list of coordinates where bicycle lane markings are detected is then correlated to geospatial data about the road network to record bicycle lane routes. The method was applied to successfully build a map for a survey area in the outer suburbs of Melbourne. It was able to identify bicycle lanes not previously recorded in the official state government dataset, OpenStreetMap, or the "biking" layer of Google Maps.

It was able to identify bicycle lanes not previously recorded in the official state government dataset, OpenStreetMap, or the "biking" layer of Google Maps.
abstract_zh: 公路自行车道提高了骑自行车者的安全，并鼓励骑自行车进行积极的交通和娱乐。由于许多地方当局负责部分基础设施，自行车道的官方地图和数据集可能已经过时且不完整。即使是“众包”数据库也可能存在巨大差距，尤其是在热门大都市区之外。本论文提出了一种通过从每条道路获取样本街道场景图像来创建调查区域自行车道地图的方法，然后应用经过训练来识别自行车道符号的深度学习模型。然后，将检测到自行车道标记的坐标列表与有关道路网络的地理空间数据相关联，以记录自行车道路线。该方法已成功应用于墨尔本远郊的一个调查区域绘制地图。它能够识别以前未记录在官方州政府数据集、OpenStreetMap 或谷歌地图“自行车”层中的自行车道。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种利用街景图像和深度学习模型绘制郊区自行车道地图的方法。
AI.motivation: 官方自行车道地图和众包数据存在更新滞后及郊区覆盖不足的问题，需更精准的映射技术。
AI.method: 通过采集道路街景图像，训练深度学习模型识别车道标识，并与地理空间数据关联生成自行车道网络。
AI.result: 成功绘制墨尔本郊区地图，识别出官方数据和主流地图未收录的自行车道信息。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效补充传统数据源的不足，为郊区自行车道精准测绘提供可行方案。

authors_text: Qiucheng Wu,Yifan Jiang,Junru Wu,Kai Wang,Gong Zhang,Humphrey Shi,Zhangyang Wang,Shiyu Chang
title: Grasping the Arrow of Time from the Singularity: Decoding Micromotion in Low-dimensional Latent Spaces from StyleGAN
title_zh: 从奇点把握时间之箭：用StyleGAN解码低维潜在空间中的微动
abstract: The disentanglement of StyleGAN latent space has paved the way for realistic and controllable image editing, but does StyleGAN know anything about temporal motion, as it was only trained on static images? To study the motion features in the latent space of StyleGAN, in this paper, we hypothesize and demonstrate that a series of meaningful, natural, and versatile small, local movements (referred to as "micromotion", such as expression, head movement, and aging effect) can be represented in low-rank spaces extracted from the latent space of a conventionally pre-trained StyleGAN-v2 model for face generation, with the guidance of proper "anchors" in the form of either short text or video clips. Starting from one target face image, with the editing direction decoded from the low-rank space, its micromotion features can be represented as simple as an affine transformation over its latent feature. Perhaps more surprisingly, such micromotion subspace, even learned from just single target face, can be painlessly transferred to other unseen face images, even those from vastly different domains (such as oil painting, cartoon, and sculpture faces). It demonstrates that the local feature geometry corresponding to one type of micromotion is aligned across different face subjects, and hence that StyleGAN-v2 is indeed "secretly" aware of the subject-disentangled feature variations caused by that micromotion. We present various successful examples of applying our low-dimensional micromotion subspace technique to directly and effortlessly manipulate faces, showing high robustness, low computational overhead, and impressive domain transferability. Our codes are available at https://github.com/wuqiuche/micromotion-StyleGAN.

Perhaps more surprisingly, such micromotion subspace, even learned from just single target face, can be painlessly transferred to other unseen face images, even those from vastly different domains (such as oil painting, cartoon, and sculpture faces). We present various successful examples of applying our low-dimensional micromotion subspace technique to directly and effortlessly manipulate faces, showing high robustness, low computational overhead, and impressive domain transferability. Our codes are available at https://github.com/wuqiuche/micromotion-StyleGAN.
abstract_zh: StyleGAN 潜在空间的解开为现实且可控的图像编辑铺平了道路，但是 StyleGAN 是否了解时间运动，因为它只在静态图像上进行训练？为了研究 StyleGAN 潜在空间中的运动特征，在本文中，我们假设并证明了一系列有意义的、自然的、通用的小型局部运动（称为“微运动”，例如表情、头部运动和老化效应）可以在从用于面部生成的传统预训练 StyleGAN-v2 模型的潜在空间中提取的低阶空间中表示，并以短文本或视频剪辑形式的适当“锚点”为指导。从一张目标人脸图像开始，从低秩空间解码编辑方向，其微运动特征可以像对其潜在特征进行仿射变换一样简单地表示。也许更令人惊讶的是，这种微运动子空间，即使只从单个目标面部学习，也可以轻松地转移到其他看不见的面部图像，甚至是来自截然不同的领域的图像（例如油画、卡通和雕塑面部）。它表明，与一种类型的微运动相对应的局部特征几何形状在不同的面部主体上是对齐的，因此 StyleGAN-v2 确实“秘密”地意识到由该微运动引起的主体解开的特征变化。我们展示了应用低维微运动子空间技术直接、轻松地操纵面部的各种成功示例，显示出高鲁棒性、低计算开销和令人印象深刻的域可转移性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/wuqiuche/micromotion-StyleGAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从StyleGAN的潜在空间中提取低维子空间，以捕捉和操控人脸图像中的微运动（如表情、头部动作和衰老效果）。
AI.motivation: 尽管StyleGAN仅通过静态图像训练，但作者假设其潜在空间可能隐含对时间运动特征的编码，试图验证并利用这种潜在能力实现可控的微运动编辑。
AI.method: 通过从预训练StyleGAN-v2的潜在空间中提取低秩子空间，并利用文本或视频片段作为锚点指导，将微运动表示为潜在特征的仿射变换，且该子空间可跨不同领域（如油画、卡通）迁移。
AI.result: 成功实现了对人脸图像的微运动操控，具有高鲁棒性、低计算开销和跨领域迁移能力，验证了StyleGAN-v2潜在空间中微运动特征的几何一致性。
AI.conclusion: StyleGAN-v2隐含了与微运动相关的主体解耦特征变化，通过低维子空间技术可高效实现跨领域的人脸微运动编辑，为可控图像生成提供了新思路。

search_text: Grasping the Arrow of Time from the Singularity: Decoding Micromotion in Low-dimensional Latent Spaces from StyleGAN 从奇点把握时间之箭：用StyleGAN解码低维潜在空间中的微动 The disentanglement of StyleGAN latent space has paved the way for realistic and controllable image editing, but does StyleGAN know anything about temporal motion, as it was only trained on static images? To study the motion features in the latent space of StyleGAN, in this paper, we hypothesize and demonstrate that a series of meaningful, natural, and versatile small, local movements (referred to as "micromotion", such as expression, head movement, and aging effect) can be represented in low-rank spaces extracted from the latent space of a conventionally pre-trained StyleGAN-v2 model for face generation, with the guidance of proper "anchors" in the form of either short text or video clips. Starting from one target face image, with the editing direction decoded from the low-rank space, its micromotion features can be represented as simple as an affine transformation over its latent feature. Perhaps more surprisingly, such micromotion subspace, even learned from just single target face, can be painlessly transferred to other unseen face images, even those from vastly different domains (such as oil painting, cartoon, and sculpture faces). It demonstrates that the local feature geometry corresponding to one type of micromotion is aligned across different face subjects, and hence that StyleGAN-v2 is indeed "secretly" aware of the subject-disentangled feature variations caused by that micromotion. We present various successful examples of applying our low-dimensional micromotion subspace technique to directly and effortlessly manipulate faces, showing high robustness, low computational overhead, and impressive domain transferability. Our codes are available at https://github.com/wuqiuche/micromotion-StyleGAN.
